Name: SIBCA
Description:
From humble beginnings in 1977, SIBCA has grown to become a leading Solution Integrator Provider in UAE for Fire Protection and Life Safety Systems, Security Systems, HVAC, Building Management Systems, ELV Systems, Audio Visual Systems, Information & Communications Technology (ICT).

With more than 2000 dedicated staff working across UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, Jordan, Saudi Arabia and India we have built a reputation of trust and excellence over the last 46 years with our end users and contractors.

Name: The Institution of Fire Engineers
Description:
The IFE is the international professional body for those in the fire sector that seek to increase their knowledge, professional recognition and understanding of fire through a global discourse. With over 100 years of history, the IFE is instrumental in shaping a future world that is safer from fire.

Through its ceaseless betterment and sharing of knowledge, the IFE has led the way in enabling fire professionals to become rigorously assessed through a well-established and dynamic system of internationally recognised membership grades and fire-related qualifications. Licensed by the Engineering Council, the IFE upholds professional standards within both public and private fire sectors.

Managed for fire professionals by fire professionals, the IFE aims to promote, encourage and improve the science, practice and professionalism of fire engineering, acting as a beacon of established expertise, guiding the way to a fire safe future.

Name: Lichfield Fire and Safety Equipment (LIFECO)
Description:
Lichfield Fire & Safety Equipment Co. Ltd. (LIFECO), has been a global leader in supplying products covering the full range for fire detection, prevention, extinguishing and suppression system. LIFECO, with its world headquarters is located in United Kingdom and is well poised to serve a variety of International markets in addition to fulfilling the local market demand.

LIFECO serves Civil Defence, Industrial, Commercial and Consumer markets with its wide range of quality and innovative products. LIFECO is represented globally with its well knit National and International infrastructure dealer network. The Company's strengths are underpinned by a highly skilled workforce, and a diverse range of quality products and services that aims to provide a 'one stop shop' to satisfy all of our Customers Fire and Life Safety requirements.

LIFECO has remained at the forefront of the Fire Fighting Equipment market by constantly striving to provide innovative solutions and services that surpass Customers' expectations and by tirelessly seeking to improve quality standards. To this end, the company maintains a quality management system ISO 9001:2008, accredited by BSI (British Standards).  In addition LIFECO products, where applicable, hold accreditations issued by major inspection organisations such as Loss Prevention Certification Board (LPCB), Kitemark, FM Approvals and Underwriters Laboratories (UL). It has been a global leader in supplying products covering the full range for fire detection, prevention, extinguishing and suppression system. Our diverse range of products continues to be refined and evolved to meet its customer needs.  LIFECO is centrally located within the United Kingdom, but due to the exceptionally high demand for its products and services in the MENA region, LIFECO expanded and establish its sales and distribution office in Dubai for providing its customers with the increased sales support, and a faster delivery schedule.

Name: Magirus GmbH
Description:
Magirus – more than 160 years of innovation and tradition in firefighting technology

The best firefighting vehicles are built by firefighters. This fact was known to Conrad Dietrich Magirus, firefighter by passion, visionary and founder of our company more than 160 years ago. In keeping with this tradition, today we at Magirus build the most modern and reliable firefighting vehicles and equipment. And today many employees at Magirus are trained comrade firefighters who know exactly what's needed on the job.

The work of our comrades in firefighting services around the world is an inspiration as well as motivation, since their mission is what drives us. This is also the reason why the equipment, vehicles and solutions we develop for our comrades are among the best in the world. 

For more than 160 years now they have been making firefighters' lives easier and their work safer. Today at Magirus fire brigades find a comprehensive range of first-class, reliable firefighting vehicles ranging from turntable ladders, to pumpers and rescue vehicles, robots, fire pumps and equipment.

Magirus employs more than 1,400 people at its four sites: Ulm/Germany, Graz/Austria, Brescia/Italy and Chambéry/France.

Name: Pano AI
Description:
Pano AI (Pano) is the leader in early wildfire detection and intelligence, providing government, utilities, insurers, and private landowners with advanced tools and realtime situational awareness to quickly mitigate wildfire threats while protecting lives, property, and the environment.

Pano combines advanced hardware, artificial intelligence, and software in a single integrated enterprise solution. Leveraging data and satellite feeds, as well as propriety imagery from a network of ultra-high-definition, 360-degree cameras atop high vantage points, Pano’s artificial intelligence model produces a real-time picture of threats in a geographic region and delivers immediate, actionable intelligence.

Pano is based in San Francisco with a team of experienced technology professionals–from companies including Cisco, Tesla, Apple, Salesforce, and Nest–who are on a mission to give firefighters advanced tools to safeguard lives, communities, and the environment. Recently, Pano has been featured on Fox Business News, the San Francisco Chronicle, Morning Brew, and T&D World Magazine. Learn more at https://www.pano.ai/.

Name: CF Sistemas Proteção Contra Incêndio
Description:
Conceituada no setor de engenharia especializada em proteção contra incêndio, a cfsistemas desenvolve projetos, fornece, mantém em pleno funcionamento sistemas completos, com diferencial de qualidade técnica e atendimento personalizado ao cliente.

Além de toda a implantação, a empresa oferece o gerenciamento do processo de obtenção do Auto de Vistoria do Corpo de Bombeiros (AVCB).

Fundada na cidade de Ribeirão Preto, interior de São Paulo, com diferenciada estrutura física e técnica, a empresa ganhou destaque no Brasil exercendo suas atividades em todos os estados do país. O reconhecimento de sua excelência no cenário nacional possibilitou a consolidação de parcerias que levaram o nome da cfsistemas para o exterior. A empresa já elaborou e implantou sistemas de proteção contra incêndio em usinas de açúcar e etanol em países como El Salvador, Venezuela e Angola.

Com foco na proteção e preservação da vida, do meio ambiente e do patrimônio, a companhia alia tecnologia de ponta a uma equipe formada por profissionais qualificados, com capacitação ideal para garantir a eficácia dos equipamentos instalados.

Os sistemas de proteção contra incêndio fornecidos pela empresa estão sempre atualizados com o que há de mais seguro e inovador no mercado mundial, sendo projetados de acordo com o perfil e a necessidade de cada cliente, garantindo sempre o correto dimensionamento e diretrizes previstas em lei e normas técnicas, gerando praticidade, economia e segurança para o empreendimento.

Name: Butler Engineering
Description:
Since its foundation in 1979 in the city of Toronto, Canada, the Butler Group has acquired considerable expertise in the field of Fire & Life Safety Engineering. Butler Engineering – part of Butler Group – with regional headquarters in the UAE, and operations in Abu Dhabi, Dubai, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, India, and the UK, is the fastest growing Fire & Life Safety Consultant and 3rd Party Independent Inspection & Quality Management Firm in the Middle East, North Africa, and Asia.

Being the ‘House of Expertise’ by the Ministry of Interior – Civil Defense HQ, Butler Engineering is obliged to supervise, control, and recommend mitigating Fire & Life Safety provisions in all industrial, commercial, and residential establishments in conjunction with the Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) as per UAE codes & standards issued by Civil Defense.

Additionally, our global recognition as an ISO/IEC 17020 Accredited Special Inspection Agency as required by UAE Fire Code, Saudi Building Code and International Building Code (IBC) provides the clients with a leading edge to address technical aspects of life safety to ensure that Fire & Life Safety Systems comply with UAE Fire Code requirements.

Our experts have been actively involved with the Ministry of Interior – Civil Defense HQ to develop advanced engineering solutions the industry needs. Our contribution to UAE Fire Code development and its implementation has earned the confidence of both clients and authorities. Furthermore, our contribution to and participation in international bodies such as ASTM, FCIA, FM, IAS, IFC, NFPA, UL etc. have been appreciated by industry practitioners and clients worldwide.

İstanbul, Yukarı Dudullu’da bulunan üretim ve yönetim tesislerimizin yanı sıra Avrupa yakasında Marmara Bölge Müdürlüğü, Bursa’da Güney Marmara Bölge Müdürlüğü, Ankara’da İç Anadolu Bölge Müdürlüğü, İzmir’de Ege Bölge Müdürlüğü, Antalya’da Akdeniz Bölge Müdürlüğü, Diyarbakır’da Doğu-Güneydoğu Anadolu Bölge Müdürlüğü, Samsun’da Karadeniz Bölge Müdürlüğü, Moskova’da Rusya Merkez Ofisi ve İstanbul Perpa Ticaret Merkezindeki Fabrika Satış Mağazamız ile müşterilerimize ve son kullanıcılara HİZMET vermekteyiz.


Dünyanın çeşitli bölgelerindeki 70 ülkeye sürekli olarak ürünlerimizi ihraç etmekle kalmayıp oradaki distribütörlerimizin teknik kadrolarına eğitim vererek, sistemlerimize SATIŞ SONRASI HİZMETLERİNİN verilmesini de sağlamaktayız.


Mavili Elektronik A.Ş. olarak kurumumuzda uzman mühendis, tekniker, teknisyen ve üretim elemanlarından oluşan 250 kişiyi aşan dinamik kadromuzla hizmet kalitesinden ödün vermeden KENDİNDEN EMİN VE HIZLI ADIMLARLA YOLUMUZA DEVAM ETMEKTEYİZ.

Name: Groupe Desautel
Description: Spécialisée dans le domaine de la protection incendie depuis 1932, DESAUTEL est un acteur majeur dans la protection contre l'incendie. Le groupe est aujourd'hui présent sur l'ensemble du territoire, par son réseau de 27 agences, et à l'international. Centré historiquement autour de l'extincteur et sa fabrication, DESAUTEL a, au fil du temps, complété son offre en proposant des solutions de détection et d'extinction automatiques, de désenfumage, de blocs autonomes d'éclairage de sécurité, d'études de risques, de véhicules et engins spéciaux et de formations pour être aujourd'hui la seule société à couvrir le spectre du risque incendie dans le monde du travail.

Name: Technort Solutions
Description:
Desde 2017, a Technort Solutions atua no formato de grupo, onde as suas divisões de negócios, operam de forma independente, com equipes distintas, focadas em oferecer um atendimento personalizado e condições diferenciadas para os nossos clientes. Conheça um pouco mais, sobre cada uma de nossas áreas de atuação:

TECHNORT PRODUCTS
Divisão focada na distribuição de equipamentos de detecção e alarme de incêndio Siemens e Securiton, especificamente com os portfólios: Cerberus FIT, Cerberus ECO, Cerberus PRO, Cerberus PRO Compacta e Securiras ASD. Trabalhamos com amplo estoque para entrega imediata e logística personalizada. Dispomos de um laboratório com todas as soluções implantadas, para que possamos oferecer suporte técnico especializado, e um forte programa de treinamento e capacitação de nossos integradores e parceiros.

TECHNORT SYSTEMS
Divisão com foco em execução e gerenciamento de projetos de proteção contra incêndio e automação predial, que exigem alta complexidade. Atuamos com as soluções Apogee, Talon, Cerberus Modular e Desigo CC, da Siemens, Securifire e Securisens da Securiton, FireDetec da Rotarex e Firepro. Contamos com uma equipe de engenharia e gestão de projetos altamente qualificada, que segue as normas e procedimento do PMBOK.

TECHNORT SERVICES
Divisão especializada em gestão de manutenção de sistemas de proteção e combate contra incêndio, de ambientes críticos e com alta exigência de SLA. Temos como meta, assumir o gerenciamento de sistemas Cerberus Modular da Siemens, que inclui a modernização dos antigos portfólios Cerberus MXL e Firefinder XLS. Possuímos uma equipe técnica especializada, pronta a atender necessidades de contratos emergenciais, periódicos e residentes, de acordo com as exigências da norma ABNT NBR-17240.

Description: From fire security and alarm systems, to a computer room clean agent system, to unique solutions for warehouse designs, we’ve got you covered with all aspects of fire and life safety solutions.

Name: Firetrace International, a Halma Company
Description:
Firetrace International, a Halma company, is a global innovator and manufacturer of industry leading fire suppression systems; both pre-engineered for special hazard enclosures and engineered clean agent systems for larger enclosures, as well as full room total flooding.

Our pre-engineered systems provide cost-effective, stand-alone, automatic fire suppression systems for your critical equipment, electrical/technical systems and various types of enclosures.

The effectiveness of a genuine Firetrace system, is ensured by using the proprietary Firetrace Detection Tubing (a Linear Pneumatic Heat Sensor), which detects a fire due to precise temperature sensitivity, allowing our systems to react quickly and effectively. 

Firetrace systems quickly detect and suppress fire, directly at the source, efficiently and automatically.

Name: Serco International Fire Training Centre
Description:
The IFTC is a world leader in the provision of firefighting training.

We provide the skills, advice and resource to ensure your teams have the knowledge and confidence to respond effectively to an incident. This will help you to save lives, protect assets and maintain business operations.

IFTC offers the expertise and infrastructure from 40 years experience in supporting fire teams in the aviation, industrial, offshore, marine and civil defence sectors.

We have multiple training simulators, across 9 acres, to guarantee fresh, challenging and scalable exercises for recruits and experienced leaders. These give you the choice of LPG and liquid fuel burns for authenticity and variety, preparing your teams for the real thing.

As well as practical training, you can develop, test and accredit your teams in our virtual reality suite to embed the understanding and application of incident command capability, for both aviation and industrial (JOIFF accredited) courses. 

All of our courses can be adapted or written to your own specification, delivering tailored courses to meet your needs now and in the future. 

Your teams can stay in our onsite accommodation for a convenient, immersive, firefighter-only learning experience, fully inclusive of meals, with a gym and bar.

Located at Teesside Airport with easy access by road, rail and air.

As a graduate of our internationally renowned training centre you will become an elite firefighter of the highest calibre armed with the skills, knowledge and instincts necessary to deal with extreme emergencies at any location in any country.

The training we provide is thorough and rigorous and we set stringent and demanding standards. We have been training new and experienced firefighters from across the globe for decades and our facilities are second to none.

We are part of international service delivery specialists, Serco, offering integrated, cost-effective business transformation programmes to governments around the world.

 Property management companies responsible for residential blocks and commercial premises

Tüm yangın söndürme sistemleri için burayı ziyaret edebilirsiniz.

Şirketimiz kurulduğu tarihten itibaren, yangın sektöründe farkındalık yaratabilmek, teknik bilinci arttırabilmek ve her geçen gün hizmet kalitesini bir adım öne taşıyabilmek adına 15. yılında yolculuğuna devam etmektedir.

Bu yolculuğumuz süresince, yapmış olduğumuz sektör analizleri, müşteri talepleri ve sistemlerin teknik gereklilikleri incelendiğinde; yangından korunum sistemlerinin tasarım, projelendirme ve özellikle anahtar teslim uygulamalarında endüstriyel tesisler başta olmak üzere, önemli ölçekte müşteri talebi olduğu görülmüştür.

Bu bilinçle şirketimiz, son 5 yıldır özellikle endüstriyel tesisler, enerji sektörü, petrokimya, metro ve tünel projeleri ile özellikli askeri tesisler de anahtar teslim uygulamalarla yangından korunum sistemleri kurmaktadır.

Name: SafeGuard INC
Description:
Company Overview:
Safeguard is an innovative startup dedicated to transforming the landscape of fire safety. In response to growing health and environmental concerns associated with traditional flame retardants, we have developed a revolutionary organic formulation that effectively extinguishes fires without emitting harmful substances. Our mission is to provide a safe, effective, and environmentally friendly alternative that protects both people and the planet.

Our Mission:
To revolutionize fire safety by offering a non-toxic, effective, and sustainable solution to fire prevention. We aim to significantly reduce fire risks without compromising human health or the environment.

Our Technology:
Safeguard’s cutting-edge technology leverages an innovative organic formulation that absorbs oxygen and releases nitrogen and water to extinguish fires. Available in both powder and liquid forms, our solution is versatile and suitable for various applications, including fabrics, plastics, electronics, and building materials.

Key Features:
- Non-Toxic: Safe for humans and the environment.
- Effective: Rapidly extinguishes fires without producing harmful smoke or byproducts.
- Versatile: Can be applied to a wide range of materials.
- Environmentally Friendly: Biodegradable and free from harmful chemicals.

Market Opportunity:
With increasing regulations banning traditional flame retardants in major markets such as Switzerland, the European Union, and the USA, there is a significant demand for safer alternatives. Safeguard is well-positioned to capitalize on this opportunity by offering a compliant and effective solution.

Join Us:
We are actively seeking strategic partnerships and collaborations to expand our market reach and drive innovation in fire safety. Connect with us to explore opportunities and join us in creating a safer and healthier future.

Name: HY.AIR Energy GmbH
Description:
DAS FEUER STOPPEN, BEVOR ES ENTSTEHT.

Hält man den Sauerstoffgehalt in geschlossenen Räumen dauerhaft auf einem niedrigen Niveau, so geht Feuer die Luft aus - und zwar schon bevor es entsteht. Deshalb ist Brandschutz durch Sauerstoffreduktion auch kein Neuland. Bereits heute schützen sich Rechenzentren, Waren- oder Tiefkühllager so. Allerdings sind herkömmliche Brandvermeidungssysteme sehr energieintensiv, aufwendig und entsprechend teuer.

DIE INTELLIGENTERE TECHNOLOGIE:

In einer Brennstoffzelle reagieren Wasserstoff und Sauerstoff zu Strom und Wärme. Die Brennstoffzelle "verbraucht" also Sauerstoff. Genau dies nutzen wir in unserem patentierten System.
Mit der sauerstoffreduzierten Abluft können wir Räume jeglicher Größe vor Feuer schützen, während für Sie Strom und Wärme anfällt. Und durch einfache Messtechnik und bedarfsgerechtes Nachführen, sind auch Undichtigkeiten kein Problem.

Mehr Infos unter www.hyair.energy

Name: Center of Excellence for Advanced Technology Aerial Firefighting
Description:
The Center of Excellence for Advanced Technology Aerial Firefighting (CoE) is a section of Colorado's Division of Fire Prevention and Control (DFPC) established on May 12, 2014. Its mission is to drive technological advancements to improve firefighting practices and influence innovation across the public safety community.

The CoE was created under Senate Bill 14-164 with the support of industry leaders who recognized the need to assess the effectiveness of aerial firefighting and emphasized the need for active, deliberate management of new technologies and operational testing.  As a result, the CoE was formed to ensure the successful deployment of Colorado's aerial firefighting fleet.

Since 2014, the CoE has continuously demonstrated its ability to move the advanced technology needle, and today, the CoE is the top research and development team for public safety service projects in Colorado and is recognized nationwide.

Is uw organisatie klaar voor brand en de toekomst?
Traditionele blusmiddelen zijn vaak schadelijk voor het milieu, en veroorzaken onnodige schade aan eigendommen. Daarnaast zijn veel van deze middelen gevuld met blusstof die onderhevig is aan geregelde controle en vervanging, iets waar je als beheerder bovenop moet zitten.
Steeds meer bedrijven zoeken daarom naar brandveiligheid die niet alleen effectief is, maar ook duurzaam en toekomstbestendig.

 C-fire Nederland – uw partner in brandveiligheid.
Wij produceren, leveren en onderhouden hoogwaardige brandveiligheidsmiddelen. Van advies tot onderhoud: wij regelen alles van A tot Z.

 Onze diensten:
 Verkoop van brandveiligheidsmiddelen:
Brandblussers, brandslanghaspels, BMI-installaties (brandmeldinstallaties), rookmelders, noodverlichting, EHBO-voorzieningen en AED’s. Ook verzorgen wij de opmaak van ontruimingsplattegronden die voldoen aan de actuele normen.
 Onderhoud en keuring: 
Wij zorgen voor het vakkundig onderhoud en de keuring van brandblussers, brandslanghaspels, noodverlichting, AED’s en overige veiligheidsmiddelen. Hierbij letten we ook op de vervaldatum en werking van blusstoffen, die vaak onderhevig zijn aan vervanging en periodieke controle.
 Duurzame blusmiddelen: 
Wij leveren biologisch afbreekbare, fluorvrije, niet-toxische en niet-corrosieve blusmiddelen. Deze zijn veilig voor mens en milieu én zorgen voor minimale nevenschade bij gebruik een duurzaam alternatief voor traditionele blussers.

 Waarom kiezen voor C-fire?
 Eigen productie – directe kwaliteit
 Duurzaam – minimale impact
 Betrouwbaar – conform alle normen
 Totaalservice – van advies tot onderhoud

Wij maken brandveiligheid toekomstbestendig met innovatieve, milieuvriendelijke oplossingen.

Name: Qatar Civil Defense
Description:
Introduction

The State gives highest care for internal security as it is the pillar of the stability and spends maximum efforts to provide security, safety and peace of mind for citizens and residents.

The first "Extinguishing Police Section" was formed in 1955 with a small number of police staff and the equipments and tools as well. Along with the development of the country in all fields, spread of the construction boom and increase in the size of establishments, it was the need of time to increase the capability of the fire fighting force in personnel and equipments, convoying with the renaissance witnessed by the country.

In the beginning of seventies, the fire fighting section was improved by increasing the numbers of specialized and educationally qualified officers in fire fighting, rescue operations, ambulance services and civil defense activities and also the numbers of the trained personnel along with equipments. The name "Extinguishing police section" was changed into "Civil Defense Department" by the decree No. 8 for the year 1991 issued by the Minister of interior.

Considering the importance of convoying with the comprehensive renaissance in the country, the name " Civil Defense Department" was changed into "The General Directorate of Civil Defense" according to the decree No. 38 for the year 2005 issued by the Minister of state for interior affairs and the organizational structure was approved in order to convoy with the fast and visible renaissance.

Det först när ni har svarat på ovan frågeställningar som brandskydd och arbetsmiljö inte blir något "nödvändigt ont" utan något nödvändigt gott.

Frågarna kan båda vara tuffa att ställa och svåra att svara på och det är här vi kommer in.

Vi kan Brandskydd, Arbetsmiljö & Verksamhetsutveckling

 HARDWARE: supply, installation and maintenance of technologies on site with our local partners.

 Remote clearance of doubts and intervention on incipient fires drastically reduces the need for airborne resources and the deployment of local volunteer firefighters.

Beyond design, we support building owners, managers, and occupants in effectively managing fire safety. Our services encompass the preparation of Fire Safety Manuals, fire risk assessments, fire safety training, and developing evacuation plans and drills.

Every building has unique fire safety challenges, and standard codes often hinder creative or economic design concepts. Our team, with extensive knowledge of global fire safety codes and hands-on project experience, develops cost-effective, innovative solutions while preserving design integrity and ensuring regulatory compliance.

Early involvement is key. By engaging us from the start of a project, clients benefit from proactive guidance that prevents costly delays and late-stage design changes.

Kuruluşumuz içerisinde Türkiye’de birçok katma değerli projede, Chemetron ve KIDDE ana üretici markaların temsilcisi olarak yer almıştır. FM-200, NOVEC 1230, Inert ve Karbondioksit Gazlı Yangın Söndürme Sistemleri ile, Ticari Mutfaklarda, Elektrik Panolarında, CNC Tezgahlarında, Teknelerin Motor Kabinlerinde kurulan Yangın Söndürme Sistemleri ana faaliyet alanlarımızdır. 
Tüm bu ürün gruplarında söndürme sistem tasarımı, proje ve mühendislik hesapları ve taahhüt, kurulum devreye alma ile satış sonrası hizmetlerde çalışmaktayız.
Uluslararası ana üretici markaların temsilciliği yapmış olan kuruluşumuzun faaliyetleri arasında söndürme sistem tasarımı, proje ve mühendislik hesapları ve taahhüt, kurulum devreye alma ile satış sonrası hizmetler yer almaktadır.
Yakından takip ettiğimiz çevre protokolleri, uluslararası standart ve yönetmelikler, pazardaki tüm teknolojik gelişmeler ve bilgi birikimimiz SAFE Teknoloji ekibi olarak bizi, yangın söndürme sistemleri üreticisi konumuna taşımıştır. 
2023 yılı itibariyle HFC227ea söndürme sistemlerinde SAFE227, FK5112 söndürme sistemlerinde SAFE5112, Inert Gazlı söndürme sistemlerinde SAFEREX tescilli markalarımız için Alman bağımsız akredite denetim kuruluşu ile VdS sistem onaylarımızı tamamlamış bulunmaktayız.
1995 – 2010 yılları arasında yüksek basınçlı gaz silindirleri imalatı konusunda uzman bir kuruluşun Genel Müdürlük pozisyonunda çalışmış,
Türkiye Gümrükleri ve Sanayi Bakanlığı tarafından uygulanan Taşınabilir Basınçlı Ekipmanlar Direktifi, Silindir Üreticileri ve Söndürme Sistemleri ile ilgili birçok faaliyetin gerçekleştirildiği çeşitli derneklerin kurucusu,
TSE Yangın Ayna Komitesi Başkanı

Kurucumuz M. Ünal EMİROĞLU önderliğinde;

Als mittelständische Unternehmen mit Sitz in Ahrensburg gehören Detectomat und Simax in Aachen zum DEF-Netzwerk, einem der größten unabhängigen Hersteller und Anbieter für den Brandschutz in Europa und steht mit seinen Leistungen für jahrelange Erfahrung und höchste Qualität.

Name: American Fire Sprinkler Association Virginia Chapter
Description:
The  VA Chapter promotes the Merit Shop concept.

We believe in the system of Free Enterprise.

We believe that employees and employers should have the right to determine wages and working conditions, through either individual or collective bargaining as they choose, within the boundaries of the law. We believe that the employer must have concern for the general welfare of the employee and that there must be a fair compensation for work performed. By the same token, we believe that the employee has an obligation for satisfactory performance of assigned work.

We support sound legislation in the areas of Workmen’s Compensation, Safety and Unemployment Compensation. We believe legislation that embraces fair play for both the employer and employees is essential to the preservation of our Free Enterprise system. The law should protect the right of employees to work regardless of race, color, creed, sex or membership or non-membership in a labor organization. We support sound legislation, and the adoption of codes and standards to adequately protect lives and preserve property from the perils of fire in all types of occupancies.

We oppose violence, coercion, intimidation, discrimination of all kinds, and the denial of the rights of the free working man and free management.
We are devoted to the educational and training needs of the Merit Shop fire sprinkler contractor and the promotion of the automatic sprinkler concept.

Para ello y, haciendo uso de nuestra experiencia en el mercado y en la gestión de emergencias, elaboramos un sistema de trabajo que nos permite:

- analizar las zonas de trabajo, los procesos de prevención, así como las capacidades de los propios empleados para actuar en caso de una emergencia
- estudiar y proponer mejoras sobre el Plan de Emergencia o Autoprotección de la empresa
- presentar propuestas de mejora y llevar a cabo acciones enfocadas en optimizar todos los puntos anteriormente analizados

Sin duda EMERSAL es el perfecto partner en materia de seguridad para cualquier empresa que busca la excelencia en seguridad laboral.

Somos empresa inscrita en el Registro Estatal de Entidades de Formación con el código 24563.

Name: Tasmania Fire Service
Description:
The Tasmania Fire Service (TFS) is a diverse organisation made up of career firefighters, volunteers and State Service Employees. 

Tasmania Fire Service administers this page to keep you up-to-date with TFS-related activities and events, and to share fire-related information. 

If you need to report a fire, please call 000. Don’t report fires on this page. 

We really appreciate it when you comment on our posts and share our information, but we ask that you keep your comments on topic and your language respectful. 

Humorous comments are always welcome, but abusive, offensive, or unlawful comments, harassment or provoking of other community members, swearing, derogatory language and expression of views that are racist, sexist, ageist, homophobic or sexually explicit are not okay on our page, or anywhere for that matter. 

Defamatory comments, personal attacks against other users, members of the public or Tasmania Fire Service staff, volunteers or personnel, or posts that violate privacy laws are also unacceptable.

Content that breaches intellectual property rights, advertisements and spam will be removed from our page.

As this page is a public page, we will remove any comments that include private information or personal details such as email addresses or phone numbers.

Any comment that might jeopardise a fire investigation or identify a victim will also be moderated. 

Comments that don’t meet these standards will be hidden or deleted and we will ban or restrict users when needed. Comments may also be turned off on posts if moderation requirements become excessive.

Opinions posted by members of the public do not reflect those of Tasmania Fire Service or the Tasmanian Government.

Name: BPG - Brandschutztechnische Prüfgesellschaft GmbH
Description:
Für Ihre Sicherheit – nur den besten Service!
Alle Unternehmen vereint ein Thema – die Sicherheit von Arbeitnehmern, der Gebäude und der Aufrechterhaltung der Betriebstätigkeit. Besonders mit den steigenden Anforderungen an Brandschutz und Arbeitssicherheit sind viele Arbeitgeber und Verantwortliche überfordert. Der Gesetzgeber schreibt eine Vielzahl an Regelungen, Normen, Gesetzen und Auflagen vor – um eines sicherzustellen: Das Gefahrenquellen in Unternehmen für Menschen auf ein absolutes Minimum reduziert werden.

Gerade im sensiblen Bereich des Brandschutzes gibt es keine Grauzone – entweder die Sicherheitseinrichtungen funktionieren, oder sie funktionieren nicht. Ist auch nur eine Sicherheitseinrichtung fehlerhaft, unvollständig oder nicht funktionsfähig, dann gefährdet diese Schwachstelle den gesamten Brandschutz.

Als erfahrener und professioneller Partner unterstützen wir unsere Kunden bei der Aufrechterhaltung des Brandschutzes – damit Menschen und Sachwerte dauerhaft geschützt sind. Hierbei vertrauen uns unsere Kunden deren wichtigste Güter an: Die Mitarbeiter und die Gebäude des Betriebsgeländes.

Zu unseren Leistungen gehören unter anderem:
Wartung und Prüfung von Brandschutztüren, Wartung und Prüfung von Brandschutztoren, Wartung und Prüfung von kraftbetätigten Türen und Toren (selbstschließend), Wartung und Prüfung von Feststellanlagen und vieles mehr.

Dabei gehen wir innovative Wege und eliminimieren die Verwaltungsaufwände für unsere Kunden gänzlich - bei uns sind sämtliche Protokoll und Dokumentationsprozesse vollständig digitalisiert.

Für ein unverbindliches Angebot kontaktieren Sie uns gerne oder besuchen Sie unsere Webseite www.bpg-pruefgesellschaft.de

Clean Agent Fire Suppression System Cylinders

Name: Flame Detector
Description:
The Flame Detector – Instant Flame Detection for the home.  A Game Changer in Residential Fire Detection.  
Welcome to a whole new level of fire protection like you’ve never seen before.  Developed by a leading-edge team of scientists and fire detection engineers, The Flame Detector is the only product of its kind on the market today.  The Flame Detector can detect flame in less than two seconds, alerting you to fire much faster and helping prevent devastating fires from occurring. 

How does the Flame Detector compare to a smoke alarm?

Smoke alarms work by detecting small particles of combustion (smoke) that must travel into the smoke alarm’s sensing chamber before ever alarming.  Depending on the location of the fire to the proximity of the smoke alarm and the type of fire, it can take tens of minutes before a smoke alarm is activated.  

The Flame Detector on the other hand, constantly monitors for the presence of flame in your home and works by detecting A narrow band of UV light produced by an open flame. The moment it detects unwanted fire, you’re notified. It’s that simple! 

The Flame Detector is beautifully designed to monitor spaces where a flame should never exist, like a child’s bedroom, playroom or even your garage.  Thousands of home fires are started by children every year, and more than half of those fires originate in the bedroom.  With the Flame Detector, the moment a child lights a match, a loud alarm is produced, and a push notification is sent to your smart device telling you exactly where the fire started.  When dealing with fire, seconds truly count! With the Flame Detector, you can be made aware of flame instantaneously, preventing dangerous home fires from ever occurring.

Name: Panitz Soluções em Segurança contra Incêndio
Description:
A empresa PANITZ EXTINTORES foi fundada em 1978, por dois irmãos, que deram à empresa o nome de “Irmãos Panitz”, localizada na época no centro de Novo Hamburgo / RS.

No ano de 2002 a empresa passa por uma reformulação no seu quadro societário e altera sua razão social para Panitz Equipamentos Contra Incêndio Ltda. A partir desse momento a empresa começou a abranger toda a área de equipamentos contra incêndio; complementando o serviço de recarga com um portfólio de soluções em prevenção e combate a incêndio, como:
Manutenção e instalação de hidrantes, manutenção e instalação de alarme de incêndio, sinalização, iluminação de emergência, PPCI, treinamento TPCI/Brigada, recarga e venda de extintores, teste hidrostático (anual) de mangueiras de incêndio (certificado pelo INMETRO).

No ano de 2016 a PANITZ EXTINTORES muda-se para localização, onde exerce suas atividades atualmente, Rodovia BR 116, número 3104, no bairro Primavera em Novo Hamburgo / RS, a 45 km da capital do estado Porto Alegre. A empresa Panitz Equipamentos Contra Incêndio Ltda., proprietária exclusiva da marca PANITZ EXTINTORES com registro nas marcas e patentes sob o nº 824791770, trabalha com a realização de planos de prevenção contra incêndio e todos os equipamentos de prevenção e combate a incêndios e pânico necessários para a sua segurança.

A empresa possui um rigoroso controle de qualidade e rastreabilidade, dos materiais e matérias primas utilizadas, bem como uma rigorosa responsabilidade ambiental, evitando desperdícios e destinando os resíduos para os locais adequados. A Panitz busca sempre inovação continua, visando proporcionar os melhores serviços e produtos para seus clientes, dentro dos melhores padrões de segurança e com preços compatíveis com o mercado.
Location: Novo Hamburgo , Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Sprinkler Pumps UK
Description:
The new BS9251:2021 domestic and residential sprinkler pumps have been designed in association with sprinkler installers for ease of installation, commissioning and maintenance.  The pump and Pump Watch arrive all assembled where the installers have a simple plug and play connection – all ready for commissioning.

Each pump comes custom built with the option of both the inlet and outlet on either side reducing installation time and avoiding passing pipes behind or above the sprinkler pump.

Sprinkler Pumps UK offer sprinkler pump sets to meet a wide range of applications from small domestic properties (single pump set) to large high-rise blocks of flats requiring multiple pumps.  With flows as low as 30 L/min up to as high as 2,400 L/min and pressures up to 15 bar.

Name: SFPE UAE Chapter
Description:
The SFPE (Society of Fire Protection Engineers) is an international professional society representing those practicing in the field of fire safety engineering and fire protection engineering.

SFPE is leading the profession as a neutral, international non-profit organization to define, develop, and advance the use of fire engineering, fire protection engineering, and fire safety engineering best practices; expand the scientific and technical knowledge base; and educate the global fire safety community, in order to reduce fire risk.

The SFPE UAE Chapter was formed in 2018 to act as a mechanism to advance the art and science of fire protection engineering and its allied fields, to maintain a high ethical standard among its members and to foster fire engineering education. It is also a platform to elevate knowledge and network opportunities. 

SFPE UAE Chapter is open to all people, including members of other Chapters who are interested in the UAE fire engineering industry either by residency or work affiliations.

Name: FSi Promat by Etex
Description:
FSi Promat develops and manufactures a wide range of tested and certified fire stopping and cavity barrier products and systems. In 2020, we joined the Etex Group and rebranded to FSi Promat – combining the strength of two trusted names in fire protection.

All FSi Promat systems are manufactured, tested and certified to globally recognised standards, including UKCA, CE, UL, FM, AS, ASTM and ISO. Our products are not only tested for fire performance but also for air permeability, movement, water resistance, thermal conductivity, VOC content and acoustic isolation.

We offer technical support and training through our highly experienced team, drawing on over 24 years of industry knowledge.

Our approach allows us the freedom to develop innovative products and systems while staying closely aligned with our customers’ needs and evolving market demands.

Our head office and primary manufacturing facility is based in Measham, central England. Our global distribution hub, Firesafe & Sound (FSS), is located in Essex, Greater London. FSS stocks a comprehensive range of our products, offering next-day delivery across the UK and global shipping through our extensive network.

Het assortiment van Saval is opvallend compleet:
van kleine blusmiddelen, noodverlichting, blusinstallaties en brand -en gasdetectiesystemen, tot water -en schuimmonitoren, hydranten en armaturen. Ontwerp, installatie, training en Consultancy, service en onderhoud heeft Saval in eigen hand.

Bij Saval zijn zo'n 250 gemotiveerde medewerkers dagelijks actief een breed spectrum van relaties te voorzien van het beste op het gebied van brandbeveiliging.

Name: KuhnOdice UK
Description:
KuhnOdice UK builds on the strong legacy of Mann McGowan, a pioneer in intumescent technology since 1975. With decades of expertise in passive fire protection, the business has long been recognised for developing high-performance materials, specialist services and trusted partnerships across the construction and manufacturing sectors.

As part of KuhnOdice, KuhnOdice UK represents the next chapter in this journey. Effective from 1 January 2026, the new division combines UK manufacturing capability with access to KuhnOdice’s technologically advanced materials and systems.

Today, KuhnOdice UK is positioned as an end-to-end supplier of passive fire protection solutions, supporting applications ranging from glazing and door manufacturing to OEM industrial uses, battery safety and transportation. With a strong focus on tailored solutions, technical expertise and long-term reliability, we guide our customers through complex fire protection challenges.

Together, we deliver fire protection systems that are made to measure … and built to last.
Today, we’re making a fresh commitment to our customers – with major investment in advanced equipment and increased production, an on-going programme of innovation to introduce new intumescent solutions and further extending our skills and expertise in order to offer the most comprehensive service in the industry.
As we enter 2026 Mann McGowan makes further changes after entering into the SVT Group. We transition into the Industrial group of companies falling under the KuhnOdice umbrella. 
A new division of KuhnOdice UK has been formed and effective from 1st January 2026. This now gives the group a UK manufacturing presence and the ability to distribute and supply the full range of KuhnOdice products as well as a Flamro & Securo products.

Name: SOPFEU - Société de protection des forêts contre le feu
Description:
La SOPFEU est la seule organisation au Québec responsable de la prévention, de la détection et de la suppression des incendies de forêt. Sa mission vise à protéger la forêt, les communautés et les infrastructures stratégiques contre les incendies de végétation, tout en assurant la pérennité du milieu forestier. Elle est mandatée par le ministère de la Sécurité publique (MSP) pour accomplir cette mission unique, et peut compter sur une grande équipe de plus de 650 travailleurs engagés répartis stratégiquement partout en province. Au siège social de Québec, s'ajoutent les trois directions régionales (Baie-Comeau, Roberval et Val-d’Or) ainsi que plusieurs bases d'opérations.

La SOPFEU offre à ses employés une aventure riche et composée de multiples défis, et permet de se forger une carrière hors de l’ordinaire.

Name: Safespill
Description:
Founded in 2013, Safespill designs and manufactures FM Approved, environmentally safe fire protection systems for military and commercial aircraft hangars handling ignitable liquids.

Our core product, the Ignitable Liquid Drainage Floor Assembly (ILDFA), is a floor-based alternative to foam suppression. It removes spilled fuel before ignition—eliminating pool fires and accidental discharges. ILDFA is the only system recognized in NFPA 409 (2022) for Group I and II hangars. It is FM Approved under Standard 6090 and is the preferred fire protection method in FM Data Sheet 7-93. The system is also compliant with Unified Facilities Criteria (UFC).

ILDFA Benefits:

Superior fire protection with faster flame knockdown

Prevents pool fires by isolating flammable liquids

Eliminates accidental discharge and toxic runoff

Chemical-free and environmentally safe

Speeds up hangar cleanup and aircraft turnaround

Lowers lifecycle cost with minimal maintenance

Simplifies infrastructure through modular trench design

Who We Serve:

U.S. Air Force, Navy, Army National Guard, and Coast Guard

Foreign military and civil aviation agencies

Commercial aviation and MRO hangar operators

Architecture and engineering firms, general contractors, and prime contractors

We support every phase of a project—from concept and code alignment to proposal, contract execution, installation, and post-project support.

Industry solutions for specific requirements
are, for example: the monitoring of lithium-ion batteries in small warehouses or an ignition protection system specifically for mobile dust extractors as a plug-and-play solution, also for small companies and craft businesses.

Name: EV Fire Protection
Description:
EV FirePro: The Future of EV Fire Safety 

EV Fire Protection’s patent-pending technology is the first and only fixed fire suppression system designed specifically for electric vehicle (EV) fires. 

Our innovative EV FirePro system provides a proactive, multi-stage approach to fire detection and suppression, seamlessly integrating with existing hydrant and sprinkler systems.

 Early Detection: EV FirePro senses heat from an EV battery fire.
 Automated Alert: EV FirePro triggers the building’s existing fire detection and alarm system, simultaneously alerting Fire Fighting Services.
 Targeted Suppression: EV FirePro delivers high-pressure water to the underside of the effected vehicle, for rapid heat and flame supression.
 Lateral Protection: EV FirePro activates a spray pattern to minimise the potential for damage to adjacent vehicles and structures.
 Boosted Power: Fire crews can boost EV FirePro’s suppression capabilities via an supplementary remote fire hose connection.

By minimising flame spread and enhancing firefighter safety, EV FirePro provides peace of mind to fleet operators, corporate charging stations, infrastructure providers, insurers and property managers in underground and enclosed car parks.

We’re committed to innovation, safety, and sustainability, helping businesses and communities confidently embrace the EV transition.
To determine if EV FirePro is right for you, contact us today.

Let’s build a safer electric future. 


#EVSafety #FireSuppression #Innovation #Sustainability #FireProtection #EVFirePro

The cherry in the heart of the North-East, we are located close to the Tyne Tunnel, just off the A19. We welcome our local customers to pop in to collect orders at our trade counter or buy ‘off the shelf’ complete with a chat and bit of banter!
We pride ourselves on our trusted reputation around our exceptional customer service and high-quality products that our loyal customers depend on.
Cherry Parts continues to move forward on the journey to becoming your one-stop shop for fire protection supplies.
We look forward to welcoming you to our family.

Name: Columbia Fire
Description:
Columbia Fire
Fire Protection Done Right.

Columbia Fire, LLC has served the Pacific Northwest since 2005, providing a single point of contact for all fire and life safety needs. Our team is trusted by building owners, property managers, and contractors across commercial, industrial, residential, healthcare, warehouse, and high-rise markets.

What We Do:
We design, install, inspect, test, monitor, and service every major fire protection system—including:

Fire alarm systems (testing, inspection, installation, programming)

Fire sprinkler systems (wet, dry, pre-action, deluge)

Fire pumps and standpipes

Backflow prevention and annual testing

Portable fire extinguishers (sales, service, hydrotesting)

Kitchen wet chemical and industrial dry chemical suppression systems

Alarm and system monitoring

Special hazards and clean agent suppression

Emergency and exit lighting
…and more.

How We Work:
Our crews are comprised of highly trained, union sprinkler fitters, supported by NICET-certified inspectors, designers, and licensed electricians. We keep up with constantly changing codes and requirements—NFPA, local AHJ, and insurance—so you don’t have to.

From small retail storefronts to large university campuses and critical care hospitals, Columbia Fire delivers:

System design, fabrication, and new construction

Inspection, testing, and 24/7 monitoring

Maintenance, service, and repair

Retrofit and tenant improvement

Our Difference:
We take the headaches out of compliance and safety by providing honest answers, fast response, and long-term partnership. Through Columbia Safety Services, we also support clients with OSHA/WSHA compliance, training, and on-site safety management for construction projects.

Our Promise:
For over 20 years, our team has protected people and property—delivering peace of mind, not just passing inspections.

Name: Building Reports Canada
Description:
Building safety compliance is critical to service companies, building owners and fire and safety officials who are charged with safeguarding occupants. BuildingReports’ mobile and online inspection reporting tools enable inspectors to quickly gather data on fire and life safety devices to ensure the working order and code requirements through easily verifiable inspection reports.

BRC provides tools to complete fire and life safety inspections via hand-helds and the web. The hand-held software prompts inspectors/technicians to enter relevant information in an efficient manner to ensure they can focus on the inspection/repair rather then administrative responsibilities. The results of the inspections are instantly available via web portals. These reports automatically provide code references, recall notifications and calculation of future service in addition to standard and code specific reports, and all inspections are fully documented in compliance with regulatory standards.  Schedules, inspection reports and contact information are available online giving BRC members the ability to save time and money managing inspections and issuing the reports to clients.

Also available are administrative tools for scheduling inspections and service ticket generation.  Never miss another inspection with our tracking tools which includes dashboard visualization of employee utilization.  At the same time track and manage service tickets including real-time T/M costing.

Name: FireTrac
Description:
Wildfire tracking app designed by aerial firefighters. 

FireTrac is a new app that provides the most up-to-date fire information on all fires across the United States. It notifies you of potential fire danger and provides easy-to use maps and high-resolution photo overlays so you can know where the fires are.

Roughly 60,000 wildfires occur each year in the US. Newsfeeds are saturated with reports of large wildfires that have grown quickly and are out of control. But how will you know if a fire is close enough to pose a real threat to you? How will you know early on so there is time to get out and protect your family? When there’s a fire nearby, you need rapid, accurate data to keep you safe and informed. What if all that critical information was in one place?

Name: XyloPlan
Description:
XyloPlan uses data–driven methods to create a shared view of wildfire risk for insurers, local government, utilities, and landowners. We provide actionable and cost-effective recommendations to reduce risk by disrupting Fire Pathways.

Our goal is to provide a framework to create and maintain Fire Adapted Communities through high-value, prioritized mitigations, which slow wildfire spread into critical areas. These mitigations allow communities to encounter wildfire without sustaining catastrophic damage.

Throughout the United States, 44.8 million housing units are in the Wildland Urban Interface, with an exposure of wildfire. Fire Adapted Communities can reduce their risk of wildfire loss by understanding and disrupting Fire Pathways

Insurance
Use Fire Pathways models to identify both community and parcel-specific risk assessments when underwriting property policies and building a profitable portfolio. These risk assessments are informed by current conditions, inclusive of mitigations the community has undertaken.

Local Government
Optimize limited fuel treatment resources to achieve the greatest results by prioritizing the most cost-effective treatments in those areas capable of supporting the fastest-moving wildfires.

HOAs / Developers
Understand the most effective mitigations to decrease the threat of wildfire to your community and provide data to insurers to help them assess appropriate wildfire risk when writing policies for your development.

Utilities
Partner with local agencies to create resilient communities that can be within or adjacent to wildfire perimeters without sustaining catastrophic damage.

Name: SFPE Colombia Chapter

La misión de COL-SFPE es ampliar la base de conocimientos científicos y técnicos de los profesionales dedicados a la seguridad contra incendios en Colombia. En este año de formación, el capítulo de la SFPE comienza con doce miembros de la academia y la industria. Cinco de ellos son miembros actuales de la SFPE. COL-SFPE se beneficiará de la red global de capítulos de la SFPE y tiene como objetivo difundir las innovaciones técnicas disponibles a través de la SFPE para garantizar una educación continua de los profesionales de la seguridad contra incendios en Colombia. COL-SFPE planea tener un seminario y al menos cuatro reuniones de la junta directiva al año. Nuestra visión es ser la organización líder de profesionales de la seguridad contra incendios en Colombia para el año 2025 y aumentar el número de miembros del capítulo a al menos 40 en el primer año.

Name: Columbia Fire, LLC
Description:
Columbia Fire, LLC
Your One Partner for Total Fire & Life Safety

Columbia Fire, LLC has served the Pacific Northwest since 2005, providing a single point of contact for all fire and life safety needs. Our team is trusted by building owners, property managers, and contractors across commercial, industrial, residential, healthcare, warehouse, and high-rise markets.

What We Do:
We design, install, inspect, test, monitor, and service every major fire protection system—including:

Fire alarm systems (testing, inspection, installation, programming)

Fire sprinkler systems (wet, dry, pre-action, deluge)

Fire pumps and standpipes

Backflow prevention and annual testing

Portable fire extinguishers (sales, service, hydrotesting)

Kitchen wet chemical and industrial dry chemical suppression systems

Alarm and system monitoring

Special hazards and clean agent suppression

Emergency and exit lighting
…and more.

How We Work:
Our crews are comprised of highly trained, union sprinkler fitters, supported by NICET-certified inspectors, designers, and licensed electricians. We keep up with constantly changing codes and requirements—NFPA, local AHJ, and insurance—so you don’t have to.

From small retail storefronts to large university campuses and critical care hospitals, Columbia Fire delivers:

System design, fabrication, and new construction

Inspection, testing, and 24/7 monitoring

Maintenance, service, and repair

Retrofit and tenant improvement

Our Difference:
We take the headaches out of compliance and safety by providing honest answers, fast response, and long-term partnership. Through Columbia Safety Services, we also support clients with OSHA/WSHA compliance, training, and on-site safety management for construction projects.

Our Promise:
For over 20 years, our team has protected people and property—delivering peace of mind, not just passing inspections.

Name: FNA Inc
Description:
Based in North America, FNA is Firefly’s largest and most successful distributor. FNA Inc. is the premier fire prevention and protection company worldwide.  FNA provides intelligent fire protection solutions designed to keep your operations running smoothly. We prevent fires before they take hold and potentially spread to other parts of machinery or buildings. This is achieved through preventative systems and rapid response actions.

Our systems are designed to react in milliseconds. Dangerous particles in process flows can be detected and extinguished before a fire or dust explosion develops. Our detectors can identify hot particles before they even start to glow, as well as embers and sparks that exceed the minimum ignition energy and temperature thresholds.

Additionally, our Quick Suppression Systems detect and suppress flames at the earliest stages of a fire incident. These systems are engineered to protect valuable machinery and open areas such as warehouses and stockpiles.

Name: BLUE CHIP PFP LTD
Description:
Blue Chip PFP Ltd was established in 2016 as a third party accredited passive fire protection installation contractor. Initially for the purpose of the remediation of legacy projects for the UK commercial construction sector. This has since extended into refurbishment and new build projects of varying scales.       

Following the tragic loss of life at Grenfell. The entire fire safety industry has been examined. The subsequent Hackett Report, which reviewed, building regulations and fire safety. Has seen the most significant piece of legislation affecting the UK construction industry.  The Building safety Act 2022.  

This has drawn notice and rise for concern from companies concerned with facilities management, building owners, and building managers. In fact, anyone who has responsibility for fire safety within buildings. 

The PFP Survey process has become the most requested service we offer. In many cases Clients contact us with a risk assessment which states insufficient FR (fire resistance) against a photograph of some clearly non-compliant fire stop installation.
Although a risk assessment report like this can bring awareness to the customer, it rarely builds the full picture of:
•	What is required
•	Where it is required 
•	The Condition of what is installed 
•	The requirement of any remediation 
•	The duration and process of the remedial works 

             
We understand that the survey and possible remedial works are not something that the client would have budgeted for. The expenditure will be strictly controlled and explained. Delivering maximum effect for the budget.

Our services comprise of but limited to.         
    Production of compartmentation drawings.  Initial overview surveys, in depth compartmentation and structural protection surveys. Fire door surveys, remediation to existing Passive fire protection material. Remediation and fitting of new fire doors.

Name: Prestige Building & Fire Safety Solutions
Description:
1. Fire Door Installation
We provide expert fire door installations tailored to the needs of your building. Whether you're constructing a new property or upgrading existing doors, we ensure that the installation meets all necessary fire safety regulations and standards. Our team installs high-quality, certified fire doors designed to provide maximum protection in case of an emergency.

Key Features:

Professional and compliant installations
High-performance fire-rated doors
Tailored solutions for commercial and residential properties
2. Fire Door Remedials
Over time, fire doors can become damaged or fail to meet required standards. Our fire door remedial services include repairing or upgrading existing fire doors to restore their fire-resistance capabilities. We address issues such as faulty hinges, broken seals, damaged frames, and non-compliant fittings, ensuring your fire doors function as intended.

Key Features:

Thorough assessment of door condition
Restoration of functionality and compliance
Cost-effective remedial work for doors that need repair
3. Fire Door Inspections
Regular fire door inspections are critical for maintaining compliance with fire safety regulations. We provide comprehensive inspections to check if your fire doors meet legal standards and perform efficiently in the event of a fire. Our detailed reports highlight any issues or non-compliance, giving you a clear action plan for addressing them.

Key Features:

Detailed fire door condition assessments
Identification of compliance gaps or safety risks
Recommendations for repairs or replacements based on inspection findings
4. Ongoing Fire Door Maintenance
Fire doors require regular maintenance to ensure they remain functional and compliant. We offer maintenance services to ensure that your fire doors are always in peak condition. Our ongoing maintenance checks help extend the life of your doors and reduce the risk of non-compliance or performance failure.

Name: Attempo
Description:
A Attempo é uma AgTech especializada em monitoramento e previsão de incêndios para florestas plantadas, canaviais e propriedades rurais. Atuamos com tecnologia própria, capaz de antecipar riscos, enviar alertas em tempo real e orientar o combate com inteligência.

Nosso diferencial está na previsão de risco de incêndio, o SAFE, um sistema que utiliza dados meteorológicos para prever, com até cinco dias de antecedência, onde há maior chance de ignição. Isso permite que produtores, gestores florestais e equipes de brigada tomem decisões antes que o fogo comece.

Além da previsão, a Attempo realiza detecção de focos em tempo real, com alertas automáticos por WhatsApp, SMS ou e-mail. A plataforma também entrega dados operacionais estratégicos, como direção e velocidade do vento no foco, indicação do foco mais relevante para combate e roteirização via aplicativo.

Name: EUROSAFE MALAYSIA SDN. BHD.
Description:
Eurosafe Malaysia Sdn. Bhd. — A Concern of Eurosafe Global UK
Eurosafe Malaysia Sdn. Bhd. is a dedicated regional entity established to represent the vision, quality, and engineering excellence of Eurosafe Global UK in Malaysia and the Southeast Asian market. As a concern of Eurosafe Global UK, the company operates under the same international standards of safety, performance, and reliability that have made Eurosafe a trusted name in the global fire-protection and fire-suppression industry.
Eurosafe Malaysia acts as the local hub for supplying, supporting, and promoting Eurosafe’s complete range of UL-listed, ASME-certified, and globally approved fire-suppression systems and safety solutions. This includes foam-based fire-suppression systems, clean-agent systems (FK-5-1-12, HFC-227ea), water-based suppression technologies, fire extinguishers, deluge & pre-action systems, CAF systems, fire monitors, foam bladder tanks, proportioners, and a wide portfolio of industrial fire-safety equipment.
By establishing a Malaysian entity, Eurosafe Global UK aims to provide closer proximity, faster response, and enhanced technical support to clients across Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, Brunei, Thailand, and the broader ASEAN region. The Malaysian office ensures smoother project coordination, local compliance support, engineering assistance, and after-sales services aligned with both British and international (NFPA, UL, FM, ASME) fire-safety standards.
Eurosafe Malaysia follows the same corporate values as its parent company — innovation, integrity, compliance, and customer-centric engineering. With the strength of Eurosafe Global UK’s manufacturing expertise and international supply chain, the Malaysian operation is positioned to support large-scale industrial, commercial, power-plant, oil & gas, high-rise, and critical-infrastructure fire-protection projects.

Allen Fire & Safety Services is a family-owned and operated business. Spanning over 25 years of combined experience in the fire safety industry, our journey started from the bottom up. Our many years of service have helped us develop a well-refined approach to fire safety. 
 
Serving the Greater Vancouver area from Whistler to Hope, our mission is to provide clients with dependable and simplified fire safety service, installations, inspections, and repairs.
 
There are many moving pieces involved in fire safety mitigation. Our passion lies in offering fire safety services in ways that not only protect and prevent the loss and damage from fires, but also helps alleviate property and facility managers as well as business owners of many of the demanding tasks that this entails. 
 
Our approach includes providing the highest standards of ongoing customer support, stress-free management of your fire safety systems, clear communication, and consistency. This paired with our experience, staying current on emerging technologies and ever-changing rules and regulations make us your best choice in fire and life safety services.

At Allen Fire & Safety Services, we work with property and facility managers as well as business owners to keep people and property safe so your business can remain operational and profitable. Not only is our vision to ensure absolute compliance and to keep you safe, but to make fire and life safety solutions simplified. You don’t have to navigate the complexities of fire safety through a multitude of sources. We are your single-point-of-contact experts in fire safety systems and solutions.

We aren’t just another vendor; we are an extension of your team dedicated to making your job easier.

Name: H2O SOLUÇÕES E SISTEMAS CONTRA INCÊNDIO
Description:
Fundada em 2017 por um grupo de profissionais da alta gestão de diversas empresas e seguimentos, a H2O Soluções nasceu com o propósito de preencher uma lacuna do mercado, que é atuar com produtos e serviços de ponta focados no fornecimento de soluções que vão além do simples cumprimento da legislação e obtenção de AVCB. Nosso propósito é de fornecer sistemas de proteção para empresas que busquem agregar valor na  segurança dos seus profissionais e patrimônio, garantindo que implantem a solução adequada para cada demanda e que realizem todos os procedimentos para garantia de  funcionamento no momento em que os sistemas sejam necessários.

Nossa fábrica e centro de distribuição está localizada em Valinhos / SP, a poucos quilômetros do aeroporto de Viracopos. 
Temos equipe de campo distribuídas em diversas cidades, onde nossos profissionais realizam deslocamentos através de veículos e transporte aéreo.

Nossa empresa possuí certificação nas ISO’s 9001, 14.001 e 45.001, o que ajuda a atender as exigências de grandes clientes.

Atualmente temos forte penetração em grandes indústrias das regiões da Baixa Santista (Petrobrás, Terminais de Exportação de Grãos, Mineradoras e etc.), Goiás (Mineradoras), polo  petroquímico de Camaçari / Ba e Paulínia / SP, indústrias alimentícias da Nestlé (espalhadas em diversas cidades), além de refinarias da Petrobrás, indústrias químicas e etc. Temos sistemas instalados, também, em hospitais, hotéis (IBIS e Hilton), shopping center e museus (IMS - SP, Biblioteca Nacional - RJ) e etc.

Name: Pompiers Bretilliens - Breizh Twin Towers Race
Description:
Le vendredi 16 mai 2025, l’association « POMPIERS BRETILLIENS » organise son deuxième défi : « BREIZH TWIN TOWERS RACE » à #rennes 

Ce défi, réservé aux sapeurs-pompiers, consiste à gravir, le plus vite possible, les 35 étages de l'immeuble « les horizons », par les 493 marches des escaliers, tout cela, en tenue de feu complète.
Tous les bénéfices seront reversés à l'association DEBRA-FRANCE LES ENFANTS PAPILLONS  (aide aux personnes atteintes d'épidermolyse bulleuse) et Rêves : l'association qui réalise les rêves des enfants très gravement malades.
Nous sommes à la recherche de sponsors afin de financer notre événement, remettre des récompenses aux participants et de remettre un don aux deux associations partenaires.

Name: Ember Defense
Description:
Founded in May of 2018, amidst the rise of yearly wildfires consuming homes and entire communities, Ember Defense founders saw an ever-growing need for solutions to help mitigate the devastating effects of wildfires. With that goal in mind, they began researching the science behind wildfires and quickly realized that there was an abundance of products available, but no one was fully utilizing them or providing a place where consumers could obtain, educate, and benefit from them. They began implementing the most obvious home hardening solution: installing retrofit ember and fire safe exterior vents. Ember Defense has since grown to include multiple products and services and continues to evolve with the needs of its clients. With our passion about blending fire tech with proven strategies, Ember Defense is now the Discovery Marketplace for Wildfire Risk Mitigation.  

We know that every property is different and has its own unique wildfire risks. Ember Defense will work with you to outline the services that are needed to harden against wildfire. Instead of offering singular solutions, our approach is comprehensive and programmatic. We understand the nuanced variation from property to property and we have the industry knowledge and expertise to bring the appropriate solutions. This includes top-tier wildfire defense products, best-in-class partners in fire tech, evaluation and response teams of seasoned fire professionals, and the Ember Certified Network.

When it comes to protecting your home from fire, you want the whole package. At Ember Defense, the main thing we provide is a peace of mind. We make sure your home is ready to defend itself in the face of fire.

Our Mission: To make living in the wildland urban interface safe and harmonious.

Many of the world’s leading bus manufacturers install Dafo systems in their assembly line. Our engineers understand the importance of modern lean production and find solutions that integrates our system in your process.
A low total cost of ownership is an important key factor for every bus operator. Dafo fire suppression systems, with its superior maintenance intervals and reliability, contributes to increased profitability for the operator.

Name: Jubail Area Mutual Aid Association (JAMA’A)
Description:
The first specialized voluntary committee to combat industrial and petrochemical fires and respond to emergencies in Jubail Industrial Area. SABIC put forward the idea first to the Security and Safety Committee and was discussed with the representative of the Royal Commission and Civil Defense in Jubail in 1981 before any of the factories started production in the region. The Jubail Emergency Committee "Jama'a" was established in 1983, and the acceptance of the principle of cooperation was the beginning of the journey. There were many issues to move the idea to reality like:
- Develop the committee's regulations and the definition system to identify those who are entitled to participate in the emergency. 
- Communication methods between members

Name: Block Compliance Ltd
Description:
Block Compliance is a leading provider of comprehensive fire safety surveys across the country. We specialise in conducting thorough assessments of buildings and premises to ensure compliance with fire safety regulations and to minimise the risk of fire hazards. Our team of highly skilled and certified fire safety experts utilise their extensive knowledge and experience to deliver accurate and reliable survey reports that help our clients maintain a safe and secure environment.

Services:
1. Fire Safety Surveys: Our expert team conducts detailed on-site surveys of buildings and premises, evaluating fire safety measures, equipment, and systems. This includes assessing fire alarm systems, emergency lighting, fire doors, escape routes, fire extinguishers, and more.

2. Compliance Assessments: We thoroughly examine the premises to ensure compliance with relevant fire safety regulations, including local building codes, fire safety legislation, and industry best practices. We provide recommendations on necessary improvements to meet compliance standards.

3. Fire Door Surveys - Detailed analysis of fire doors throughout a variation of buildings to provide a summary of all failings with required solutions to achieve compliance.

4. Fire Stopping Surveys - A detailed analysis of compartmentation failings throughout all building types to provide a detailed analysis of works required to achieve compliance.

Name: exci
Description:
World Leading Wildfire Detection and Tracking Specialists | Early Fire Detection Consultants | Australian-made & Australian-owned Solution | Early Fire Detection | Real-time Fire Intelligence

We are a dedicated company specializing in automated real-time wildfire detection and tracking. With a deep passion for safeguarding communities and the environment, we are committed to revolutionising the way we detect and respond to wildfires.

As wildfires continue to pose significant threats, timely detection becomes paramount. Traditionally, reliance on the human eye has resulted in delayed reporting, putting lives and ecosystems at risk. However, with exci, an Australian-made and Australian-owned solution, we are changing the game.

By harnessing the power of cutting-edge deep machine learning algorithms, exci offers an advanced intelligence system capable of reporting wildfires within minutes of ignition. Our technology ensures early detection, enabling swift and effective fire suppression, and ultimately, the protection of public safety.

Utilising automated machine-learning-based image analysis, exci excels in detecting even the smallest fires, preventing them from escalating into major disasters. Our real-time image analysis capabilities provide simultaneous fire intelligence on screens, empowering firefighting teams across diverse locations to make informed decisions promptly.

#Automated real-time wildfire detection and tracking

#Early fire detection using powerful deep machine learning algorithms

#Real-time image analysis for simultaneous fire intelligence

#Australian-made solution, committed to protecting communities

By leveraging my expertise and exci's groundbreaking technology, we can mitigate the devastating impact of wildfires. Join us in this critical mission to safeguard lives, protect natural resources, and create a safer tomorrow.

Let's connect and explore how we can collaborate to revolutionise wildfire detection and response strategies.

Name: Safety Technology International Ltd
Description:
Over 40 years of protecting the things that protects you!

Mission
To provide exceptional service and continue to manufacture quality products to help prevent theft and vandalism to products in the fire, safety and access control industry.

Company Overview
STI is a family owned and operated business that began thirty five years ago with Jack Taylor's invention of the Stopper Pull Station Protector. Safety Technology now markets an extensive range of products which are sold throughout the world. These products help prevent false fire alarms, theft and vandalism of critically important equipment that protect us all.

Headquartered in Waterford, Michigan and with an office in Worcestershire, England, the STI team has worked hard to continue the work Jack Taylor started.   Our first product came directly at the request of a customer, Garnett Hegeman, a high school principal in Detroit who had a problem with false fire alarms. Most new products throughout the years are a direct result of these types of requests. If you have a false fire alarm, theft, vandalism or other problems we invite you to contact us with the challenge of solving it for you!

We begrijpen dat uw veiligheid en gemoedsrust van het grootste belang zijn, en we zetten ons in om aan uw specifieke behoeften te voldoen.

Daarnaast zijn wij altijd op de hoogte van de nieuwste ontwikkelingen en technologieën in de sector, zodat we u de meest geavanceerde en effectieve oplossingen kunnen bieden. Name: CESAT: Clean Energy Safety and Training Council of Canada
Description:
CESAT is dedicated to equipping the Emergency and Industrial Safety sectors with top-tier training, led by our team of global experts, ensuring a secure shift into the burgeoning clean tech economy.

The world is entering a new age of clean technology. Millions of new jobs are being created. Our goal is to provide safe transition into these new jobs.

Our Mandate

1. To provide general awareness and operational safety training for first responders and frontline workers in the green energy sector. 
2. To broaden safety training knowledge to frontline workers and employers, first responders, government and the general public.
3. To provide available solutions and encourage fact-based reviews of the best available safety products  for first responders.
4. To carry on research into clean energy safety solutions, problems, training, new products or services and new hazards. 
5. To speak for safety and training for frontline workers and first responders.

The Clean Energy Safety and Training Council of Canada is a non-profit organization dedicated to providing comprehensive training and research to ensure the safety of front-line workers and first responders in the clean energy sector. We advocate for informed practices in industries like automotive and waste management through funded research and training. The Council also promotes the safe adoption of clean energy technologies, including various battery types and hydrogen sources, and encourages ongoing education and expert consultation for all stakeholders in the field.

The major component of our fire containment product line is CellBlockEX, an engineered dry loose-fill packaging filler that is revolutionizing the way the world safely handles, transports, and stores lithium-ion batteries and other dangerous goods. This environmentally-friendly mineral granulate offers industries that utilize and ship various types of energy storage a low-cost solution with valuable safety implications.

What began as an answer to inflight fires in the airline industry, has grown into a comprehensive line of products including UN packaging, DOT SP packaging, personal protective equipment, and custom storage and transport solutions. Our team of safety consultants and experts provide premier customer service and product support. The CellBlock brand is trusted worldwide by airline crews, mining companies, battery recyclers, technology labs, hospital staff, transportation professionals, and more.

Over the next 60+ years, DEF would grow both as a manufacturing business but also as a systems integrator.  With a continued drive for innovation, the DEF research and development department lead the way in life safety technology, introducing the first analogue addressable system in in 1980’s.

As the DEF brand expanded throughout France, new European business were created – striving for similar success as the French business.  In total, over 50 life safety related businesses form the DEF Network.

In 2019, the DEF UK business was launched.

With an enviable first contract win, the DEF UK team look to provide our customers and clients with industry leading, innovative and efficient systems to protect their people and property.
