Name: Zenova Group PLC
Description:
Zenova Group PLC (AIM: ZED) 
We are at the forefront of developing cutting-edge fire safety and heat management solutions that have applications across the housing, industrial, and commercial sectors.

The Group’s products include fire retardant paints, insulating paints and render, fire extinguishing fluid and applications.  Zenova provides industry leading solutions across a range of fire protection and temperature management problems, comprising:

Zenova FP
A water-based fire-protection paint that prevents ignition and spread of fire. It can be used in commercial, industrial, and domestic applications on variety of materials, from wood to metal.

Zenova FX
Patent pending fire extinguisher filled with proprietary Zenova Fluid (Zenova FXB) that extinguishes all types of fires, reduces chances of re-ignition, works in cold (-15 ̊C) conditions, is non-toxic and does not produce harmful by-products.

Zenova IP
Thermal insulation paint that creates a thermal barrier, provides thermal reflection of sunrays and infrared radiation, anti-condensation, and anti-mould properties. It can be applied to virtually any exterior or interior material, regardless of the surface.

Zenova IR
Thermal insulation render to enhance the effectiveness of insulation by creating a thermo shield. It fills all cavities and gaps regardless of geometric shape and creates a vacuum – the most effective insulator.

ZENOVA WB
A wildfire barrier fluid, which provides a virtual barrier where fire simply will not burn. Repeated tests on a variety of extremely dry wildfire fuels demonstrates the incredible fire resistance Zenova WB provides, while remaining viable after application for 30+ days in dry conditions.

The Group has achieved this without compromising the sustainability of natural and economical resources, including personal health and safety, with ecologically sound products.

Further information on the Group can be found at www.zenovagroup.com

Name: Custom Fire & Sprinkler Services Ltd.
Description:

Ce liquide a le pouvoir exceptionnel de prévenir et d'éteindre tous les types d'incendies, même les incendies de forêts matures.

Nos produits fonctionnent en éteignant le feu instantanément, grâce à un mécanisme innovant qui neutralise directement la molécule de combustion. Ce processus unique en son genre empêche de manière efficace toute reprise du feu, garantissant ainsi une sécurité maximale.

Pour en savoir plus sur nos produits, nous vous invitons à visiter notre site web : https://www.fireterminator.ca

Votre sécurité, notre priorité !

Name: FDS Projects B.V.
Description:
FDS Projects 

Fire Durability Solutions, de partner waar u terecht kunt bij elke uitdaging als het gaat om de passieve brandpreventie. 

Met ruim 10 jaar ervaring en 300 projecten op onze naam weten wij exact waar we het over hebben. 

Wat kunnen wij voor u betekenen: 

- Volledige uitwerking logboek
- Applicaties en doorvoeringen
- Brandwerend betimmeren van stalenconstructies
- Brandwerend aanpassen van deuren en deurkozijnen
- Plaatsen van brandkleppen
- Coaten van trappenhuizen (indien mogelijk) om de brandklasse te behalen
- Allround Timmerwerkzaamheden 

Waarom FDS Projects? 

We bestaan uit een dynamische, flexibel, jonge groep.
Waarbij elke monteur met passie met u mee praat als het gaat om de passieve brandveiligheid. 

De monteurs hebben hierbij de benodigde certificaten:
- VCA
- Hoogwerker
- GPI 

Monteurs krijgen bij ons ook de mogelijkheid zichzelf volledig te storten in de wetgeving (BBL) mochten zij dat interessant vinden. 

Wat ons uniek maakt is dat de monteurs zelf mogen aankaarten welke werkzaamheden ze willen verichten en dit ziet u terug op de werkvloer.
Een monteur met passie en een glimlach is niet te vergelijken met een normale 'monteur'. 

Uiteraard hebben we een branddeskundige in huis op het moment dat het gaat om de wetgeving. 

De monteurs denken altijd met onze klanten mee, we streven er altijd naar om op de meest efficiënte wijze te werken en ervoor te zorgen dat de projecten zonder stagnaties worden afgerond. 

We zijn te bereiken via de mail, telefonisch of LinkdIn.

If you work in an industrial environment,
risk is an inevitable part of your job.
The brave ones at oil rigs.
The go-getters in the chemical industry.

They all just seem tough, bold and fearless, right?

These doors not only complement the existing passive fire-fighting systems, but also ensure optimal personal safety.


Fire Rated Door Construction Details:

As per IS: 3614 Part II & BS: 476 Part 22


JC Fire Rated door are confirming to IS: 3614 Part II and BS: 476 Part 22. A fire-resistive degree door assembly, including frame and hardware, is capable of providing a specific fire protection. This strategic advantage enables continuous 24/7 protection for high-risk areas, catching fires at their incipient stages before they escalate into disasters.

Recognized as an XPRIZE Wildfire qualified team and awarded funding from the BC Centre for Innovation & Clean Energy, our technology delivers proven results: 30% reduction in burned areas and prevention of up to 3,900 tons of CO2 emissions annually in high-risk regions.

Our mission is clear: to prevent and suppress wildfires with unprecedented speed and precision, protecting people, property, and our planet. We seamlessly integrate with existing firefighting systems—complementing rather than replacing conventional operations—to create a comprehensive defense network against increasingly severe climate-driven fire events.

Beyond wildfire response, our versatile heavy-lift platform supports critical tasks like filling pumpkin tanks, transporting equipment, wetting down at-risk areas, and accessing hard-to-reach locations where roads fall short.

FireSwarm is actively seeking strategic partners, investors, and early adopters to scale our innovative solutions. Join us in transforming wildfire defense.

Name: Groupe siplan
Description:
Le groupe Siplan fut fondé en 1969 sous l’impulsion de Monsieur Bernard Torres, initialement implanté à Charenton-le-Pont, où Siplan fabriquait et distribuait tous produits de signalétique pour la prévention des risques. Puis son créateur fit le constat qu’un plan schématique des bâtiments regroupant les itinéraires d’évacuation et les éléments de sécurité deviendrait un élément incontournable dans tous Bâtiments. Au début, ce produit très peu connu et obligatoire de nos jours ne remporta guère de succès auprès des grands groupes. Ce fut après le 1ᵉʳ choc pétrolier de 1973 que la France, sous l’impulsion d’un arrêté ministériel (MS 41), rendit les plans d’évacuation obligatoires pour tous les établissements recevant du public.

En 1979, second constat du visionnaire, les techniques évoluent : début des premières ébauches d’ordinateur, le plan et la conception évoluent également : première technique, le calque de reproduction.

Le groupe prend une dimension National au début des années 80, avec la création de l’agence ABS au Mans (72) en charge de la région Est.

L’apparition de l’ordinateur, fin des années 80, influença une nouvelle ère pour la profession : celle du numérique et de la réalisation D.A.O.

Début des années 90, l’agence de Perpignan vient renforcer le groupe pour une présence territoriale parfaite.

De nos jours l’entreprise familiale, rejoint par son fils Jean-Baptiste au cours de l’année 2010, prépare l’évolution du produit essentiel de prévention et protection des bâtiments, grâce à l’arrivée de nouvelles techniques et de nouveaux supports que nous aurons le plaisir de vous présenter tout au long de cette année.

De eerste paar minuten van brandontwikkeling zijn van cruciaal belang- 
Rookdetectie van Elotec waarschuwt u terwijl u zelf nog kunt ingrijpen


Beschrijving

Dik Elektro Techniek is een installatie bedrijf in Gasselternijveen. Wij zijn een NCP gecertificeerd installatiebedrijf voor brandmeldinstallaties. Wij komen veel bij agrarische bedrijven in onze regio.
 Nadat vorig jaar, recht tegenover ons, een kippenschuur in vlammen opging en daarbij 170.000 kippen omkwamen, zijn wij gaan onderzoeken of er nu werkelijk geen branddetectiesysteem is waardoor zulke branden in veeschuren veel eerder opgemerkt, dan wel voorkomen, kunnen worden.
 Na een te vergeefse zoektocht via de Nederlandse leveranciers van branddetectie systemen zijn wij uitgekomen in Noorwegen bij Elotec. Elotec heeft sinds 1992 ervaring met branddetectie in de agrarische sector en inmiddels een totaal van 55000 detectie units geplaatst.
 In onze beleving moet je het wiel niet opnieuw willen uitvinden maar gebruik maken van de opgebouwde ervaringen. In samenwerking met Elotec, gaan wij deze producten in Nederland introduceren.
 In Scandinavië werkt dit heel goed en krijgen de boeren tot 40% korting op hun verzekeringspremie.

Name: Technica Fiber Tech Pvt Ltd
Description:
Technica Fiber Tech is a leading provider of turnkey Distributed Fiber Optic Sensing (DFOS) Solutions -  Distributed Temperature Sensing (DTS) and Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) in India. Unlike Conventional temperature and surveillance sensors which only capture data at a discrete point, Our Fire Rakshak (DTS) and Fence Rakshak (DAS) monitor temperature and acoustic/vibration distributions by transforming an optical fiber into a spatially continuous sensor that performs like thousands of temperature sensors and microphones installed adjacent to one another. Thus with less instrumentation, our solutions can capture more data, – saving time and cost.

Both Fire Rakshak and Fence Rakshak work in environments where other Fire detection systems and Survellience Systems fail or have numerous false alarms due to EMI, dust, wind, extreme temperatures, and other environmental conditions. Technica Fiber Tech brings performance, intelligence, flexibility, robustness, and cost-effectiveness to all our monitoring solutions that empower our customers with knowledge and reliability to reduce risk and protect their assets. 

The solutions we deploy deliver real-time, actionable intelligence that promotes cost savings by increasing operational efficiency, maximizing productivity, and reducing risk. Some applications of our well-designed solutions are - Fire/Heat Detection, Perimeter Monitoring, Rail Track Monitoring, Pipe Line Monitoring, and Power Cable Monitoring. 

Just a few examples of our diverse range of clients include:

• Cement Industries
• Railways
• Logistic Warehouse
• Metal Industries
• Data Centers
• Manufacturing facilities
• Power substations 

We have an unshakeable focus on quality, delivery, value, and technology in everything we make and do. We serve our customers with "Systematic, End-to-end, One-stop" solutions. Technica Fiber Tech Pvt Ltd is headquartered in Delhi.

Name: DAB Passive Fire Protection Specialists
Description:
DAB Passive Fire Protection are experts in all aspects of fire protection and fire stopping.
Our team delivers the highest quality, fully compliant services for construction projects of all sizes, all over the country.

STRUCTURAL
Fire protection to structural steelwork plays an essential role in ensuring that buildings will not collapse prematurely in the event of a fire, providing time for the occupants to escape and for the fire service to obtain access.

Traditionally, ‘fire protection’, comprising non-combustible boards and/or cementitious sprays is applied to insulate the frame. However, reactive coatings (intumescent paints) have also become much more popular.

Our team will assess each project and use the correct process where necessary.

FIRESTOPPING
Firestops prevent unprotected horizontal and vertical penetrations in a fire-resistance-rated wall or floor assembly from creating a route by which fire and smoke can spread that would otherwise have been fire resisting construction, e.g. where a pipe passes through a firewall.

Fire stopping is also to seal around gaps between fire resisting constructions, e.g. the linear gap between a wall and the floor above, in order for construction to form a complete barrier to fire and smoke spread.

REMEDIAL
Our team survey jobs and carry out all work which is needed. We assess incorrectly installed or damaged work and fit correctly to manufacturers details.

Name: FlareSens RTFIN
Description:
Q: What is FlareSens?
A: FlareSens is India's first real-time fire intimation network. It revolutionizes fire safety by providing instant updates and alerts on the status of your fire safety systems directly to your smartphone.

Q: How does FlareSens work?
A: FlareSens integrates seamlessly with existing fire safety infrastructure, monitoring components like smoke detectors and sprinkler systems. It delivers real-time alerts and updates, keeping you informed of any issues immediately.

Q: What makes FlareSens unique?
A: FlareSens offers real-time notifications, a user-friendly interface, and detailed analytics. This combination provides comprehensive oversight and immediate action capabilities, ensuring effective fire safety management.

Q: How does FlareSens enhance fire safety?
A: FlareSens offers real-time alerts and detailed information, enabling swift responses to fire incidents. It also provides analytics to help optimize safety measures, ensuring preparedness and protection.

Q: Why should I choose FlareSens?
A: FlareSens stands out with its cutting-edge technology, real-time notifications, and comprehensive support. It keeps you connected and informed, providing peace of mind and ensuring the safety of your property and people.

Q: Who can benefit from FlareSens?
A: FlareSens is ideal for businesses and institutions needing reliable fire safety, such as commercial buildings, manufacturing facilities, warehouses, and educational institutions. Its scalability suits both small businesses and large enterprises.

Q: What kind of support does FlareSens offer?
A: FlareSens provides comprehensive support, from installation and setup to ongoing maintenance. Our dedicated team assists with upgrades, audits, and training.

Q: How can I get started with FlareSens?
A: To learn more or get started with FlareSens, visit our website or contact our support team. Experience the future of fire safety with a system designed to keep you informed, protected, and connected.

Wir helfen Dir die gesetzlichen Vorgaben (ArbSchG, ASR A.2., DGUV 205-023) zu erfüllen und bereiten Dich bestmöglich auf den Ernstfall vor.

Der betriebliche Brandschutz ist ein äußerst wichtiger Bereich, wenn es um Deine Sicherheit und die Deiner Kollegen geht. Entsprechend ist eine professionelle und anwenderorientierte Schulung Deiner Mitarbeiter von größter Wichtigkeit.

Mit unseren Schulungen stellen wir sicher, dass Du mögliche Brandursachen selbst erkennen und diesen vorbeugen kannst. Sollte es dennoch zu einem Brand kommen, sind Deine Kollegen nach der Teilnahme an unserer Schulung bestens vorbereitet, um erste Brandbekämpfungs-Maßnahmen durchzuführen, Deine Kollegen bei der Evakuierung anzuleiten und die Feuerwehr zu unterstützen.

Wir möchten Dich bei der Gewährleistung Deiner Sicherheit unterstützen und freuen uns die Brandschutz- & Evakuierungshelfer- Schulung mit Dir durchzuführen.

Name: Gorilla Arbeitsschutz GmbH
Description:
Gorilla Arbeitsschutz GmbH – Ihr Partner für Sicherheit, Gesundheit und Prävention im Betrieb
Wir bieten ein umfassendes Leistungsspektrum rund um Arbeitssicherheit. Unser Ziel ist es, Unternehmen dabei zu unterstützen, gesetzliche Vorgaben zuverlässig umzusetzen und ein sicheres Arbeitsumfeld für ihre Mitarbeitenden zu schaffen.
Unser Portfolio umfasst praxisnahe Schulungen in den Bereichen Brandschutz und Evakuierung, einschließlich der Ausbildung zum Brandschutz- und Evakuierungshelfer mit realitätsnahen Löschübungen. Im Bereich der Ersten Hilfe bieten wir betriebliche Aus- und Fortbildungen direkt im Unternehmen an – zielgerichtet, kompakt und praxisorientiert.
Ein weiterer Schwerpunkt liegt auf dem sicheren Umgang mit Gefahrstoffen und Chemikalien. Hier vermitteln wir in unseren Unterweisungen fundiertes Wissen zu Schutzmaßnahmen und gesetzeskonformen Abläufen im Arbeitsalltag. Auch für Arbeiten mit Atemschutz oder in beengten Räumen wie Schächten und Kanälen bieten wir spezialisierte Schulungen inklusive Rettungskonzepte.
Darüber hinaus gehören Schulungen im Umgang mit persönlicher Schutzausrüstung gegen Absturz (PSAgA), inklusive Anwendung und Rettungstechniken, ebenso zu unserem Angebot wie die Beratung und Schulung zum Gehörschutz – essenziell für den präventiven Gesundheitsschutz in lärmintensiven Arbeitsumgebungen.
Ergänzt wird unser Angebot durch die Durchführung von UVV-Prüfungen an Arbeitsmitteln sowie regelmäßige Sicherheitsunterweisungen – individuell abgestimmt auf die Anforderungen Ihres Betriebs.Neben Schulungen und Beratungen bieten wir in unserem Shop auch geprüfte PSA-Produkte zum Kauf an – So erhalten Sie bei uns alles aus einer Hand: Wissen, Umsetzung und die passende Ausrüstung.
Mit einem starken Netzwerk sind wir regional und bundesweit im Einsatz und führen unsere Schulungen flexibel direkt bei unseren Kunden vor Ort durch.
Arbeitsschutz schaffen wir gemeinsam!

Name: City of Tallahassee Fire Department
Description:
The Tallahassee Fire Department (TFD) proudly serves the City of Tallahassee and Leon County with a commitment to prevention, preparation, and protection. With more than 300 highly trained personnel operating out of 16 stations, we respond to over 36,000 calls each year, protecting a community of nearly 300,000 residents.

Under the leadership of Chief Gene Sanders, TFD provides comprehensive emergency services including fire suppression, advanced life support, and specialized response teams in Urban Search & Rescue, Hazardous Materials, and Airport Rescue.

Our work extends beyond emergency response. The Prevention Division conducts inspections, reviews development plans, and enforces fire codes to safeguard lives and property. Through education programs, youth initiatives such as the Cadet Program and Camp Ignite, and community outreach events like the Citizens Fire Academy, we invest in building strong connections and reducing risks before emergencies occur.

At TFD, we believe public safety is built on trust, preparedness, and partnership. We are proud to serve - and always #FullyCommitted to protecting our community.

We have you covered.

Description:
Interactive Fire & Maintenance Systems is a specialist fire protection company delivering high-quality installation, service, and maintenance across a wide range of fire detection systems. We work closely with builders, facility managers, strata groups, and asset owners to ensure their buildings remain compliant, safe, and operational when it matters most.
Our team provides solutions covering dry fire systems, evacuation and warning systems, and advanced smart technologies. We specialise in the Siemens Cerberus PRO platform with ASA detectors, giving clients reliable detection performance and fewer false alarms.
A key strength of our business is transparency. Through the Uptick maintenance platform, clients receive real-time updates, photos, test results, and compliance reports as technicians complete work on site. This helps eliminate communication gaps, improves record-keeping, and ensures every client has full visibility of their assets.
Interactive Fire & Maintenance Systems is focused on building long-term partnerships. We listen to the challenges our clients face, such as poor communication, inconsistent reporting, or limited system knowledge and we provide a service that is proactive, responsive, and easy to work with.
Whether it’s new construction, upgrades, or ongoing maintenance, we deliver dependable fire protection solutions backed by strong technical capability, attention to detail, and a commitment to keeping systems operating at the highest standard.

HISTÓRIA

A empresa com mais de 34 anos de história, fomos crescendo e avançando de forma sustentável, identificando oportunidades e incorporando desafios que promovem não somente o crescimento da empresa, mas o desenvolvimento de todo um mercado de sistema contra incêndio; A empresa FAMA SISTEMA CONTRA INCÊNDIO iniciou suas  atividades no ano de 1989, trabalhando na elaboração na execução de fabricação e manutenção do SISTEMA CONTRA INCÊNDIO, automático e manual para todos os segmentos de maquinas agrícolas; Elaboração e execução de projetos hidrantes, vendas e recargas de extintores de incêndio.
Nosso foco é na qualidade de nossos produtos, serviços e atendimento, nossa principal meta é a alcançar a excelência; nosso leme é: “PARA ONTEM, HOJE E AMANHÃ”. 


MISSÃO

Sermos reconhecidos lideres nacional e internacional pela excelência de nosso produto e atendimento; se atualizando na área para uma execução perfeita, ajudando a promover de forma eficaz o desenvolvimento do combate ao princípio de incêndio PREDIAL e MÁQUINAS AGRÍCOLAS do AGRONEGÓCIO, assegurando a satisfação de nossos clientes com soluções e inovações em nossa prestação de serviços, respeitando ao meio ambiente e a segurança de vidas.

Description:

We've installed systems of all sizes for universities, businesses, manufacturing plants, storage facilities, assisted living facilities, restaurants, etc.  Our mission is to provide you with all of your life safety needs under one roof to ensure your life, property, and assets are protected from fire and theft.

MFS also offers residential & multi-residential services! Everything from backflow prevention, fire suppression systems & alarm installation/monitoring. MFS can handle all of your single family and multi-family properties.

Name: New Fire Engineers Private Limited

New Fire Engineers Private Limited is a specialised fire protection engineering company with nearly five decades of experience in delivering custom-engineered, turnkey fire safety solutions for industrial, commercial, offshore and infrastructure projects.

Established in 1975, we provide comprehensive end-to-end fire protection services, including hazard analysis, system design, detailed engineering, supply, installation, testing, commissioning and annual maintenance contracts (AMC). Every system is designed around site-specific risks, operational conditions and statutory compliance requirements, ensuring dependable performance in critical environments.

Our expertise covers fire detection and alarm systems, water-based firefighting systems (hydrant and sprinkler), gas-based and special hazard suppression systems, along with integrated fire safety solutions. We work closely with clients, consultants and regulatory authorities to deliver safe, compliant and performance-driven fire protection systems that protect life, assets and business continuity.

Headquartered in Mumbai, with a pan-India presence, New Fire Engineers is trusted by organisations operating in high-risk and mission-critical facilities, where fire safety cannot afford compromise. Our engineering depth, execution capability and long-standing industry presence make us a reliable partner for complex fire protection requirements.

Name: Brandkonsulten MS AB
Description:
Brandkonsulten MS AB - Experter inom Brandskydd och Arbetsmiljö

Vi är specialister inom brandskydd och arbetsmiljö med lång erfarenhet i både små och stora projekt. Tillsammans med er anpassar vi våra tjänster inom området för att säkerställa trygghet och förebyggande åtgärder. Vi erbjuder omfattande hjälp genom hela projektet och finner lösningar på uppkomna problem och frågor.

Vår expertis inkluderar:

Brandskyddsprojektering:
Vi stödjer er genom hela projektcykeln med teknisk brandskyddsprojektering och rådgivning. Vi erbjuder förstudier, brandskyddsbeskrivningar, dokumentation, ritningar, inventeringar, analytiska beräkningar, kontroller och utförandekontroller.

Brandskydd under byggtid (BUB):
Under byggtiden är det lätt att glömma brandskyddet. Vi hjälper er att skapa en trygg arbetsplats genom att utveckla styrande dokument och kravställningar baserat på gällande lagar. Vi hanterar tillstånd, uppföljning, kontroller och ronderingar för att säkerställa brandsäkerheten.

Arbetsmiljö och Säkerhet på Byggarbetsplatsen:
Inom byggsektorn är arbetsplatserna temporära och förhållandena förändras snabbt. Vi har lång erfarenhet av att hjälpa till med efterlevnad av arbetsmiljöregler. Vi är en avlastning för platsledningen

Vårt mål är att skapa en säker arbetsmiljö och främja förebyggande åtgärder. Vi är experter på brandskydd och arbetsmiljö/säkerhet och hjälper er att navigera genom komplexa regelverk för att skapa trygghet på arbetsplatser. Låt oss vara er partner i att säkra och utveckla era projekt.

Dies reicht vom essenziellen Schutz der Einsatzkräfte durch die Berücksichtigung von Brandschutzmaßnahmen beim Bauverfahren bis hin zur Vorschreibung und Hilfestellung bei der Löschwasserbereitstellung.

Die Kärntner Feuerwehren werden bei Fragen zum Neu-, Zu- und Umbau ihrer Rüsthäuser durch die Brandverhütungsstelle Kärnten beraten.

Name: Fire Risk Management Systems
Description:
Fires are destructive, disruptive and expensive. A serious fire can result in the long-term devastation of any commercial or industrial operation. It is a catastrophe to be avoided at all costs. A pro-active, safety-first, rational strategy behind the risk of fire exposure is the key to the protection of property, assets, income, jobs, and protection from injuries 
and lost lives. Management of any organization is responsible for ensuring that a comprehensive fire safety and emergency plan exists in its company. 
Fire Risk International sees each client as a partner, working towards creating a safe working environment for everyone on the premises. Part of the economic well-being of any company is a result of management buy-in, support, education and training.

ABOUT FIRE RISK INTERNATIONAL 
Fire Risk International (FRI) was formed to bridge the gap between owners and insurance brokers. We at FRI have the skills, experience and knowledge to apply current legislation to ensure that clients are compliant with the requirements of both the local authority and the insurer. We understand the relevant legislation and fire engineering practices and can apply them, providing cost-efficient and effective solutions which are in the best interest of our clients. We interpret the legislation in terms of your risk profile and recommend solutions for it. Fire Risk International demystifies legislation, mitigates risk, and ensures that businesses qualify for the insurance cover they need. 
We reduce your risk and your costs and create an environment that is attractive to insurers.

Name: Battery Briner
Description:
The Battery Briner is designed to be used easy and efficiently to stop thermal runway and fires in Electric Vehicle Batteries.

An EV battery catching fire, due to manufacturing errors, has been damaged, or any other causes, looks like a spontaneous combustion, e.g., like in fuel consumption vehicles. However, the internal burning process within the battery is called a “thermal runaway” and is different from a normal burning process.

The Battery Briner is designed to be used easy and efficiently to stop thermal runway in Electric Vehicle Batteries by using "Brine".
Brine is a natural product; it is a high- concentration solution of salt (NaCl) in water (H2O).

Brine is used as a secondary fluid in large refrigeration installations for the transport of thermal energy. The lowest freezing point obtainable for NaCl brine is −21.1°C (−6.0°F) at the concentration of 23.3% NaCl by weight. This is called the eutectic point.

Name: SCALA SCI -Scala Sistemas Contra Incêndio
Description:
A SCALA SCI, indústria fundada em 1985, desenvolve, projeta e fabrica portas corta fogo conforme a mais moderna tecnologia disponível no mercado, seguindo rigorosamente todas as normas técnicas da ABNT NBR 11742 e NBR 11711.

Com o aperfeiçoamento de seus produtos e processos de produção, e da necessidade de seus clientes de diversos segmentos, adveio o desenvolvimento de novos produtos: portas para saída de emergência, portas acústicas, e portas metálicas em geral que atendem as diversas características de cada construção, quer sejam em aplicações residências, comerciais ou industriais.

A SCALA SCI, empresa certificada NBR ISO 9001 está totalmente comprometida com a qualidade, e a melhoria contínua de seus produtos, e pela parceria e confiança de seus clientes e fornecedores.
Quando você escolhe qualquer de nossos produtos, está colocando em sua obra qualidade, durabilidade, e tradição da marca SCALA SCI. 

PORTAS CORTA FOGO

As portas corta-fogo SCALA SCI são portas que impedem a passagem do incêndio  de um compartimento para outro.  Delimitam ou atrasam a propagação dos incêndios  , permitindo a evacuação de edifícios ou pisos sinistrados.  

No Brasil, as empresas de portas corta-fogo submetem seus produtos a um processo de certificação, com o objetivo de atestar, asseverar o cumprimento de exigências de Normas Técnicas, uma vez que o desempenho de um equipamento está diretamente relacionado às matérias-primas empregadas na sua confecção e no controle do processo produtivo.  

Desde 1940 a ABNT atua no segmento de segurança contra incêndio, e por conseqüência junto aos fabricantes de portas corta-fogo, garantindo o desempenho mediante o acompanhamento de ensaios, e o controle das etapas de fabricação e do produto no mercado em auditorias.    

Para portas corta-fogo foi criado o Selo de Marca de Conformidade ABNT, fixado em cada porta, contendo um número de série e informando a classe (tempo de resistência ao fogo).

Name: MBS Traders
Description:
MBS Traders is a firefighting system installation company that specializes in the installation and maintenance of fire protection systems. The company offer a range of firefighting solutions such as sprinkler systems, fire alarms, and fire suppression systems for a variety of commercial and residential properties.

As a firefighting system installation company, MBS Traders has a team of experienced and trained professionals who are knowledgeable about fire protection codes and regulations, and who can help clients choose the most effective firefighting solutions for their specific needs. The company also offer maintenance and repair services to ensure that fire protection systems are functioning properly and are ready to operate in case of a fire emergency.

A fire fighting system is a system designed to detect, alert, and suppress fires in a building or other structure. The main components of a fire fighting system include fire detectors, an alarm panel, alarm notification appliances, fire suppression systems, a fire control panel, fire pumps, and standby power. These systems are designed to help prevent fires from spreading and protect building occupants in the event of a fire.
If you are considering installing a fire fighting system in your building, it is important to choose a reputable company with experience in installing these systems. MBS Traders may be able to assist you with the installation of a fire fighting system that meets your specific needs and complies with local codes and regulations. It is also important to properly maintain and test your fire fighting system on a regular basis to ensure that it is functioning properly and can effectively protect your building and it

Overall, MBS Traders is a company that helps to ensure the safety of commercial and residential properties by providing reliable firefighting systems and expert installation and maintenance services.

Our Vision: FireFrost is dedicated to redefining safety standards within the aviation industry. By leveraging advanced technology inspired by the high stakes of Formula 1 racing, we aim to minimize the risks associated with in-flight and post-crash fires, ensuring a safer tomorrow.

What We Offer:
FireFrost introduces a groundbreaking fire suppression system, certified for Cirrus SR20/22/22T aircraft. Our system employs state-of-the-art technology, akin to that used in Formula 1 race cars, designed to offer an extra layer of protection. With safe, non-corrosive, and easy-to-install features, our 7-pound, non-pressurized tanks seamlessly fit into the aft baggage compartment, providing an innovative solution to enhance aircraft safety.

Our Commitment:

Innovation: Pushing the boundaries of technology to create safer flying experiences.
Community: Engaging with pilots, families, and the aviation community to ensure our solutions meet their needs.
Sustainability: Prioritizing environmentally friendly practices in our design and operations.
Integrity: Upholding the highest standards of honesty and transparency in every action.
FireFrost stands as a beacon of hope and innovation in the aviation sector, transforming the lessons of the past into the safety protocols of the future. We invite you to join us on this journey of making the skies safer for everyone.

Connect and explore how FireFrost can enhance your flying experience. Visit us at www.flyfirefrost.com for more information.

Name: TheFirePanda
Description:
The rapid rise of electric vehicles (EVs) and battery-powered technologies has brought the world closer to a sustainable, low-carbon future. As governments, industries, and consumers embrace this shift, the need for safe, reliable, and scalable energy storage has never been greater.

However, with this transition comes a critical challenge: battery fire safety. Lithium-ion batteries, the backbone of modern EVs and energy storage systems, are powerful but inherently sensitive to risks such as thermal runaway, fire hazards, and safety failures. Without proper preventive measures, these risks can compromise safety, business continuity, and trust in the EV ecosystem.

That’s where FirePanda steps in.

At FirePanda, we are committed to building a world-class battery and EV fire safety ecosystem through innovative products, cutting-edge solutions, and expert consulting. Our mission is simple but powerful: to safeguard people, industries, and communities while enabling the growth of clean mobility and renewable energy.
FirePanda is a specialized EV & Battery Fire Safety brand, operating across India and serving clients worldwide. We are more than just a safety solutions provider—we are a partner in innovation, compliance, and risk mitigation for the industries that power tomorrow.

Our team brings together experts in battery technology, fire protection, compliance, and industrial safety, offering end-to-end solutions tailored to the needs of OEMs, battery manufacturers, EV startups, energy storage providers, and industrial plants.
By combining global best practices with localized expertise, FirePanda delivers safety solutions that are reliable, scalable, and future-ready.

Name: Zeroflame
Description:
Welcome to Zeroflame – where fire protection meets simplicity!

At Zeroflame, we've dedicated ourselves to revolutionizing the world of fire protection, making it not only effective but also remarkably simple. We believe that fire protection should be easy to understand, specify, apply, and certify. Our journey began in 1976 as the Hamron Group, specializing in the sale of paints and coatings designed for structural fire protection.

Over the years, our commitment to excellence propelled us to the forefront of the highly specialized field of fire protection. Our products became the go-to choice for building projects of all scales, from humble dwelling houses to prestigious developments in Ireland and beyond.

However, as the complexity of fire protection products became apparent, we recognized a significant challenge. Traditional suppliers to the building trade—builders' merchants, decorators' merchants, hardware stores, and the like—found it difficult to access and understand these intricate solutions. In response to this challenge, we took a bold step in the early 1990s. We initiated a comprehensive program to develop structural fire protection products with clear and straightforward specifications. These products were rigorously tested to meet relevant standards and thoughtfully packaged to be easily marketed by builders' merchants and decorators' merchants.

Today, Zeroflame stands as a testament to our unwavering commitment to simplify fire protection. Our focus is stronger than ever, guided by the core values of simplicity, customer-centricity, speed, reliability, and progressiveness within the Zeroflame division.

Join us in our mission to make fire protection accessible, understandable, and hassle-free. Choose Zeroflame for a future where protection against fire is as simple as it is effective.

Name: Groupe INCENDIZ
Description:
Nos domaines de compétences :

- Désenfumage :

Qu'il soit naturel ou mécanique, le désenfumage permet :
Aux personnes, une meilleure évacuation des locaux enfumés.
Aux sapeur-pompiers, une intervention plus rapide.
Aux bâtiments, une stabilité au feu plus longue.

- Porte coupe-feu :

Une porte coupe-feu doit être fermée pour isoler des flammes, de la chaleur et des fumées.
Elles sont toujours équipées de ferme porte pour se refermer après un passage.
Pour facilité l'exploitation des locaux, elles peuvent être "maintenues ouvertes" par des systèmes à déclenchement automatique et se fermeront en cas d'incendie grâce à leur ferme porte.
Il est strictement interdit de mettre un obstacle à la fermeture d'une porte coupe-feu ou de la caler.

- Système d'extinction :

Les systèmes d'extinction sont très souvent manuels :
Extincteur
RIA (Robinet d'Incendie Armé)
Colonnes sèches ou humides
Ils peuvent aussi être automatiques :
Sprinkler
Extinction à gaz
Générateur de mousse

- Alarme incendie :

L'alarme incendie, SSI (Système de Sécurité Incendie), permet d'informer les occupants d'un bâtiment de la nécessité d'évacuer, elle va de la simple alarme sonore à la plus complexe permettant de lancer de nombreuses fonctions de mise en sécurité, CMSI (Centralisateur de Mise en Sécurité Incendie).

- Formation :

La formation est l'une des principales conditions au bon déroulement de l'évacuation des locaux.
Elle permet aussi de participer à la protection des personnes et des biens en cas d'incendie, il est donc important de se former chaque année.

Name: BN1 Surveyors
Description:
BN1 is a fire safety consultancy operating across the UK, specialising in external wall fire risk and regulatory compliance for residential and mixed use buildings of all heights, including higher risk buildings over 18 metres.

All technical services are delivered in house and operate under clear professional governance, led by Director and Technical Lead Lea Morland. BN1 is one of a limited number of consultancies approved under the Homes England Cladding Safety Scheme supplier framework.

Supported by a dedicated team of fire engineers and technical professionals, BN1 provides clear, proportionate and evidence led fire safety advice, supporting informed decision making across assessment, remediation and ongoing fire safety management.

Name: BAB Brandschutz Akademie Berlin GmbH
Description:
BAB Brandschutz Akademie Berlin – wir wollen Veränderungen bewirken!
Die BAB Brandschutz Akademie Berlin hat die Aufgabe, die technisch-wissenschaftliche und allgemeine Fort- und Weiterbildung von Architekten, Ingenieuren und Naturwissenschaftlern aus Unternehmen, freien Berufen, dem öffentlichen Dienst, Körperschaften des Öffentlichen Rechts und aus fachlichen Betätigungen – besonders im Bereich des Brandschutzes – wissenschaftlich und wirtschaftlich zu unterstützen.
Intelligente und sichere Gebäude benötigen auch intelligenten und kreativen Brandschutz.
Die BAB Brandschutz Akademie Berlin möchte alle am Bau Beteiligten zu dieser gemeinsamen Zielstellung partnerschaftlich zusammenbringen und ein zukunftsorientiertes Bildungsforum sein.
Wir möchten den gestiegenen Anforderungen an Fachkräfte, insbesondere an Architekten und Ingenieure, Rechnung tragen und damit die Zukunftsfähigkeit aller am Baugeschehen Beteiligten sichern.
Die BAB Brandschutz Akademie Berlin setzt auf Weiterbildung im akademischen Bereich. Herzstück unserer Qualifizierungsschwerpunkte ist der Brandschutz.
Mit Referenten, die zu den renommiertesten Vertretern ihrer Disziplinen gehören und in Zusammenarbeit mit hochkarätigen Partnern will die BAB Brandschutz Akademie Berlin bundesweit Wirkung entfalten. Damit steht sie für Kooperationsfähigkeit und Zukunftsorientierung des deutschen Bauwesens, insbesondere des Brandschutzes.

Name: KS-Brandschutzservice
Description:
Bei dem sensiblen Thema Brandschutz fehlt vielen Betreibern und Unternehmen der richtige Zugriff. Der Berg an Aufgaben und Regeln die beachtet werden müssen ist groß. Oft begegnen wir der Haltung „lieber gar nichts machen, bevor ich etwas falsch mache“.

Leider ist diese Haltung kein guter Ratgeber, da die Beachtung des Themas vom Gesetzgeber immer größer wird. Trotz der großen Gefahren, die in klein- und mittelständischen sowie großen Unternehmen lauern, werden Probleme und Missstände erst behandelt, wenn es meist zu einem Schadenfall kommt.

Hinzu kommt, dass die gezielte Ausbildung eines Mitarbeiters (zum Brandschutzbeauftragten) nicht nur zeitliche Ressourcen in Anspruch nimmt, sondern auch eine Erhöhung der Ausgaben zur Folge hat. Neben einer Basisausbildung gehören Fortbildung und der Kauf von Richtlinien und Vorschriften zum Handwerkszeug.

Unser Plus:
Neben langjährigen Erfahrungen im Bereich des abwehrenden und vorbeugenden Brandschutzes richten wir unsere Maßnahmen nach den Vorstellungen unserer Kunden aus. Wir bieten ein umfassendes Leistungsportfolie (u.a. die Erstellung von Brandschutzordnungen, Flucht- und Rettungsplänen oder die Begleitung als Externer Brandschutzbeauftragter). Das Ziel ist immer die Erreichung der notwendigen Schutzzielen.

Wir freuen uns darauf Sie und Ihre Herausforderungen kennenzulernen. 

Weitere Links:
https://ks-brandschutzservice.de/impressum/
https://ks-brandschutzservice.de/datenschutz/

Description:
Pioneros en Seguridad del Hogar en Europa: En SUA Solutions, hemos desarrollado SUA Kitchen, el primer sistema europeo de extinción para el hogar. Nuestra tecnología avanzada está diseñada para actuar de manera precisa y eficiente en la primera fase de un posible incendio de sartén, aplicando la cantidad exacta de agente extintor necesario según el tipo de llama detectada.

 Tecnología Innovadora y Preventiva: Nuestro SUA Kitchen va más allá de la extinción de incendios. Es un dispositivo inteligente que recopila datos en tiempo real, diferenciando posibles flambeados de fuegos de sartén en progresión. Esta capacidad de discernimiento permite una actuación rápida y precisa, minimizando riesgos y daños.

 Comprometidos con la Seguridad Familiar: Entendemos la importancia de un hogar seguro, especialmente para personas mayores o dependientes. Por eso, nuestro sistema no solo extingue fuegos, sino que también realiza un análisis de los hábitos en la cocina, detectando posibles accidentes y enviando alertas a familiares a través de nuestra aplicación.

 Conectividad y Facilidad de Uso: El SUA Kitchen no requiere conexión WiFi, funcionando con un sistema interno de transmisión de datos 24/7. Su instalación es sencilla, sin necesidad de obras, y cuenta con una batería interna de larga duración, asegurando protección continua.

Name: Związek Ochotniczych Straży Pożarnych Rzeczypospolitej Polskiej
Description:
Związek Ochotniczych Straży Pożarnych Rzeczypospolitej Polskiej jest ogólnopolskim, samorządnym, trwałym stowarzyszeniem, które zrzesza Ochotnicze Straże Pożarne i inne osoby prawne w celu reprezentowania ich interesów oraz propagowania i realizacji celów statutowych.
Związek jest kontynuatorem chlubnych tradycji ruchu strażackiego wyrażających się w niesieniu bezinteresownej pomocy ludziom i służeniu Ojczyźnie.

Związek wykonuje zadania o charakterze użyteczności publicznej w zakresie ochrony przeciwpożarowej, wspiera różnorodne formy pracy kulturalno-oświatowej, popularyzuje dorobek historyczny ruchu strażackiego, rozwija działalność artystyczną i sportową w Ochotniczych Strażach Pożarnych.

Związek działa na podstawie ustawy z dnia 7 kwietnia 1989 r. – Prawo o stowarzyszeniach (Dz.U. Nr 20 poz. 104 ze zm.) ustawy z dnia 24 sierpnia 1991 r. O ochronie przeciwpożarowej (Dz. U. Nr 81, poz 351 ze zm.) oraz własnego statutu.

Celem Związku jest w szczególności:

działanie na rzecz ochrony życia, zdrowia i mienia przed pożarami, klęskami żywiołowymi i zagrożeniami ekologicznymi lub innymi miejscowymi zagrożeniami,
rzecznictwo i reprezentowanie członków Związku wobec organów administracji publicznej,
wykonywanie zadań z zakresu ochrony przeciwpożarowej zleconych przez organy administracji publicznej,
współtworzenie i opiniowanie aktów normatywnych dotyczących ochrony przeciwpożarowej,
działanie na rzecz ochrony środowiska,
informowanie o występujących zagrożeniach pożarowych i innych zagrożeniach miejscowych oraz sposobach im zapobiegania,
rozwijanie i upowszechnianie działalności kulturalnej,
rozwijanie i krzewienie kultury fizycznej i sportu,
organizowanie pożarniczego i obronnego wychowania dzieci i młodzieży.

Our leadership team’s active involvement in the Fire Protection Association Australia (FPAA) and Facility Managers Association (FMA) provides unparalleled networking opportunities, positioning us to lead in industry best practices and drive business growth.

What We Do
Fire Maintenance Contracts
Providing routine inspections, compliance assurance, and expert maintenance to keep properties safe and compliant.

Electrical Services
Delivering high-quality electrical installations and maintenance with safety and reliability at the forefront.

Indigenous Consultation
Helping businesses progress their Reconciliation Action Plans (RAPs) through expert guidance and meaningful partnerships.

Construction/Fit-Out Works
Specializing in small to medium projects with a blend of technical skill and cultural insight.

VR Cultural Education (Feature Service)
Beyond fire safety and electrical solutions, Yerta Services offers a unique VR cultural education experience, meticulously designed to educate and engage users with Kaurna culture, traditions, and teachings.

Project Highlight:
One of our standout VR packages immerses participants in Kaurna culture. Using VR headsets, participants virtually step onto Kaurna land, guided by Kaurna elders through significant cultural sites, storytelling sessions

We know that you strive to provide customers with quality food at a great value. We promise to do the same for you! You can be confident we will deliver on this promise. We are ISO 9001 quality certified, have offices nationwide, at the best price point. When your hoods are fitted with the ISC certificate the fire marshals and health departments know it is fully up to code.

Our certified technicians service thousands of kitchens from Corner Bakery, McDonald’s to the U.S. White House. We operate differently from other hood cleaners. We don’t use subcontractors. En Gasscoin, nuestro compromiso se basa en valores sólidos: integridad, comunicación abierta, liderazgo con el ejemplo y un enfoque en la excelencia. Name: Brandschutz Claus GmbH
Description:
Brandgefahren gibt es überall, im privaten Umfeld, unterwegs und natürlich im Betrieb. Wir unterstützen Sie bei der Umsetzung des Brandschutzes in Ihrem Unternehmen – zielorientiert, wirtschaftlich und individuell. Wir arbeiten mit Kunden aus unterschiedlichen Branchen zusammen – Schwerpunkte sind Handwerk, Bau und Industrie. Unser Portfolio umfasst alle vorbeugenden und abwehrenden Maßnahmen des Brandschutzes. Die Kooperation mit unserem Schwesterunternehmen CMC Claus Ingenieurgesellschaft mbH ermöglicht es uns unter anderem, komplette Brandschutznachweise und Brandschutzkonzepte zu Ihren Bauanträgen zu entwickeln und externe Brandschutzbeauftragte zu stellen.

No matter the difficulty, we will do your work to the excellence you demand and deserve.

The main purpose of passive fire protection is to stop the spread of fire and smoke within a fire compartment of a building that has been divided up into manageable areas of risk for a specified amount of time. This typically ranges from 30 minutes to 4 hours, in order to give occupants time to flee and give firefighters access to the area in a safe manner.

For the public and private sectors, we offer fire compartmentation surveys, fire door installation, and fire protection services.

Name: Xpyro
Description:
GLOBE IN ON FIRE !!!
XPYRO has developed a firefighting substance called PREFIREX, which is spayed on the ground as a chemical firebreak to prevent forest and wildfires from spreading further. PREFIREX is a non-toxic, eco-friendly, cost-effective firefighting substance for firefighters to combat forest and wildfires.
 
Benefits of Xpyro firefighting substance PREFIREX
• Makes sprayed area non-flammable
• Non-toxic and environmentally friendly (PH=7)
• Do not cause harmful emissions to the climate
• Maintains fire resistance on the ground for up to several weeks
• The substance is water-soluble and when it rains, it turns into fertilizer in the soil
 
Xpyro PREFIREX can be used:
•Firefighting forest and ground fires
•Protecting army infrastructures (military training areas, testing grounds, explosive storage areas)
•Protecting critical infrastructures (power plants, houses, buildings, critical areas like airports) and national borders
•Protecting agriculture and farming areas

Also, insurance companies are commonly a part of the fire-related ecosystem and are thus interested in solutions that will reduce the risks that humankind can cause.
 
References:
The Finnish Defense Forces and Emergency Service Academy Finland tested and qualified for the Xpyro's PREFIREX substances.

Our Expertise

Our reactive coatings are engineered to offer superior fire resistance. These coatings expand when exposed to heat, forming an insulating barrier that protects structural elements, slows the spread of fire, and gives occupants crucial extra time to evacuate safely.

We specialise in the installation and inspection of firestopping systems that seal penetrations and gaps in fire-rated walls, floors, and ceilings. Our solutions prevent the spread of fire, smoke, and toxic gases through building compartments, ensuring comprehensive containment and improved building integrity.

Name: Motto Fire
Description:
Motto Fire Ltd. – Your Trusted Partner in Firestopping Solutions

At Motto Fire, we specialize in providing high-quality firestopping products designed to prevent the spread of fire and smoke in buildings. Our products play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity of fire-rated walls, floors, and ceilings, ensuring that fire is contained, giving occupants more time to evacuate safely, and limiting damage to the structure.

Our Products
Fire-Resistant Sealants
MottoSeal and MottoMastic used to seal the gaps around joints and penetrations to prevent fire and smoke from spreading.

Firestopping Mortars
Ideal for larger openings, our MottoCompound creates a fire-resistant barrier in walls and floors, ensuring compartmentation is maintained.

Fire-Rated Batts
Used for enclosures and structural protection, our MottoBatt provides excellent fire resistance for a variety of applications.

Collars and Wraps
MottoCollar and MottoWrap designed for use around pipes and cables, our collars and wraps expand during a fire to seal off openings and prevent fire from spreading through penetrations.

Commitment to Quality
All our products are rigorously tested and certified to meet international fire safety standards. We work closely with contractors, engineers, and fire safety professionals to provide solutions that ensure compliance with building regulations and deliver long-lasting performance.

Technical Support
We don’t just provide products — we offer technical support to help you choose the right firestopping solutions for your specific needs. Whether it's installation advice or compliance queries, our expert team is here to assist you.

Why Choose Motto Fire?
-Innovative, Certified Products
-Commitment to Fire Safety
-Technical Expertise and Support
-Customer-Centric Solutions

Name: brandveiligdossier.nl
Description:
Als vastgoedeigenaar of beheerder weet u hoe belangrijk brandveiligheid is. Toch komen bij inspecties, verhuur of verbouwingen vaak onverwachte risico’s aan het licht. Brandveiligdossier voorkomt verrassingen met een structurele aanpak van brandveiligheidsbeheer.

Wij werken aanvullend op uw bestaande beheeromgeving, brengen vakinhoudelijke expertise in en zorgen voor een continu proces. Onze dienstverlening bestaat uit de volgende modules:

- Volledige inspectie (0-meting)
Een uitgebreide analyse van het pand – inclusief bureauonderzoek én fysieke inspectie – op bouwkundige, installatietechnische en organisatorische aspecten van brandveiligheid.

- Jaarlijkse controle
Een (half)jaarlijkse visuele inspectie van algemene ruimtes en verkeersroutes, met steekproeven boven plafonds en controle van onderhoudsrapportages.

- Maandelijks (dossier)toezicht
Maandelijkse beoordeling van onderhoudsrapportages en advies aan de beheerder. Alles wordt centraal gearchiveerd in de gewenste (online) omgeving.

- Verbouwingstoezicht
Toetsing van bouwplannen en controle tijdens én na de verbouwing om de brandveiligheid te borgen.

Met Brandveiligdossier blijft u aantoonbaar in controle – vandaag én morgen.

Name: Adams County Fire Rescue
Description:
Adams County Fire Rescue is designated as a special district in the state of Colorado and provides an all-hazard incident response, community risk reduction, fire prevention, and fire investigations in the north Denver metropolitan area. The district's overnight population is 68,500, with an estimated daytime population of over 250,000, including commuters and the industrial workforce.
We respond to over 12,000 calls annually from four stations. The service area is considered urban, with a mix of commercial and residential occupancies, and includes over 128 lane miles of interstate and state highways.
Our front-line apparatus consists of three type one engines, one truck company, four advanced life support medic transport units, a hazardous material unit, heavy rescue, two type six brush trucks, one type three engine, a Safety and Medical Officer unit, and one Battalion Chief unit.
The department also has a full-service training center with a Class A burn facility, tower, and multiple training props, including the IAFF fire ground survival training trailer.
Special services include technical rescue (Colorado Task Force-1), wildland, hazmat, honor guard, fire prevention, community outreach, peer support and wellness, and arson investigations. 
ACFR is governed by a publicly elected Board of Directors comprised of five members. The board oversees the budget and approves policy.

Name: Whiteland Fire Department
Description:
Mission Statement:
The mission of the Whiteland Fire Department is to provide exceptional public service and incident mitigation to the local and surrounding communities. This is done through ongoing training, staffing, prevention, and education while keeping up with the changing demands of the growing communities that we serve.

About:
The Whiteland Fire Department was established in 1954 as a volunteer fire department. Whiteland has had a fire department serving much longer before this. The fire department served as a volunteer only fire department until merging under the town of Whiteland in June of 2016. This merger allowed the Town of Whiteland to take oversight of the department. In 2020 the fire department staff all officially became Town of Whiteland employees with around the clock staffing for the fire department.

The Whiteland Fire Department serves not only the incorporated areas of the Town of Whiteland but serves unincorporated areas of the old Whiteland Fire Protection District. Serving a population over 6000 within a service area of over 20 square miles , the Whiteland Fire Department is a full mitigation agency responding to fire, EMS, rescue, HAZMAT, and other calls for service. The fire department has 1 Primary Engine, 1 Reserve Engine, 1 Ladder Truck, 1 Heavy Rescue, 1 Tanker Truck, 1 Squad, 3 Staff Officer Vehicles, 2 Support Vehicles, and 1 MERV all housed from our only station.

ISO Class:
The Whiteland Fire Department currently holds an ISO rating of 5/5Y. The ISO rating is used by insurance providers to determine homeowners and businesses insurance rates. Every few years the fire department undergoes a review of apparatus, staffing, water supply, training, equipment, and communications systems to either maintain our current rating or to improve to a better rating resulting in better rates for our community.

Name: Brandschutz Jäger GmbH - Sachverständigenbüro für vorbeugenden Brandschutz
Description:
In Deutschland wird jedes Jahr ein Vermögen von mehreren Milliarden Euro durch Brände und Brandrauch vernichtet. In gewerblichen und industriellen Betrieben stellt die Brandgefahr eine ernste Bedrohung dar. Für den Brandschutz ist der Unternehmer verantwortlich. Zwar vermag eine Feuer- und Betriebsunterbrechungsversicherung den materiellen Wert auszugleichen, schwerer wiegen jedoch häufig solch nicht ersetzbaren Verluste wie Leben, Gesundheit, Verlust von Aufträgen, Marktanteilen oder Kunden.

Die Brandgefahr im Betrieb kann durch vorbeugende Brandschutzmaßnahmen wirksam begegnet werden.

Für diese wichtigen brandschutzrelevanten Aufgaben stehen wir Ihnen als kompetenter Partner zur Seite. Unser Leistungsspektrum umfasst neben der Gestellung eines externen Brandschutzbeauftragten, auch die Brandschutzunterweisung Ihrer Mitarbeiter, Ausbildung zu Brandschutzhelfern und das Erstellen brandschutzrelevanter Pläne. 
Gerne werden wir Sie fachgerecht beraten und Ihnen ein individuelles Angebot erstellen.

Daniel Jäger

Name: Great Lakes Fire Consulting & Engineering Group
Description:
At Great Lakes Fire Consulting & Engineering, we help protect what matters most—people, property, and peace of mind. As trusted experts in Fire Safety Plans, Fire Protection Systems, and Integrated Systems Testing (CAN/ULC S1001), we work with building owners, developers, property managers, and facility operators to deliver code-compliant, reliable fire protection solutions.

From design through to implementation and testing, our team of engineers and fire safety professionals is committed to providing practical, actionable guidance. Whether you're building new, upgrading an existing system, or preparing for occupancy and inspection, we make sure every component of your fire and life safety strategy works together—seamlessly.

Our core services include:

 Fire Safety Plans – Tailored, site-specific plans that meet local and provincial code requirements while keeping your occupants safe and your operations inspection-ready.

 Fire Protection Systems – Design review, compliance consulting, and oversight to ensure your sprinklers, alarms, suppression systems, and fire pumps are properly specified, installed, and maintained.

 Integrated Systems Testing (CAN/ULC S1001) – Certified coordination and testing of interconnected fire and life safety systems, ensuring your entire building operates as a unified, code-compliant safety network.

We understand that fire safety isn’t just about meeting codes—it’s about making sure systems work when they’re needed most. That’s why we take a proactive, hands-on approach to every project, with clear communication and detailed documentation at every step.

Name: Five Plus Fire Protection Engineering
Description:
Five Plus Fire Protection Engineering provides code-compliant and performance-based Fire & Life Safety solutions, supporting architects, developers, and contractors with expert design and analysis. Our services include system design, code consulting, smoke control, CFD modeling, evacuation analysis, 
FivePlus Fire Protection Engineering is a UAE-based consultancy with 20 years of international experience in Fire and Life Safety, officially approved by Dubai Civil Defence and Dubai Municipality. We deliver innovative, code-compliant, and performance-based solutions across the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, the wider MENA region, and the USA.

Our expertise covers performance-based design, smoke control engineering, stairwell pressurization, atrium smoke exhaust calculations, evacuation and egress modeling, computational fire dynamics (CFD), fire risk assessments, hydraulic calculations, hazardous materials management, and foam system design. These services allow developers, architects, contractors, and building owners to achieve compliant, cost-effective, and authority-approved designs while protecting lives and assets.

We apply advanced fire modeling tools (FDS, Pathfinder, CONTAM) to simulate fire growth, smoke movement, and evacuation performance. Our studies include RSET/ASET comparisons, Fractional Effective Dose (FED) analysis, tenability assessments, and risk-informed strategies, delivering defensible reports that accelerate approvals from Dubai Civil Defence, Dubai Municipality, and other AHJs across the region.

Our projects span high-rise and mixed-use developments, commercial offices, healthcare, hospitality, education, industrial and logistics facilities, data centers, airports, and energy infrastructure. Whether through prescriptive design or performance-based solutions, we bridge architectural vision with rigorous fire and life safety compliance.

At FivePlus, we go beyond consulting — we deliver trusted engineering strategies, international code

Name: Regulation 38
Description:
Regulation 38 has been part of the Building Control requirements for many years. The purpose of Regulation 38 aims to ensure that information critical to the life safety of people using or working near the building in the event of a fire is communicated to the owner, occupier and/or end user, so that the building can be operated and managed correctly, not just at the stage of first construction but in the future.

The Regulation 38 App has been developed by fire safety industry experts to assist in enabling both contractors and the Responsible Person/s to meet their obligations under the Fire Safety Order and Building Regulations.

The App takes the user through steps to enable a report of information to be produced that will be clear and detailed. By following the questions and providing information where asked the report will be useful throughout the life of the building. It is important that when asked to input details that the information the user inputs is as detailed as possible. To be able to do this may require the user seeking further clarity from the relevant persons i.e., contractor, architect etc. the App has been developed to be used by persons who are competent in the requirements of building regulations and fire safety, to achieve this may require communication with 3rd parties.

Name: Anogas
Description:
Hydrogel represents a next-generation fire-suppression medium specifically developed for lithium-ion battery incidents. It combines:
•	High thermal stability
•	PFAS-free chemistry
•	Exceptional cooling efficiency
Its unique thermoresponsive gel-based structure adheres to battery surfaces, accelerating heat extraction and helping to prevent re-ignition or thermal-runaway escalation.

Hydrogel is also suitable for extinguishing Class A, B, and F fires, making it a versatile and powerful all-in-one extinguishing solution.

Hydrogel offers a more sustainable and higher-performing alternative to traditional foams or water-heavy suppression agents—reducing runoff and environmental impact while delivering excellent extinguishing results for:
•	Electric vehicles (EVs, E-bikes)
•	Stationary energy storage systems (ESS)
•	Battery production and recycling operations
•	Industrial environments with high battery usage
The Safest Fire-Extinguishing Agent in the World
Safe for the Environment
•	ZERO PFAS content
•	Proven non-toxic for the environment
•	Fully recyclable
Safe for Humans
•	Does not decompose into hazardous substances, unlike many conventional extinguishing agents
•	Non-hazardous to users and does not cause skin irritation
•	Despite being over 95% water, Hydrogel can be safely used on electrical equipment up to 1000 V when applied with suitable nozzle configurations

Practical Use and Application
•	Premix formulation (ready to use): Hydrogel is supplied as a fully premixed extinguishing agent, requiring no dilution or on-site preparation.
•	Temperature requirement: It can only be applied at ambient temperatures above 0°C.

Production & Supply
Hydrogel is produced in The Netherlands under strict quality-control standards.
We supply Hydrogel in:
•	1000-liter IBCs
•	300-liter IBCs
•	25-liter jerrycans
This allows flexible use across industrial, professional, and OEM applications.

Certified Performance – KIWA NTA 8133 - Apragaz EN3-7

Name: Genefire India
Description:
GENEFIRE has been developing aerosol fire suppression systems for over 30 years. The basic concept orginated from rocket fuel technology so, in a sense, we are fighting fire with fire. 

GeneFire fire suppression systems use advanced aerosol technology to quickly and effectively suppress and extinguish fires. The system houses an aerosol generating composition (AGC) which is a proprietary mixture of chemicals. An ignition device (electrical, thermal or mechanical) is used to start the combustion process to produce aerosol which contains certain particles that separate oxygen from the fuel.

Name: Steel Fire
Description:
Steel Fire Equipment is a Canadian manufacturer and wholesaler of ULC listed recharge chemical and replacement parts and accessories. Our customers are distributors and service companies that service or sell into the fire and life safety industries.

Have you heard of us? Have you seen our brand anywhere? No, and we like it that way. Unless we are required to, we do not splash our logo all over our products. We work behind the scenes to supply our network of service providers and OEMS with products and solutions that protect lives and property. 
If you have bought a Garrison or FOX40 brand fire extinguisher from Canadian Tire, our chemical is in it. When you see all the extinguishers at airports, homes, gas stations, malls, condos, office towers, vehicles, there is a good chance that in the life of that extinguisher, our dry chemical powder is inside.
We have been manufacturing dry chemical powder in Canada since 1984. We have just finished building the most state-of-the-art fire extinguisher dry powder manufacturing facility in the world. This facility allows us to grow with our customers demand and maintain our competitiveness in the global market. We are in a great position as we have more demand than we can supply with our current staff. 
Our culture reflects our family business heritage. 
•	Family is important. We respect and are flexible to the needs of our staff, many of whom have been with us for over 20 years. 
•	We view our customers and vendors as partners with hundreds of relationships that go back over 40 years.
•	We are personal with our customers. When you call you get a person and not a machine. 
•	For many of our customers we are their largest or key supplier. From people to systems and process design, we are focused on delivering Wow.
•	We play the long game where decisions are made to maximize the customer experience and not the transaction.

Name: Herbertsville Fire Company
Description:
Welcome to the Official LinkedIn Page of the Herbertsville Fire Company No. 1! Established in 1936 by a dedicated group of local volunteers, our company was formed to meet the critical need for fire protection in the northern part of Brick Township. 

Herbertsville Fire Company No. 1 is proudly composed of community members who volunteer their time and expertise to serve and protect the lives and property of the Herbertsville section and the broader Brick Township, home to approximately 70,000 residents. Our members respond to emergencies and undergo rigorous training without any compensation – no salaries, no hourly rates, just a commitment to keeping our community safe.

Our fleet consists of 10 specialized vehicles, including a Heavy Rescue Truck, a Tower Ladder, two Engines, a Rescue Engine, a Utility Truck, two Wildland (Brush) Trucks, a Boat, and a Chief vehicle. Additionally, we maintain a 1941 Ford/Hale, an antique piece of our history, which is reserved for ceremonial occasions like funerals, parades, and firetruck shows.

In addition to our fire protection services, we offer two banquet halls – Havens Hall and Osborn Hall – complete with a full industrial kitchen, available for rent for your special events.

If you're interested in joining our ranks and making a difference in the community, please email us at recruitment@brickfire.org or call 732-458-9164.

For Hall Rentals, contact our Hall Rental Committee at 732-458-9017 or email hfchall@brickfire.org.

Az Ön biztonsága a mi küldetésünk 

A Smokeless Building Control System Kft. 2007 óta működik megújult formában, bővített tevékenységi körrel, a legkülönbözőbb kihívásokra kész megoldásokkal. Folyamatosan képzett szerelő csapataink garantálják, hogy a végzett munkák minden esetben megfeleljenek a törvényi előírásoknak és a velünk kötött szerződésekben rögzített határidőknek.

Az ország egész területét lefedve, maradéktalanul és a legjobb tudásunk szerint kielégítjük megrendelőink minden igényét, legyen szó viharkárról, téves nyitásról vagy épülettűzről. A felmerülő feladatokat és problémákat a lehető legrövidebb idő alatt megoldjuk, hiszen a hő- és füstelvezető rendszerek létfontosságú életvédelmi eszközök.

Megrendelőink változó és folyamatosan bővülő igényeit mindig szem előtt tartjuk, és ennek érdekében folyamatos piackutatást és piacbővítést végezünk. Az adott feladathoz leginkább megfelelő, költséghatékony megoldások kialakításával védjük ügyfeleink érdekeit.

Folyamatosan bővítjük beszállítóink körét, hogy megfelelő ár-érték arányt biztosíthassunk. Visszajelzéseik alapján új konstrukciókkal és lehetőségekkel bővítjük kínálatunkat, így partnereink mindig a legmodernebb és legmegbízhatóbb megoldások közül választhatnak.

Name: ECOFE.co.uk
Description:
ECOFE provides eco-friendly fire prevention and suppression solutions for organisations that need proven protection without environmental compromise.

The Problem We Solve
Many organisations are under increasing pressure to improve safety, compliance, and sustainability at the same time. Traditional fire protection systems can be toxic, environmentally damaging, costly to clean up, and misaligned with modern ESG commitments.
ECOFE exists to bridge that gap, delivering effective fire safety solutions that protect people, assets, and the environment.

What We Do
We design and supply advanced fire prevention technology and suppression solutions for commercial buildings, infrastructure, industrial environments, transport, and wildfire-risk locations.
Our systems are engineered to meet real-world operational demands while supporting sustainability goals, environmental compliance, and risk reduction strategies.

Why Organisations Choose ECOFE
ECOFE’s unique approach combines high-performance fire suppression with environmentally responsible innovation:

Biodegradable, non-toxic fire suppression agents

All-class fire suppression suitable for multiple risk scenarios

Wildfire protection solutions for critical infrastructure and high-risk areas

Reduced clean-up, minimal downtime, and lower environmental impact

Supports ESG reporting, sustainability frameworks, and regulatory expectations

The Commercial Advantage
By replacing traditional chemical-based systems, ECOFE helps organisations:

Reduce environmental and reputational risk

Lower clean-up and recovery costs after incidents

Align fire safety with sustainability and ESG strategies

Demonstrate leadership in responsible fire protection

ECOFE works with forward-thinking organisations that want fire safety solutions designed for today’s environmental and regulatory realities

Wir sind ein modernes Unternehmen, welches am Markt als Komplettanbieter im Brandschutzbereich mit dem Schwerpunkt Löschwassertechnik sowie Wartung und Instandhaltung seit 2013 tätig ist.

Dies bedeutet, dass wir von der Planung, über die Ausführung (Lieferung und/oder Montage), bis hin zur erfolgreichen Inbetriebnahme und Sachverständigenabnahme alles aus einer Hand anbieten.

Seit vielen Jahren gilt Stein Brandschutz als eine verlässliche Größe in diesen Bereichen.
Im Jahre 2019 wurde die Firma Heine Feuerschutz GmbH übernommen, um auch für die Zukunft die richtigen Weichen zu stellen und einem stetigen Wachstum und der Weiterentwicklung des Unternehmens sorge zu tragen.
Dadurch vertrauen mittlerweile mehr als 3000 deutsche und internationale Unternehmen als zufriedene Kunden auf unsere Zuverlässigkeit und Kompetenz, sowie der Qualität unserer Produkte.

Name: Q-pip ltd
Description:
Q-pip is revolutionising building management and safety, changing the way that Housing Associations, Local Authorities and private owners collate, manage and share building risk information in a simple to use, flexible platform that will enable you to evolve with the ever-changing environment of building safety whilst enabling first responders to gain instant secure access to this information when they need it the most.

Following the recent changes in the Fire Safety act 2021 and the introduction of the Fire safety (England) regulations 2022, Q-pip will enable building management and safety to remain dynamic and evolve in this changing climate, whilst providing a sustainable and environmentally friendly platform.

Imagine being able to access your flexible building platform portfolio 24 hrs a day and having all your resident, safety and compliance information in one accessible place. This up-to-date information will then be instantly available on demand when time can be a critical factor to response.

How much easier would it be to ensure your building was compliant and ultimately your residents were safe?
Your unique platform gives your team, customers and key stakeholders – such as the Fire and Rescue service – instant access to the key risk information of your property – from any connected device via our unique App in real time.
This ensures instant access is available when time is a critical factor to resident safety and ensures an accurate, safe and secure platform is available.

As data is updated, Q-pip stores these changes enabling instant access in real time directly at the source of the building enabling first responders and key stakeholders to access up to date, accurate risk information instantly.
This information can be self-managed at any time 24hrs a day to enable responsible building owners to manage their own information dynamically as the environment changes.

Name: Gerrittsen Beach Volunteer Fire Department
Description:
Founded in 1922, the Gerrittsen Beach VFD & Ambulance Corps is Brooklyn’s only volunteer fire service, dedicated to safeguarding the Gerrittsen Beach community. Established after a major fire demonstrated the need for local emergency services, our department has evolved significantly, now responding to over 500 calls annually with a fleet of four emergency vehicles.

Services: We provide Basic Life Support, Engine Company operations, and Brush Fire response, equipped with the latest in emergency technology.

Community Engagement: The department has long been a community hub, hosting events, meetings, and training sessions. Historical activities like carnivals and contests have strengthened community bonds and promoted safety awareness.

Milestones: In 1932, Mayor John F. O’Brien recognized us as a Fire Corporation, marking a pivotal expansion from a basic facility to a modern firehouse. In the 1970s, we became pioneers by integrating women into our ranks and establishing ourselves as a state-approved Emergency Services Training Center.

Innovation: We were among the first in NYC to acquire an Automatic External Defibrillator, demonstrating our commitment to advanced lifesaving technology.

Looking Ahead: As we build on our legacy of over 100 years, our mission remains focused on responsive and professional emergency service, community safety, and continuous advancement.

Join Us: Become a part of our tradition of service and community commitment

ABC mühendislik, yangın algılama ve söndürme sistemlerinin anahtar teslim kurulumunun yanı sıra, satışını yaptığı ekipmanların montajı için ihtiyaç duyulan süpervizörlük hizmetini de uluslararası norm ve standartlarda yapar.

Montaj işlemleri tamamlanmış olan yangın algılama ve söndürme sistemlerinin ilgili standartlara göre test senaryoları çıkartılarak, belirlenen kriterlere göre uzman mühendisler tarafından farklı senaryolar çerçevesinde fonksiyon testleri yapılarak, sistemlerin doğru şekilde çalışır halde teslim işlemi gerçekleştirilir. Uluslararası kuruluşlarca onaylanmış test senaryoları; sistemlerin yalnızca fonksiyonlarını değil, yangın anında sistemin çalışmasını engelleyecek ihtimalleri de kapsamaktadır.
Endüstriyel tesislerde gerek firmamız tarafından kurulmuş, gerekse farklı firmalar tarafından farkı ürünlerle kurulmuş olan yangın algılama ve söndürme sistemlerinin uzun yıllar sorunsuz ve verimli bir şekilde çalışabilmesi için EN54 – UL/ULC uygun olarak uygun takvim ve raporlamalar çerçevesinde periyodik bakım, gerektiği hallerde tamir ve/veya parça değişme işlemleri, test, iyileştirme konusunda hizmet verilmektedir.

Name: Metodos.eu
Description:
The Metodos fire testing concept is an innovative approach developed in Norway to improve the efficiency and sustainability of fire testing for safety-critical objects. Here's a breakdown of the concept:

Two-Step Approach
Step 1: Testing Passive Fire Protection (PFP) Materials

Large-Scale Fire Test: PFP materials are tested under current standards without the actual object requiring protection.
Response Curve: This test generates a response curve, essentially the "DNA" of the PFP system, which is reused in Step 2.
Step 2: Testing Actual Objects

Controlled Furnace: The response curve from Step 1 is replicated inside a computer-controlled, electrically fueled furnace.
Object Testing: The actual object needing PFP is tested, capturing the heat sink effect and monitoring when the object breaks down or reaches its limiting temperature.
Benefits
Efficiency: Faster and more cost-effective than traditional methods.
Accuracy: Improved precision in testing results.
Sustainability: Significantly reduced carbon footprint compared to traditional fire testing methods12.
Applications
The Metodos methodology is versatile and can be applied to various safety-critical components such as cables, steel pipework, fireboxes, actuators, emergency shutdown valves (ESDVs), flanges, and valves1.

This approach is fully approved and supported by DNV (Det Norske Veritas), ensuring reliable and sustainable results for companies dealing in passive fire protection1.
