Name: Hephaestus Fire Solutions
Description:
At Hephaestus Solutions, we believe fire preparedness isn’t optional—it’s essential. Our mission was born out of a night we’ll never forget.

In the summer of 2024, the Kantou wildfire was burning through the nearby forest, heading straight toward our village of Souni. As smoke filled the sky and flames approached the pine forests surrounding our homes, we stood there helpless without equipment, without training, without a plan.

That night changed everything.
We made a decision: we would never again face wildfire unprepared—and we would help others do the same.

From that moment, we committed ourselves to learning, researching, and building. To truly understand how we could make a difference, we traveled to the Intersec Fire Expo in Dubai, one of the world’s leading exhibitions for fire safety and civil protection. There, we met with industry experts, explored the latest innovations, and built vital relationships with global manufacturers.

But most importantly, we educated ourselves on what works, what fails, and what’s truly needed when every second counts.

Today, Hephaestus delivers portable fire pumps, high-pressure hoses, wildfire defense kits, and CE-certified firefighting equipment designed to protect homes, businesses, and communities. Beyond equipment, we focus on training, community support, and tailored fire defense strategies, ensuring that people have both the tools and the knowledge to act when disaster strikes.

Our vision is to become a leader in wildfire defense and fire safety across the EU and beyond, safeguarding not only property but lives and the natural environment.

Hephaestus Specialties include:
Wildfire Protection Systems · Portable Fire Pumps · Domestic Fire Safety · CE-Certified Fire Equipment · Emergency Preparedness Solutions · Petrol & Diesel Fire Pumps · Fire Suppression Accessories · Forest & Rural Fire Defense · EU Compliance & Certification Support · Disaster Response Equipment

Be ready. Stay safe.

Name: Moline Fire Department
Description:
The mission of the Moline Fire Department is to promote, protect, and improve the health, safety, and welfare of the residents of our community.

The Moline Fire Department runs out of 4 stations with 3 Engines, 1 Truck, 2 Ambulances, and a Command in service protecting the residents and visitors of Moline, IL on a daily basis. We provide Advanced Life Support Services with all of our apparatus'. We also provide fire suppression, Technical Rescue, HAZMAT, and Peer Support services to the City. Our community has also built a Mutual Aid agreement and in doing so we help protect our surrounding communities as well

The Moline Fire Department provides fire prevention and education to the general public throughout the year.  This includes presentations and tours for elementary schools (as well as other classes when requested), Girl and Boy Scout troops, churches, and many other organizations.  Fire inspections and education are provided to owners of new or existing buildings to ensure fire safety.

Name: The Excelsior Fire District
Description:
The Excelsior Fire District is comprised of the cities of Deephaven, Excelsior, Greenwood, Shorewood, and Tonka Bay. The Excelsior Fire District has two fire stations located in Deephaven and Shorewood. Our service area is 14+ square miles and 18,000 residents.

The Excelsior Fire District was formed in 1891 and has evolved from a bucket brigade to today's most advanced fire suppression tactics.

The District has over 40 firefighters who respond to over 1,000 calls for service every year.  The calls include fire suppression, emergency medical assistance, water and ice rescue, vehicle crashes, and hazardous materials control/mitigation. 

Our resources include two fully staffed Fire Stations, a 107ft Ladder truck, two Engines/Pumpers, a Pumper/Tanker, a Heavy Rescue vehicle, a light rescue vehicle, two ATVs, one grass rig/light rescue vehicle, a Life Safety/Hazmat Trailer, a rescue/fire suppression boat, and an assortment of command/staff vehicles. We provide comprehensive training for new firefighters and weekly on-going training for all members in fire suppression and emergency medical assistance.

If you are interested in learning more about becoming a firefighter with The Excelsior Fire District, please go to our website for all the details and contact information. We are currently accepting applications. We welcome you to join the team!

Name: GlobalENCLEA
Description:
First developed & approved Aqueous Non-Conductive Fire Extinguisher

Provided is an aqueous fire extinguishing agent, and more particularly, an aqueous fire extinguishing agent, which includes a non-electrolyte material, as anti-freezing agent, a silicone surfactant, and water and is adaptable to electrical fires.

The aqueous fire extinguishing agent of the present invention is applicable to electrical fires and thus can effectively replace conventional powder fire extinguishers or gas-based fire extinguishers, and is eco-friendly in that it is harmless to the human body, and the environment does not cause secondary pollution due to powder or gas after use.
(Quoted from Abstract of "US's Patent (US11,786,772 B2)" registered.)

Name: Baiamonte Fire Protection and Plans Review Services
Description:
We have about 20 years of experience in the Fire and Life Safety field. Our desire is to help streamline the Fire and Life Safety plans review process. We are also able to provide third party inspections for hood suppression, sprinkler, and alarm systems. We offer commercial site review including fire sprinkler and water lines, hydrant, PIV, FDC, and fire pump locations. 
With our years experience, we know the issues and time lost with incomplete or uncompliant plans. Our goal is to assist you with getting your plans reviewed and approved as accurately and quickly as possible. The average turn around time for plans approval with most local jurisdictions is anywhere from 2-4 weeks, which means plans that are not compliant can cost you a month or more. If they are submitted correctly the first time we are able to save time and money for our clients. 
We are also in devolvement of an app to help reviewers and designers double check math which has saved us hours of review time for calculations and plan review. We believe that this tool will help change the reviewer process for local and state agencies.   
Our lead reviewer/founder sits or sat on the following boards/committees:
-The Department of Community Affairs Committee Task Force
-2025 International Fuel Gas Code Task Force Chairman
-2024 State Codes Advisory Committee Task force
-2024 International Building Code Task Force
-2018 International Building Code Task Force
-2018 International Fuel Gas Code Task Force Co-Chairman
-2018 State Codes Advisory Committee Task force
-2018 International Existing Building subcommittee
-2018 International Property Maintenance Code subcommittee
-2022 Energy, Residential and Building subcommittee.
-2022 Plumbing, Mechanical and Fuel Gas subcommittee
- Also wrote the Georgia state amendments to the 2024 International Building Code Chapter 9. 
He also worked with The Guardian Center in Perry, GA as an Instructor-Independent Contractor to teach the Saudi government how to review plans

We are also authorized dealers for various extinguisher types including:  ABC Dry Chemical, BC Dry Chemical, Purple K Dry Chemical (including hi-flow types that are required for 3 dimensional fires, obstacle fires, and pressurized fuel fires), Halotron I, FE-36 Clean Agent, and Water Mist (for sensitive areas such as communication and data rooms and paper archives), AR-AFFF Foam (for hydrocarbon fuel and polar solvent fires and spills), K-Class wet chemical (for cooking areas), D Class Extinguishers (for combustible metals), Pressurized water, and CO2.
 
We stock spare parts for most major brands and can return discharged units to service quickly. We will pick up and drop off within Jackson County and have spares available to ensure that you are not without coverage.

CFS can perform your required fire extinguisher, sprinkler system, kitchen hood suppression system, and fire alarm panel inspections.

Name: Prymos GmbH
Description:
Die Prymos GmbH ist ein modernes innovatives Unternehmen mit Sitz in Langen, Deutschland. Als Spezialist für Brandschutzprodukte haben wir seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2013 innovative Lösungen entwickelt, um Menschen und ihr Eigentum vor den Gefahren des Feuers zu schützen.

Unser Hauptaugenmerk liegt auf der Gewährleistung von hoher Qualität und Sicherheit für unsere Produkte. Aus diesem Grund arbeiten wir eng mit Experten und Prüfstellen zusammen, um regelmäßige Überprüfungen durchzuführen und die geltenden Sicherheitsstandards zu erfüllen.

Aktuell konzentrieren wir uns bei Prymos auf zwei Hauptproduktlinien: wartungsfreie Feuerlöscher und Feuerlöschsprays. Unsere 10 Jahre wartungsfreien Feuerlöscher bieten eine zuverlässige und effektive Lösung für den Brandschutz. Sie sind einfach zu bedienen und erfordern keine regelmäßige Wartung, was sowohl Unternehmen als auch Privatkunden zu schätzen wissen.

Zusätzlich zu unseren Feuerlöschern bieten wir auch Feuerlöschsprays an, die eine praktische Alternative darstellen. Mit ihrer kompakten Größe und Benutzerfreundlichkeit eignen sie sich ideal für den Einsatz zur Bekämpfung von Entstehungsbränden in Unternehmen und privat Haushalten.

Bei Prymos streben wir stets danach, innovative und qualitativ hochwertige Produkte anzubieten, um den Schutz vor Bränden zu verbessern. Unser engagiertes Team arbeitet kontinuierlich an neuen Lösungen und bleibt stets am Puls der Zeit, um den Bedürfnissen unserer Kunden gerecht zu werden.

Name: Black Jack Fire Protection District
Description:
The Black Jack Fire Protection District was established in 1929 and was formerly known as the Black Jack Fire Prevention Organization. This organization developed out of an immediate need for a local fire district to serve the community. A devastating fire at the Schladerbach house led to a late response from nearby fire stations; unfortunately, the home was destroyed when volunteers arrived to suppress the flames.

Community leader John E. Wohldmann led the initiative for the new fire district. The first Black Jack firehouse was constructed behind Hartwig’s Saloon and General Store. As the Black Jack community grew, the District expanded its locations to include three firehouses. The Fire District’s service area also increased; the District’s reach now includes areas of Florissant, Dellwood, and portions of unincorporated North County.

Name: International Fog Inc.
Description: International Fog Inc (IFI) is focused of producing superior application driven products for the fire industry.  Using engineering and innovation, while supplying complementing, informative, and solution driven services to our customers we have developed a more efficient fire suppression nozzle. The Deluge-Tech nozzles use the patented IFI fog and rotor technology. Working with a new apparatus developed by Custom Spray Solutions at the University of Maryland design changes were made to optimize the spray pattern and droplet size for a more effective suppression nozzle. With the knowledge gained from data collected by the apparatus a series of new nozzles were developed that are more efficient, not wasting the water in one area and leaving other areas void of water. The nozzle design results in an even distribution of the desired water droplet size and design density for a given application. The efficient use of water results in wider coverage areas and more flexible designs saving money on both installation and maintenance while maintaining system capabilities. These nozzles can be purchased individually or a complete design quote can be completed by a Professional Fire Protection Engineer at the customer's request.  Please explore our website to learn more about our development process and the nozzle technology.  If you have a unique application please feel free to contact us and we will assist you any way we can.

Name: FireXNull
Description: In the realm of fire safety, the emergence of a UL Certified, patented nano technology fire extinguisher signifies a major leap. This eco-friendly and non-conductive innovation revolutionizes fire suppression, especially for electrical fires, marrying effectiveness with environmental consciousness. It represents a new direction in ensuring safety while addressing ecological impacts.The heart of this breakthrough lies in nano technology's efficiency and speed in extinguishing fires. Unlike traditional methods that rely on chemicals, this approach utilizes nano-scale reactions for swift and targeted action. It's designed for broad applications, proving essential in modern safety strategies for both homes and industries, where its non-conductive nature is critical for protecting electronic equipment.The versatility of this extinguisher across various fire types highlights its indispensability. Moreover, its introduction underscores a commitment to sustainability, aligning fire safety with eco-friendly practices. This shift towards greener solutions mirrors a global trend towards reducing chemical use in fire suppression, paving the way for safer, more sustainable methods.This nano technology-based solution transcends traditional fire safety measures by offering a sophisticated, environmentally responsible approach. It not only tackles the immediate dangers of fires but also reflects a broader dedication to minimizing environmental footprints. This development marks a significant step forward, promising a future where safety and sustainability coexist.Embracing this innovation, the fire safety sector is set for transformation. This advancement not only raises protection standards against electrical fires but also champions a sustainable approach, setting a new benchmark in fire safety. It's a testament to the ongoing evolution of safety technologies, heralding a safer, greener future.

Name: Fire Cloak USA
Description:
Fire Cloak USA is an easy to use electric vehicle blanket that suppresses an EV fire buying time by containing the fire. These blankets help to protect surrounding property from damage. They also save time and thousands of gallons of water. 

Recently we tested the Fire Cloak USA on an EV fire. When the blanket was deployed, the temperature of the vehicle dropped 800 degrees in 45 seconds! Within 5 minutes of the blanket deployment, the fire department was able to remove the blanket, and extinguish the fire. 

As electric vehicle sales continue to grow we are seeing EV fires popping up across the country. These fires are extremely difficult to contain on average using 20,000-60,000 gallons of water to extinguish. They also typically take multiple fire departments and extended hours to resolve. 

You don't have to take our word for it! Visit www.firecloakusa.com to see our demonstration video and hear testimonial at the end of Fire Chief Joe Elam's thoughts on the blankets effectiveness. 

Who Needs an EV Fire Blanket? 
-Charging Stations
-Parking garages

-Fire Departments
-Towing Services
-Salvage Lots

Our challenge is to climb 110 floors, representing the height of the World Trade Center towers, while raising funds for two vital charities: The Terry Farrell Firefighters Fund in the U.S. and The Fire Fighters Charity in the UK. This event is more than a physical challenge; it is a symbol of unity and a commitment to never forgetting those who gave their all. We are currently recruiting dedicated firefighters to join our team for this once-in-a-lifetime climb.

Name: Smart Escape LLC
Description:
The Smart Escape System is an innovative building control system designed to streamline the evacuation of building occupants and improve the effectiveness of first responders in high stress, high stakes emergency scenarios.

The system has four main use cases: Fire evacuation, lockdown / active shooter scenarios, emergency medical navigation and non-emergency building navigation. 

The system guides occupants in these four scenarios with a series of small, dual-sided light indicators placed throughout the corridors and rooms of the building. One side of the system’s indicators will display a cascade of green lights to navigate occupants along the safest path to exit the building, while the other will display red lights to guide first responders to the source of the threat.

The hallmark of the Smart Escape System is its capacity to adapt to the emergency scenario as it changes and evolves. For fire evacuation, the system will account for the known location(s) of the fire and guide people away from those places while also accounting for corridor and doorway congestion. It will always direct people along the safest possible path over the quickest, as the quickest may not always be viable. For a lockdown scenario, the system would rely on external input (Such as camera monitoring and gunshot detectors) to track the location of the threat. The system will then inform occupants whether to hide, prepare to fight or evacuate. In the case of the system directing occupants to run, it will guide them along the safest possible path. All the while the intruder is completely unaware of the system doing its job.

With over 50 years’ experience in extinguisher design, development and manufacture, we have a broad understanding of fire safety and what it takes to bring innovative new products to market.

WHAT BREAKTHROUGHS HAVE WE MADE?

Developments and advancements in fire protection technology don’t come along too often but we’ve set about changing that. We’re working on a number of environmental, functional and performance improvements within fire protection, ranging from environmentally-friendly extinguisher agents to compact and discreet firefighting products. We’re probably best known for the design and development of environmentally-friendly Halon alternative extinguishers. The Blue Card Command Certification Program is a state of the art training and certification system that teaches Company and Command Officers how to standardize local incident operations across their organization. The program uses a combination of online and in-class simulation training which results in an Incident Commander solution that finally addresses local Hazard Zone operations.

The training is based entirely on retired Fire Chief Alan Brunacini’s Fire Command and Command Safety Textbooks which have been used globally in the Fire Service for over 30 years. The Blue Card Incident Commander Training and Certification Program are designed to manage local, NIMS Type 4 and 5 incidents. These 2 Incident Types account for more than 99 percent of a department’s incident activity. Until the advent of Blue Card, there has not been a curriculum or standard for an Incident Commander to manage a local, Type 4 and 5 Hazard Zone.

Bijvoorbeeld in parkeergarages of op andere plekken waar vervoersmiddelen worden opgeslagen of gestald. 

Wij blussen de brand snel en efficiënt. Onze blusoplossing ondersteunt het redden van mensen, bewoners, omstanders en hulpverleners. En helpt bovendien schade en nevenschade voorkomen.

FIFI4PARKING biedt een brandblusoplossing voor elektrische voertuigen voor verschillende doelgroepen. Het is afhankelijk van de situatie van onderneming of de implementatie word ingevuld met een standaard modulair autonoom systeem of dat dit een op maat ontworpen systeem betreft. Enkele voorbeelden van doelgroepen waar FIFI4PARKING zich op richt zijn:

> Vliegvelden
> Vereniging van Eigenaren
> Gebouweigenaren
> Parkeergarage exploitanten
> Haventerreinen

FIFI4PARKING draagt zorg voor een veiligere omgeving waar elektrische voertuigen worden geparkeerd en/of opgeladen.
Hiermee helpen wij bedrijven de Zero Emissie norm te behalen.

Onze oplossing 

> Opereert Standalone en autonoom
> Biedt 24/7 detectie-en activering
> Is gebaseerd op CAFS Perslucht
> Schuiminjectie alleen waar de brand is begonnen
> Is Biologisch afbreekbaar
> Voorkomt (neven)schade)
> Biedt snelle detectie
> Beperkte onderhoudskosten
> Snel terug naar het normaal

Naast het blussen van branden van geparkeerde elektrische voertuigen, elektrische vrachtwagens, elektrische scooters, elektrische bussen, elektrische fietsen in fietsenstallingen blussen we ook branden op grote batterijsystemen in de scheepvaart, datacenters en elektrische opslag systemen. Denk hierbij aan toepassingen voor bijvoorbeeld het ontzien van het stroomnet, of laadfaciliteiten en laadpleinen. 

We save the day and save tomorrows.

Name: Brandschutztechnik Meyer Hagen GmbH
Description:
Brandschutztechnik Meyer Hagen GmbH ist ein führendes Unternehmen in der Brandschutzbranche mit Sitz in Hagen, Deutschland. Es spezialisiert sich auf die Entwicklung, Herstellung und Installation von hochwertigen Brandschutzsystemen und -lösungen für Gewerbe-, Industrie- und Privatkunden. Mit einem breiten Produkt- und Dienstleistungsangebot, darunter Brandmeldeanlagen, Feuerlöschgeräte, Rauch- und Wärmeabzugsanlagen sowie Feuerschutztüren, bietet das Unternehmen individuell zugeschnittene Brandschutzlösungen.

Innovation, Qualität und Kundenservice stehen im Zentrum der Unternehmensphilosophie. Brandschutztechnik Meyer Hagen GmbH hat sich durch seine umfassenden Beratungsleistungen, Planung und Projektierung im Brandschutz, Wartung, Instandhaltung sowie Schulungen zum Thema Brandschutz einen Namen gemacht. Ziel ist es, die Sicherheit von Menschen und Sachwerten zu gewährleisten und Brandrisiken zu minimieren.

Das Unternehmen legt großen Wert auf die Entwicklung maßgeschneiderter Lösungen, die auf die spezifischen Bedürfnisse und Rahmenbedingungen jedes Projekts abgestimmt sind. Die hohe Kundenzufriedenheit bestätigt die Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit der angebotenen Produkte und Services. Durch den Einsatz modernster Technologien und kontinuierliche Weiterbildung seines Teams strebt Brandschutztechnik Meyer Hagen GmbH danach, die effektivsten und zuverlässigsten Brandschutzlösungen zu bieten.

Mit einem starken Fokus auf Forschung und Entwicklung ist das Unternehmen bestrebt, seine Marktposition weiter zu stärken und einen wesentlichen Beitrag zum fortschrittlichen Brandschutz zu leisten. Brandschutztechnik Meyer Hagen GmbH schützt Leben und leistet einen bedeutenden Beitrag zur Sicherheit in der Gesellschaft.

Name: Shivansh
Description:
Prioritizing Safety & PPE in the Workplace

Creating a culture of safety is non-negotiable in any industry. Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) plays a critical role in safeguarding workers from potential hazards, whether physical, chemical, biological, or environmental. From helmets and gloves to respiratory protection and high-visibility clothing, PPE serves as the last line of defense when risks cannot be eliminated.

Key principles include:

Hazard Identification: Understanding risks before they cause harm.

Training & Compliance: Ensuring workers know when and how to use PPE properly.

Maintenance & Inspection: Regular checks to ensure PPE effectiveness.

Continuous Improvement: Adapting safety protocols based on new insights and incidents.


Safety isn’t just a policy—it’s a mindset. Let’s keep empowering teams with the knowledge, tools, and equipment to stay protected and productive.

#WorkplaceSafety #PPE #HealthAndSafety #EHS #RiskManagement #SafetyFirst

Name: Site Training Inspection Compliance Services
Description:
Stics Is a BM Trada certified Fire door Inspection, maintenance & Installation company. We have developed our own market leading Fire door inspection App. We have used the app with all types of organisations to train and monitor their staff and compile timely reports and conduct maintenance schedules for all types of fire doors.

Clients and contractors are able to see when a contractor is scheduled to attend. The system gives real-time monitoring of the compliance process, allowing the viewing of compliance certification completion as it occurs, all via an app based interface.

The system keeps a complete audit trail of all data that is collected allowing sophisticated reports to be run on any aspect of the certification process. Management information is collated in a configurable format for the user via a desktop app.

The app has been designed to mirror the paper based process that contractors are familiar with, leading to minimal onboarding time and lower training costs.

Stics can support any organisation where asset visibility, efficient work scheduling and HSE compliance are key success factors.

Name: SFPE Philadelphia - Delaware Valley
Description:
The Philadelphia-Delaware Valley Chapter is the local SFPE organization in the Philadelphia Metropolitan Area, encompassing an area including Eastern Pennsylvania, Southern New Jersey, and Delaware. Our Chapter was initiated in 1957 and received its 501(c)6 designation as a subordinate entity of the SFPE in 1966. The objectives of the Philadelphia-Delaware Valley Chapter are to advance the science and practice of fire protection engineering and its allied fields, to maintain a high ethical standard among its members, and to foster fire protection engineering education. In accomplishing these objectives, the Chapter shall not engage in any activity which is not educational, scientific, or charitable, or which is inconsistent with the objectives and policies of the Society.

The Philadelphia-Delaware Valley Chapter is a chapter of the Society of Fire Protection Engineers (SFPE), the world's oldest and largest organization dedicated to strengthening the fire protection engineers profession and advancing the science of fire protection. Established in 1950 and incorporated as a not-for-profit membership organization in 1971, SFPE is the world's leading professional Society representing those practicing in fire protection and fire safety engineering. The Society has nearly 5000 members and over 100 chapters worldwide, including 20 student chapters. SFPE also encourages a comprehensive education for fire protection engineers and continuing on-the-job training. SFPE offers an all-embracing benefit package, including free member series webinars, technical publications, numerous discounts, and so much more. As an active member of the Philadelphia-Delaware Valley Chapter of the SFPE, you will have many opportunities to advance your growth as a fire protection professional. The ability to network with other professionals residing in your region will keep you abreast of all the latest local issues.

Name: Source Associate Limited
Description:
Source associate limited (SAL) is a organization that specialize in providing fire protection services to individuals and businesses. SAL offers a wide range of services, including fire risk assessments, fire suppression system installation and maintenance, fire training, and emergency response planning. In this article, we will discuss the various services provided by fire safety companies and the benefits of working with one.

Services Provided by SAL

Fire risk assessments are an essential service provided SAL. These assessments are conducted to identify potential fire hazards and evaluate the risk of a fire occurring. A fire risk assessment typically includes an inspection of the building, an assessment of fire protection equipment, and an evaluation of fire safety procedures.

Fire suppression system installation and maintenance is another service provided by SAL. These systems are designed to extinguish fires quickly and effectively, preventing the spread of fire and minimizing damage to property and life. Fire suppression systems may include sprinkler systems, foam systems, or chemical systems. Regular maintenance of these systems is essential to ensure their proper functioning in case of an emergency.

Fire training is another service provided by fire safety companies. This training is designed to educate individuals on fire safety procedures, including fire prevention, evacuation procedures, and the proper use of fire extinguishers. Fire training may also include hands-on training exercises to simulate emergency situations.

Fire safety plan is another important service provided by SAL. This service involves creating a comprehensive emergency response plan that outlines the procedures to follow in the event of a fire. This plan may include evacuation procedures, emergency contacts, and instructions for the use of fire protection equipment.

Passive fire protection decreases the potential of a possible fire and delays its spread through the building.
Our expert work is aimed at improving the safety of people, protecting properties from fire damage and making sure that a minor fire will not escalate into a major rescue project. A professionally fire protected building or construction site can save lives.

The work we perform is interdependent, meaning that each component of the passive fire protection is dependent on the other. Together, they form a strong and functional whole.

We have well over a decade of experience in the installation of passive fire protection. Over these years, we have made numerous commercial and residential construction sites, and governmental and private business properties a safe and secure place to be in.
We prevent the spread of fire in destroying buildings, properties and lives by applying our extensive knowledge and trusted methods to the structure of a building or site.

EMECH Mühendislik, yangın güvenliği sistemleri alanında projelendirme, uygulama, bakım ve anahtar teslim taahhüt hizmetleri sunan uzman bir mühendislik firmasıdır.

Endüstriyel tesisler, ticari yapılar, oteller, hastaneler ve veri merkezleri için; gazlı, sulu ve davlumbaz söndürme sistemleri ile yangın algılama ve ihbar sistemlerini kapsayan uçtan uca çözümler sunmaktayız.

Tüm hizmetlerimizi NFPA, EN ve TS standartlarına uygun, mühendislik disiplini ve iş güvenliği önceliğiyle gerçekleştiriyor; keşiften devreye almaya, periyodik bakım, hidrostatik ve sızdırmazlık (Door Fan) testlerine kadar tüm süreçleri profesyonel ekibimizle yönetiyoruz.

Vizyonumuz:
Yangın güvenliği alanında teknik yetkinliği ve güvenilirliği ile tercih edilen, sürdürülebilir bir mühendislik markası olmak.

Misyonumuz:
Mühendislik esaslı çözümlerle yangın risklerini minimize eden, güvenli ve uzun ömürlü sistemler sunmak.

 About Us | EMECH Engineering

EMECH Engineering is a specialized engineering company providing design, installation, maintenance, and turnkey fire protection services.

We offer end-to-end fire safety solutions for industrial and commercial facilities, including gaseous and water-based suppression systems, kitchen hood systems, and fire detection & alarm systems.

All services are delivered in compliance with NFPA, EN, and local standards, covering site survey, installation, commissioning, periodic maintenance, hydrostatic testing, and door fan testing.

Our Vision:
To be a trusted and preferred engineering brand in fire protection solutions.

Our Mission:
To deliver reliable, engineering-driven fire safety systems that minimize risk and ensure long-term protection.

Name: Söhnchen GmbH
Description:
Die Söhnchen GmbH wurde im Jahr 2008 als Einzelunternehmen gegründet. Das Ziel des Unternehmens ist es, die Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar und deren Umkreis brandschutztechnisch sicherer zu machen. Auftragsabhängig ist die Firma auch bundesweit tätig. Vom Einmannbetrieb hat sich die Söhnchen GmbH zu einem innovativen mittelständischen Unternehmen entwickelt und wächst stetig weiter.

Der Kundenstamm besteht aus Industriekunden, gewerblichen Kunden, Städten und Kommunen, sowie vereinzelt auch Endverbrauchern. Die ständige Schulung und Weiterbildung der Mitarbeiter gibt unseren Kunden die Garantie für eine optimale Beratung und fachgerechte Durchführung aller anfallenden Arbeiten im Bereich des vorbeugenden Brandschutzes.

Das Kerngeschäft erstreckt sich über die Planung und Konzepterstellung, die Ausstattung, die Prüfung und Wartung und über die Schulung und Sachverständigen-Abnahme.

Seit Beginn steht das Unternehmen, welches auch nach ISO DIN EN 9001 und ISO DIN EN 45001 zertifiziert ist, seinen Kunden als verlässlicher Partner mit Rat und Tat zur Seite. Jedes Kundenanliegen wird mit großer Sorgfalt bearbeitet und dokumentiert.

Name: FTRL - Fire Test & Research Laboratory
Description:
Fire Test & Research Laboratory (FTRL) is a leading centre dedicated to advancing fire safety through science, research, and global standards.

Name: London Fire Door Consultants Ltd
Description:
London Fire Door Consultants Ltd is a business committed to help improve fire door safety in commercial, residential & hotel buildings. With £5m PI & £5m PL cover & FDIS Certification, our inspection aims to assist the RP comply with the RR(FS)O.
 
For existing buildings where Building Regulations are not applied retrospectively, LFDC’s fire door inspections follow BS 8214: 2016 Timber-based fire door assemblies – Code of Practice as our target for compliance.
 
Fire door assemblies with clear, 3rd party certification and performance evidence will be classified as CERTIFIED. For fire door assemblies without test evidence but demonstrated to be well-maintained and capable of fulfilling their original function,ikely functional, we will assign a NOMINAL or NOTIONAL fire door status.
 
LFDC’s key USP is our commitment to remediation over replacement where possible. As an independent entity, we offer no further services and will therefore always provide an honest and cost-effective solution for ensuring compliance with statutory regulations.
 
Our report will include detailed recommendations for remediation to the existing fire door assemblies rather than simply replacing them. This allows the Responsible Person to liaise with the Fire Risk Assessor and, if considered appropriate, send our defect summary out to tender to 3rd party certified fire door maintenance firms for pricing.
 
This approach not only provides a cost-effective solution but also reduces the embodied carbon impact of a building, adhering to the circular economy principles. At LFDC we recognise that there is a significant shift in the building and construction sector towards a net zero future and, where possible, by putting remediation at the heart of our offer, we understand this could be of benefit to our clients.

Name: Verifire
Description:
Verifire es la plataforma de IA que documenta la revisión trimestral de extintores exigida por el RIPCI (BOE, 2017).
Antes era anual; ahora es trimestral y obligatoria. No sustituye el mantenimiento anual y las sanciones recaen en el tenedor; en caso de siniestro, la aseguradora puede reducir o denegar el pago si no hay comprobación.
Con Verifire, el titular realiza una revisión guiada por IA: fotos, geolocalización, sello de tiempo y responsable. El sistema genera un acta digital (PDF), lista para auditoría y compartible con mantenedor y aseguradora.
Beneficios: cumplimiento simple, menos visitas y papel, reducción de costes y prueba trazable.

Name: Dust Busters Plus LLC
Description:
Wildland Firefighting is an extremely demanding job. Firefighters typically work 100 hours per week while out on fire. We sleep under the stars, up before the dawn, work all day and bed down long after sunset. This job is full of adventure, sights and new experiences. You develop a bond that goes deep and become part of a small family of tough rugged men and women. Fire changes people. It pushes people to their limit, but at the end of the day, you sleep well knowing you put in a hard days work and job well done.  

Wildland firefighters assist in the suppression of wild fire in remote locations by digging firelines, and removing fuels, (brush, grass, etc.).  It can be a fun and exciting job but it is also extremely difficult, both mentally and physically.

Dust Busters Plus LLC provides hundreds of firefighters the training, knowledge and expertise to combat wildfires. Our standard for professionalism is among the highest around and we take pride in our leadership and quality of work. 

Wildland Firefighting with Dust Busters Plus LLC is fulfilling in many ways. People looking for a one year summer job, to people looking for a career can both find a place within our ranks. We train our own and are always looking for new leadership and roll models to become something great. 

We are one of the fastest growing contract companies in the nation. Join our crews today by filling out a contact form  at: https://www.dbfightfire.com/contact-us.html

Name: Perfekt Feuerlöschgeräte Vertriebs- und Wartungs GmbH
Description:

1977 erfolgte die Übernahme der Firma durch den Schwiegersohn Winfried Mangelkramer und der Umbau in einen Verkaufs- und Servicebetrieb für Brandschutz. Nachdem sich Winfried Mangelkramer 2007 nach 30-jähriger Firmentätigkeit aus dem operativen Geschäft zurückgezogen hat, leitet nun seine Tochter Clivia Schneid die Firma.

PERFEKT beschäftigt zur Zeit 7 Mitarbeiter. Die Techniker vom Kundendienst sind ausgebildete Sachkundige für die Prüfung von Feuerlöschern, Wandhydranten, RWA Anlagen und Feststellanlagen.

Mitglied im Bundesverband Brandschutz Fachhändler und wir sind

Name: California Interagency Incident Management Team 6
Description:
An incident management team is dispatched or mobilized during complex emergency incidents to provide a command and control infrastructure in order to manage the operational, logistical, informational, planning, fiscal, community, political, and safety issues associated with complex incidents. Incident Management Teams can include people from federal, state, local, tribal, and territorial entities.

Incident Management Teams (IMTs) are available for assignment to manage large-scale, complex incidents anywhere in the United States. These incidents usually involve large wildfires, but they may be assigned to other complex all-risk situations which could include hurricanes, floods and other disasters.

IMTs may also be assigned to VIP visits, lengthy search and rescues, law enforcement incidents and multi-day special events.

Name: UK Fire Door Inspections Ltd
Description:
UK Fire Door Inspections Ltd operates across the U.K. inspecting, surveying and reporting on the integrity of Fire Doors, that are paramount to ensuring the safety of a building and occupants. Our team of engineers are fully qualified & certified Fire Door inspectors, having completed The Awarding Body of the Built Environment (ABBE - regulated by Ofqual) Level 3 Fire Door Inspection course, and are fully DBS checked.

If you are the Responsible Person for a multi-occupancy building greater than 11 metres high, you are required by law to carry out quarterly checks for all Fire Doors in communal areas. You are also responsible for carrying out annual checks on all flat entrance doors, providing the necessary information to residents on the critical role of Fire Doors in the compartmentalisation of a fire.

For all commercial properties According to article 17 of the Regulatory Reform (Fire Safety) Order 2005, it is a legal requirement for businesses to ensure that fire resistant and escape doors are correctly installed and maintained at all times

We believe in delivering fair, sustainable and impartial advice - by focusing solely on the inspection of your Fire Doors, you can trust that our sole mission is to give you honest updates on the effectiveness and safety of your Fire Doors, and not to administer unnecessary upgrades and installation. There are no conflicts of interest.

Please visit our website - www.ukfiredoorinspectionslimited.co.uk for more information and contact details.

Name: Integrated Fire Systems
Description:
Companies have increasingly faced pressure from insurers and ESG proponents to improve asset and human protection, specifically fire protection measures. Unfortunately, such systems are exceedingly expensive and pose a significant challenge with older infrastructures in order to effectively retrofit. Additionally, portable systems tend to be either very small or exceedingly cumbersome and expensive.

Issues such as water scarcity or the lack of consistent infrastructural services in certain geographical areas, or even countries, increases the financial burden of comprehensive suppression systems as the infrastructure effectively needs to be duplicated in order for the system to function properly.

This situation has material secondary effects through the reduction of insurance coverage and resultant premium volumes in the conventional insurance market as many companies cannot obtain insurance, reducing the insurance penetration in the commercial market.	 

The development of an effective rational fire-design system that allows efficient retro-fitment, as well as being portable when required and not requiring external access to power or water would assist greatly in solving the current challenges facing a myriad of businesses and other operations.

Integrated Fire Systems has developed products to address the requirements specific to existing conveyor infrastructure, as well as a more general application to rational suppression of Lithium battery and Class A and B fires. Ease of retro-fitment is one of the primary design criteria to enable existing sites to implement the solution.

Additionally, the system is self-contained and does not require additional integration with water or constant feed electricity supply networks.

Name: Act Safety ApS
Description:
Our Services

We are highly trained Lloyds and DNV approved service technicians that can offer service contracts, where we monitor your entire fleet and schedule the required services to provide you with an online system. Here you can monitor the status of all vessels, including service reports and approvals. Furthermore, we maintain a stellar reputation among maritime clients, for professional and reliable service.

Our Team

With more than 10 years of experience in servicing water mist and sprinkler safety equipment, we deliver on quality at a competitive price. As a lean company, we work with agility and without bureaucratic delays. Our mission is to deliver the best possible service and form lasting relationships with our clients, without charging a fortune.

We Can Help

From first contact to certification, we are with you all the way. Without massive overhead and excessive corporate paychecks, we can keep prices competitive.
By engaging in dialog with our customers to figure out what works best, we talk you through every step of the process and provide a transparent breakdown of our pricing model.

Certification & Services

As Lloyds and DNV approved fire and water mist service technicians we can provide service and technical support for vessels and land-based applications, worldwide. Act Safety is Lloyds and DNV approved for the following:

Inspection and maintenance of fire Extinguishing equipment and systems , in accordance with Class Program DNVGL-CP-0484 scheme A04. This scheme allows us to service and certify:

• Pressure Water Spraying systems (Sprinkler, Deluge and Water Mist systems) all makers and marks
• Fixed Fire Extinguishing systems for Deep Fat Cooking
• Foam Fire Extinguishing systems
• Examination of Foam Concentrates.

By choosing ACT Safety, you are choosing to keep your vessels in the capable hands of trusted technicians.

Name: Oswego Fire Protection District
Description:
The Oswego Fire Protection District has a rich history that spans over a century. The department’s origins can be traced back to the devastating fire that destroyed the Congregational Church in Oswego in 1893. In response to this tragedy, the village purchased a hose and hose cart in 1895, and by August of the same year, a fire company was formed. A hose house was added to the town council house in June of 1897, and in 1898, a bell was placed in a tower atop the house to signal the firemen for a call.

Today, the Oswego Fire Protection District is a career department operating out of four stations. These stations are open 365 days a year, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The district covers 52 square miles of the northeast portion of Kendall County and about 4 square miles of mostly unincorporated industrial parks in northwest Will County, protecting most of the Village of Oswego, unincorporated Boulder Hill, a large portion of the south side of the Village of Montgomery, approximately 1 ½ square miles of the Grande Park neighborhood in the Village of Plainfield, and a small neighborhood in the far northeast area of the United City of Yorkville.

The men and women of the Oswego Fire Protection District are committed to providing the highest quality of service and strive to challenge themselves to achieve the greatest potential for those they serve. The district’s mission is to provide professional fire prevention, fire suppression, and emergency medical services while maintaining the confidence and respect of the community. Through exemplary conduct, the district aims to foster and enhance the realization that the Oswego Fire Protection District is an important requisite to the well-being of the entire community. The district’s historic bell, once atop the hose house on Washington Street, now proudly displayed at the entrance of the Oswego Fire Protection District Station1 on Woolley Road, serves as a constant reminder of the department’s dedication to the community.

Fazemos também automação de bombas, VGA’s e diversas outras execuções com o protocolo de comunicação Xbee Zigbee, eliminando por toda obra, fios, dutos, eletrocalhas e eletrodutos.

A suíte de produtos Deltafire é formada por dispositivos de alta precisão e qualidade no qual compõe central de incêndio, retransmissores, roteadores, botoeiras, detectores de fumaça e/ou calor, detectores de gás e amônia, entre outros.

A tecnologia desenvolvida é compatível com periféricos de outros fabricantes. Dessa forma, a escolha torna-se mais flexível para cada tipo de projeto.

Darüber hinaus sind wir auch regelmäßig beim Bau von Löschanlagen in Einkaufszentren und Hotels vertreten. 
Dabei können wir Projekte über alle Stadien hinweg betreuen. Von der Einstufung von Sprinkleranlagen, über die hydraulische Auslegung von Rohrleitungen und Pumpenanlagen, bis hin zu Montage und Wartung haben wir langjährige und einschlägige Erfahrung.
Weiters können wir auch Sonderlösungen im Anlagen- und Stahlbau anbieten. Dazu zählen zum Beispiel Löschwasserbehälter zum Einsatz bei Sprinkleranlagen oder die Errichtung von Pumpwerken für Hydrantenanlagen (Überflur- und Unterflurhydranten) oder anderen Einsatzgebieten.

Name: Fatum Grup

Suntem aici pentru a-ți oferi servicii de protecție a muncii și situații de urgenta. De fapt, am fost aici din anii 2000, și suntem mândri să spunem că respectul și prețuirea pentru ființă umană sunt principiile care ne ghidează pașii în fiecare zi.

Pentru că da, noi suntem specializați #pebune în Securitatea și Sănătatea în Munca (protecția muncii) și Situațiile de Urgență (PSI), și respectăm standardele europene. Dar ceea ce ne face cu adevărat speciali este modul în care aplicăm aceste servicii în contexte și domenii de activitate diferite, iar schimbul de experiență cu organizații din întreaga țară ne ajută să ne atingem continuu acest obiectiv.

Societate abilitata de Ministerul Muncii, Familiei si Egalitatii de Sanse prin intermediul Comisiei de abilitare a serviciilor externe de prevenire, protectie si avizare a documentatiilor cu caracter tehnic de informare si instruire in domeniul securitatii si sanatatii in munca, ca serviciu extern de prevenire si protectie conform legii securitatii si sanatatii in munca nr. 319/2006 si a Hotararii Guvernului nr. 1425/2006 pentru aprobarea normelor metodologice de aplicare a legii. Certificatul Nr. 8979/30.06.2011 

De asemenea, noi detinem competentele necesare prestarii de servicii pe linia Situatiilor de Urgenta, competente obtinute in urma absolvirii cursurilor organizate de catre GRUPUL POMPIERILOR MILITARI prin intermediul GRUPULUI DE POMPIERI „BANAT” AL JUDETULUI TIMIS.

Name: Marysville Fire Department
Description:
Our Vision is to accomplish our mission by delivering exceptional Public Education and Fire Prevention Programs, as well as maintaining an effective state of readiness to respond and render fire and emergency services to our citizens.
Operations

The Marysville Fire Department proudly serves approximately 12,000 residents in the City of Marysville and services approximately 85 square miles of the unincorporated areas of Hallwood and District 10.
 
The Marysville Fire Department operates out of one fire station, maintains approximately 9 pieces of equipment, 12 line suppression staff, 1 Fire Inspector, 1 Fire Chief and 1 Administrative Assistant. and 12 reserve members.  The department works a 48/96 shift with 4 line suppression staff on duty per day that staff one engine.  We also have an Intern program in collaboration with local colleges and Fire Academies.  Emergency calls for service have been on the increase for the past three years and in 2020, the department responded to 3,968 calls for service, of which 68% were medical aids.
 
The department operates specialized apparatus including; a 105-foot Aerial Quint Ladder Truck, 3,000 gallon Water Tender, and a Hazardous Material Response Vehicle which services Yuba and Sutter Counties. The department is active in local Mutual Aid agreements and receives and provides Mutual Aid to all area departments.  The department also participates in the Statewide Mutual Aid Plan and deploys as part of a local agency Strike Team on numerous occasions throughout California each year.  We are active in various working groups including the Yuba-Sutter Hazardous Materials Team (YSHMRT), The Yuba-Sutter Training Officers, and the Yuba College Fire Academy.

Name: FireChecked
Description:
FireChecked—Fire Door Compliance Made Simple

FireChecked is a smart compliance platform designed for landlords, building managers, and fire safety professionals who need to stay on top of UK fire door regulations.

With rising scrutiny around building safety, we streamline the entire inspection and certification process—from first visit to final sign-off. Every door is digitally tracked, photographed, and logged, with inspection reports and remedial work documented in real time.

FireChecked helps you:

Digitally log fire door inspections and remedials—including leaf, frame, hinges, closers, and fire stopping.

Upload and store visual evidence—photos, videos, and certification labels stored against each door.

Track compliance across all your buildings—from a single flat to an entire portfolio.

Generate instant proof for regulators, insurers, and residents—all accessible with a tap via NFC-tagged doors.

Maintain the golden thread of information—with full version history of inspections, repairs, and rechecks.

From cupboard doors in communal areas to full estate-wide upgrades, FireChecked ensures nothing is missed and everything is recorded.

We simplify compliance—because lives depend on it.

Name: European Fire Sprinker Network
Description:
The European Fire Sprinkler Network (EFSN) is a coalition of fire safety experts, policymakers, facility operators, and advocates working to increase fire sprinkler adoption across Europe and save lives.

Every year, over 4,000 Europeans die in fires. Most of these deaths are preventable. Where fire sprinklers are widely installed, fire deaths are nearly eliminated and injuries reduced by over 80%. Yet across Europe, regulations remain outdated and adoption inconsistent.

EFSN exists to change this. We bring together fire chiefs, regulators, care home and hospital operators, and safety advocates across 16+ countries to share evidence, build consensus, and drive policy change. Our mission is clear: protect vulnerable populations, including elderly residents in care homes, patients in hospitals, and children in schools, through modern fire safety standards and widespread sprinkler adoption.

We provide our members with access to fire safety legislation across Europe, position papers grounded in evidence, a network of country-specific champions, and a collective voice to influence European fire safety policy. We celebrate regulatory wins, share best practices, and connect advocates working toward the same goal: a Europe where fire safety is a priority and preventable fire deaths are eliminated.

Join us. Together, we're building a safer Europe.

Name: Montana Wildfire Sprinkler Systems LLC
Description:
We are the only licensed installer in Montana, Wyoming and Idaho for the Frontline Wildfire Defense System. 
Our second-generation wildfire sprinkler system is powered by Frontline’s fire tracking software and is easily activated on-site or remotely from anywhere in the world. Once active, the system saturates your property with water and biodegradable firefighting foam, creating an environment that is too wet to burn. The Class-A foam breaks the surface tension of water, allowing it to soak more quickly and deeply into combustible materials. 
Every Frontline system comes with WiFi, cellular and satellite connectivity as well as a dedicated backup battery. If the power is shut off and cell service fails, you can still stay connected to your Frontline system and defend your home from anywhere. Frontline gives you complete control. 
Developed by a group of firefighters, technologists, and ecologists, the Frontline Wildfire Defense System is a preventative sprinkler system that combats the threat of wind-borne embers. From homes that defend themselves with wildfire sprinklers to technology that provides real-time wildfire alerts and evacuation coaching, Frontline helps you stay ahead of the flames. 
Living in a high fire risk area, you’re likely to have concerns about wildfire insurance coverage. What are your options? What are the costs? You might worry about whether you can even get insurance if you’re in a high fire risk area. 
Installing our system may benefit your insurance coverage, and even lower your premiums, regardless of which insurance carrier you currently have. We do not provide insurance, however Frontline provides information to help you navigate your insurance journey, and offers several financing options. 
We are based in Montana, serving all rural and remote regions. Are you outside of Montana? We also install systems across the west. Learn more on our website: MontanaWildfireSprinklerSystems.com

Name: SafeFireCheck LLC
Description:
SafeFireCheck is a technology-enabled fire safety company that provides property managers and facility owners with budget predictability and guaranteed compliance through a modern, subscription-based service.

Our Mission
We eliminate the budget chaos, administrative burden, and tenant risk associated with outdated, unpredictable fire safety compliance.

In the traditional model, property managers face unexpected bills for 6- and 12-year maintenance, confusing compliance paperwork, and the risk of significant fire marshal fines. Our goal is to replace that chaos with total peace of mind.

What We Do (The Subscription Model)
We specialize in moving fire safety from a chaotic, unpredictable Capital Expense (CapEx) to a stable, manageable Operating Expense (OpEx).

For one predictable monthly fee, our subscription covers:

All Required Equipment: Extinguishers, alarms, and emergency lighting.

All Inspections: Annual, semi-annual, and necessary state-mandated inspections.

All Maintenance: Full coverage for all mandatory 6- and 12-year tear-down maintenance costs.

The result is $0 surprise costs and 100% compliance guaranteed by contract.

The Technology (The Smart Log Advantage)
Our core differentiator is the Smart Log Portal. As a company founded on a strong foundation of IT systems management, we recognized the need to digitize compliance for the Fire Marshal.

The Smart Log provides:

Instant Verification: Property managers and Fire Inspectors can access clean, verifiable compliance records immediately via a dedicated digital portal. This eliminates paperwork, cuts down on on-site inspection time, and frees up Fire Marshal resources.

Audit Trail: A tamper-proof digital history proving the property is always in compliance.

We save property managers time, money, and administrative headache, allowing them to focus on tenant relations and asset value.

Who We Serve
Residential & Commercial Property Management Firms

Facility Owners & Operators

Multi-Family Housing

Name: Soldier Township Fire Department
Description:
The Soldier Township Fire Department, a progressive and innovative department, is located just north of Topeka, Kansas.
Soldier Township was formed in 1937.  The township started with a 1937 Ford Fire Truck that was stored in a member's garage.  As the township grew it was determined a fire station was needed.  The station was built in the 2600 block of Topeka Blvd.  At the same time, 2 full-time firefighters were hired.  The Chief and Assistant Chief along with 15 volunteers responded to all fire calls in the Township.  In 1976 the City of Topeka annexed some of the Township property.  This property included the fire station.  A new station was built at 46th and Topeka Blvd.  As time progressed the department added 2 more full-time staff members in 1980.  This addition allowed for 24-hour coverage at the station.  The department also added 24 volunteer personnel.  This allows the department to respond to calls with full staffing.  In 2007 a second, unmanned, station was built in the 8200 block of Topeka Blvd.  In 2016 a staffing survey was completed.  Due to the volunteer shortage that is hitting the nation.  It was determined STFD would need to increase its staffing by adding 6 new full-time personnel.  The Township Board approved 3 full-time personnel.  Those individuals were hired and began work on January 1, 2017.  Soldier Township now has 7 full-time and 30 volunteers, paid-on-call, employees.
The Soldier Township Fire Department serves a township covering 63 square miles, with a population of approximately 15,000 people.  The Township itself is approximately 60% residential with several areas of densely populated neighborhoods intermixed with commercial, industrial, and agricultural areas.  Soldier Township provides fire protection for 2 large manufacturing facilities: Goodyear Tire and Rubber, Hills Pet Foods.  There are also several smaller manufacturing plants in the Township.  Soldier Township responds to approximately 1000 incidents a year.

We specialize in complete fire sprinkler installation for wood-framed multi-family developments, high-rise towers, and commercial projects, including both plastic and steel systems. 

Backed by direct manufacturing relationships in China and Cambodia, we offer exceptional pricing, consistent supply, and the ability to deliver on tight timelines.

What sets us apart is our team-first culture. We hire experienced Red Seal Journeymen, Foremen, Lead Hands, and 2nd–4th year apprentices who take pride in their work. Many join with their full crews, and we make onboarding seamless.
Our job sites are known for clean workmanship, strong production, and a simple daily motto: “Crushing It Again Today!”

Systems Right is built for long-term stability. With years of projects already secured, we plan to hire 20–40 additional sprinkler fitters this year alone. Whether you want to start immediately or plan your move when your current job wraps up, we keep the conversation open.

For general contractors and mechanical contractors, we provide dependable estimating, accurate pricing, and crews who deliver high-quality work on schedule.

Hiring Inquiries: Call or text Chris at 778-898-2810

Name: CENTA Nalchem Fire
Description:
Nalchem Fire is a specialised fire protection service provider. We focus on high-quality servicing, maintenance, and installations of critical fire equipment

Nalchem Fire was founded in 1990 by Allan under the original name Alchem Fire. Like many small businesses, it began as a one-man operation — “stok siel alleen” — with a workshop in the garage and an office in the house, long before computers or internet were part of the picture.

In 2006 the company became Nalchem Fire, continuing to grow steadily through dedication, personal service, and a commitment to quality. With only one technician and one admin assistant in the early years, Allan handled everything from sourcing parts and powder to securing signage and equipment to keep clients satisfied.

A major turning point came when Nalchem Fire joined the CENTA Group, thanks to an introduction by the late Mr. Henning Mugge from East Rand Fire. After meeting Mr. Duncan and sharing in his vision, Allan joined a small group of members — a decision that marked the start of long-term growth, national opportunities, and professional support across the industry.

1996: Allan’s wife, Hetta, joined the business, taking over financials and bookkeeping.
2005: Allan’s son, Neville, joined & completed his training through CENTA Gauteng in Alberton.
2006: Neville completed the SAQCC1475 training & began servicing the Mpumalanga region as a Fire Equipment Technician.
2009: After leaving CENTA Gauteng at the end of 2008, he joined Nalchem Fire permanently & has been managing the company since 2009.
2015: Neville’s wife, Suné, joined the company to assist with administrative operations.
2018: Allan’s youngest son, Brian, joined the business.
2019: Brian completed his SAQCC1475 training & is currently working toward becoming a qualified fire detection systems technician.

Today, Nalchem Fire services 650 clients & 18 National contract clients, covering approximately 495 shops and businesses throughout Gauteng & Mpumalanga

Seit 2020 unterstütze ich freiberuflich zahlreiche Unternehmer, Eigentümer, Planer, Architekten und Bauunternehmen deutschlandweit bei ihren Projekten und Aufgaben, um ihr Werte vor Schaden oder gar Verlust zu Schützen.
Brände und Brandrauch zerstören jedes Jahr Millionenwerte. Im gewerblich/industriellen und privaten Bereich ist die Bedrohung durch die Brandgefahr allgegenwärtig. Entsprechende Versicherungen, z.B. Betriebsunterbrechungs- und Feuerversicherung helfen den materiellen Wert zu ersetzen, aber der Verlust von Kundenaufträgen, Marktanteilen und Kunden bedeutet häufig nach einem Brandfall das Aus für die Unternehmung. Der vorbeugende Brandschutz im Betrieb wirkt der Brandgefahr entgegen.
Mehr als 70% der Unternehmen schließen ihren Betrieb nach einem Brandereignis. Nach einem Arbeitsunfall fallen viele lange Zeit oder gar für immer aus dem Arbeitsleben aus. 
Um diese Risiken zu minimieren oder gar zu verhindern, biete ich ihnen meine Unterstützung an.

Möchten Sie mehr über mich erfahren?

Sie benötigen fachgerechte Beratung, Betreuung oder Ausstattungen im Bereich Brandschutz?
Sie benötigen einen Brandschutzbeauftragten?

In ihrem Haus stehen Überprüfungen nach DGUV oder ASR an?

Dann sind Sie bei uns, an der richtigen Adresse.

Unser Portfolio umfasst den Verkauf, die Vermietung, Montage, Reparatur und Prüfung von Regalanlagen, sowie die Prüfung, Wartung und Montage von Tor- und Türentechnik, Hebetechnik und Steigtechnik.

Unser Hauptsitz befindet sich in Borchen im Kreis Paderborn. Von hier aus bedienen wir Kunden aus verschiedenen Branchen und unterstützen sie bei der Optimierung ihrer Lagerabläufe. 

Darüber hinaus bieten wir mit PROPP BRANDSCHUTZ auch Brandschutzdienstleistungen an. Wir setzen auf umfassende Lösungen, um den Schutz Ihrer Räumlichkeiten und Mitarbeiter zu gewährleisten. 

Bei AP PRÜFSERVICE legen wir großen Wert auf Qualität, Zuverlässigkeit und erstklassigen Kundenservice. 

Unser erfahrenes Team aus Experten steht Ihnen mit fundiertem Fachwissen und langjähriger Erfahrung zur Seite. Unser Anspruch ist es, die Erwartungen unserer Kunden zu übertreffen und ihnen dabei zu helfen, ihre Lagerausstattung sicher, effizient und auf dem neuesten Stand zu halten.

Treten Sie mit uns in Kontakt und entdecken Sie, wie AP PRÜFSERVICE Ihr Unternehmen bei allen Belangen rund um Lagerausstattung und Betriebsmittel unterstützen kann. Zusammen gestalten wir eine sichere und optimale Arbeitsumgebung für Ihren Erfolg.

Name: RMS Fire and Safety Services (I) Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
FIRE CAN START ANYWHERE, ANYTIME AND IN JUST 6 MINUTES, IT CAN TURN INTO AN UNCONTROLLED BLAZE. THIS MAKE IT EVEN MORE IMPORTANT FOR YOU TO TACKLE THE FIRE, BEFORE IT IS TOO LATE. UNFORTUNATELY, TINY LANES, INACCESSIBLE ROADS AND TRAFFIC JAMS, ALL ARE A SETBACK WHEN IT COMES TO RUSHING TO THE RESCUE POINT, WHICH MEANS THAT BY THE TIME THE LARGE FIRE ENGINES REACHES TO THE DISASTER POINT IT COULD VERY POSSIBLY ALREADY BE TOO LATE. “FIRE BIKE” COMES TO RESCUE IN SUCH SITUATIONS. ADVANTAGE OF A FIRE BIKE IS THAT IT CAN MANOEUVRE ANY ROAD, ZIP THROUGH TRAFFIC AND REACH THE BURNING PREMISES IN COUPLE OF MINUTE.

Motor Bike Fire Fighting Engine (MBFE) is a self propelled fire fighting system which uses Motor Bike engine power to generate water mist using high pressure pump. It consists of PTO driven high pressure pump, water tank and high pressure hose reel fitted with fog / jet gun. It can be used as first turnout fire responder to control the spreading of fire in short interval without need of many fireman as well as heavy fire fighting equipment as used in conventional fire tenders.

Watermist system is discharged it has smaller reduced droplet size which discharges as a fine mist and then converts to steam in the heat which smothers the fire, removing the oxygen element preventing the fire reigniting and offering a cooling effect in the room.  
Firetrace is an Automatic Fire Suppression System that does not need any external energy or power supply and therefore offers an alternative solution for particular fire risk areas.

Name: Munks and Ward Limited
Description:
We are passionate and understand that passive fire protection is the key to a safer environment. We are an IFC accredited leading company that operates Nationwide in the field of ‘Passive Fire Stopping’.  We are listed as an approved supplier on the IFC website which demonstrates capability, traceability and quality.  
Collectively we have over 40 years’ experience in slowing or impeding the spread of the effects of fire and smoke.
We offer an over and above service and quality of labour which sets us apart from the rest.  We are very passionate and take very seriously that the work we do could save someone’s life.  
Passive Fire Protection systems are intended to: 
• Contain a fire to the compartment of fire origin.
• Slow a fire from spreading from the compartment of fire origin.
• Slow the heating of structural members.
• Prevent the spread of fire through intentional openings (e.g., doors, HVAC ducts) in fire rated assemblies by the use of a fire rated closure. 
• Prevent the spread of fire through penetrations (e.g., holes in fire walls through which building systems such as plumbing pipes or electrical cables pass) in fire rated assemblies by the use of fire stops

Name: Adair Fire Audits and Certification
Description:
Are you bewildered by the requirements for your Annual Fire Safety Statements (AFSS)?
Fire Protection & Certification - Adair Fire Audits
WE CAN HELP WITH AFSS!
Adair Fire Audits and Certification is an independent organisation that specialises in Annual Fire Safety Statements commonly referred to as an AFSS.

Fire safety audits that we undertake are a detailed investigation and review of the essential fire safety measures (ESFMs) and other life safety protection systems within a facility. They are undertaken to determine if the fire safety systems meet the benchmarks as detailed by Australian Standards and building codes as listed on the sites fire safety schedule (FSS).

These audits are conducted by Adair Fire Audits and Certification (AFAC) in accordance with Australian Standard 4655 – 2005. The procedure checks the current adequacy of installations, equipment and components as well as services. It reports on the expected performance and make recommendations for compliance with building acts and codes and the requirement of providing a safe workplace.

Annual Fire Safety Statements (AFSS)
Under the Environmental Planning and Assessment Act a building owner MUST provide an AFSS (Annual Fire Safety Statement) to council every year. This is to ensure the building’s essential fire safety measures continue to perform to their original performance standards (as per the fire safety schedule).

This assessment MUST be undertaken by an Accredited Practitioner Fire Safety (APFS) under the FPAS scheme.

Adair Fire Audits will come to your site and undertake the assessment of the fire safety measures nominated for it. We then provide a detailed and easy to understand report outlining any defects. We also provide cost effective and site-specific solutions for you to resolve these in the best way for your site..

Name: Sebelo - AI outdoor fire sensors
Description:

Designed for open areas like industrial yards, storage lots, forest edges, ports, nature trails, and waste zones, our sensors offer a unique layer of fire safety where traditional systems fail.

→ Sebelo helps prevent outdoor fire disasters before they start.

What do we do?

• Thermal imaging examinations of single-family houses and multi-apartment buildings: We identify insulation leaks and detect places of heat loss, which can help optimize heating costs and improve the comfort of use of the building. 
 • Thermal imaging tests of electrical installations: We carry out inspections in residential and commercial buildings, early detection of overheating components can prevent failures and potential fires, increasing user safety. 
• Thermal imaging inspections of machinery parks: In production plants, thermal imaging analysis allows you to quickly detect problems related to overheating of machines, which helps avoid costly downtime and failures.  
Our technology 

Thanks to our state-of-the-art FLIR E54 camera, we see what cannot be seen with the naked eye.  High resolution, sensitivity and Multi Spectral Dynamic Imaging (MSX) technology keep us up to date with every hot issue. Our camera meets all the requirements of insurance companies in Poland, so you can be sure that our tests are at the highest level.  

Why us?

• Mobility: It doesn't matter if you are in Gdańsk, Krakow or anywhere else - we will come to you!

Name: Atlas Fire Ltd
Description:
The details that go unseen are the ones that matter most.

Our core services:

 Fire Stopping — sealing cable routes, pipe penetrations, and service ducts with certified materials to restore building compartmentation
 Intumescent Painting — protective coatings on structural steel that expand under heat, insulating the steel and keeping structures intact longer
 Fire Doors — supply, installation, inspection, and certification
 Cavity Barriers — fire prevention in hidden floor, wall, and ceiling voids
 Fire Compartmentation Surveys & Maintenance

We hold FIRAS accreditation, Constructionline Gold, and SSIP certification. Every job is surveyed, specified, installed to manufacturer guidelines, and fully documented. No shortcuts.

Name: Mahopac Falls Vol. Fire Department
Description: The Mahopac Falls Volunteer Fire Department (MFVFD) was founded in 1937 after a group of local citizens, led by Dave Craft, signed a pledge to form a volunteer fire department. Initially, the department operated out of a two-room school building and relied on a borrowed 1918 fire truck. Over the years, MFVFD expanded with new trucks and equipment, including a 500 GPM pumper in 1939 and the addition of ambulances in the 1970s. Growth in the community led to the construction of a new firehouse in 1961 and a second station in the 1970s. The department continued to modernize through the 1980s and 1990s with advanced fire and rescue equipment, including thermal imaging cameras and defibrillators. In 2001, MFVFD sent volunteers to assist at the World Trade Center following the September 11 attacks. By 2012, the department celebrated its 75th anniversary, proud of its history, equipment, and members, embodying the motto, "With Pride We Serve."

Sammutinhuolto Ketonen Oy on paloturvallisuuden asiantuntija, joka palvelee asiakkaita Varsinais-Suomessa, Uudellamaalla ja Satakunnassa. Olemme perheyritys, joka tarjoaa kattavat paloturvallisuusratkaisut niin kotitalouksille, yrityksille kuin taloyhtiöillekin.

Palveluihimme kuuluvat alkusammutuskaluston – kuten sammuttimien ja palopostien – myynti, tarkastus ja huolto. Meille on tärkeää, että jokainen työ tehdään ammattitaidolla, huolellisesti ja ajallaan – asiakkaidemme turvallisuus on meille ykkösasia.

Myymme ainoastaan laadukkaita, Suomessa ja Saksassa valmistettuja tuotteita, jotka täyttävät tiukimmatkin turvallisuusstandardit. Valikoimaamme kuuluvat jauhe-, neste-, hiilidioksidi- ja erikoissammuttimet eri käyttökohteisiin. Tarjoamme myös räätälöityjä ratkaisuja, kuten ruostumattomasta teräksestä valmistettuja paloposteja ja palovaroitinjärjestelmiä tilakeskuksille.

Sammutinhuollot suoritamme ammattitaidolla joko asiakkaan tiloissa tai omissa toimitiloissamme. Korostamme säännöllisen huollon merkitystä: sammutin on hyödyllinen vain silloin, kun se toimii moitteettomasti. Tarjoamme myös ilmaisia kartoituskäyntejä, joissa asiantuntijamme arvioivat asiakkaan turvallisuustarpeet ja suosittelevat oikeat tuotteet ja palvelut.

Laadukkaiden tuotteiden ja palveluiden lisäksi tarjoamme asiakkaillemme käytännönläheistä koulutusta. Turvallisuuskoulutuksemme opettavat oikean toiminnan tulipalon sattuessa ja varmistavat, että alkusammutus sujuu tehokkaasti ja turvallisesti.

Olemme asiakkaidemme luotettava kumppani kaikissa paloturvallisuuteen liittyvissä asioissa – meiltä saat asiantuntevaa palvelua ja ratkaisuja, jotka oikeasti toimivat.

Name: East Madison Fire Territory
Description:
The East Madison Fire Territory was established on January 1, 2022, through the merger of the Chesterfield Union Township and Richland Township fire departments. This consolidation aimed to enhance the level of emergency services provided to the residents of Madison County, Indiana. By combining resources and expertise, the East Madison Fire Territory has been able to offer improved coverage and response capabilities to its designated area.

Covering a first-due area of 47 square miles, the East Madison Fire Territory responds to a diverse range of locations, including residential, commercial, and agricultural areas. This coverage encompasses the entirety of Richland Township and Union Township, which includes the Town of Chesterfield. Additionally, the East Madison Fire Territory provides automatic aid to neighboring fire departments such as Lafayette Township and Adams Township, as well as the cities of Anderson and Alexandria. Name: Fire And Safety Works
Description:
Fire and Safety Works.

We are third-party accredited for Fire Door Installation, Fire Door Maintenance and Fire Stopping Services.
The legislation around fire door safety is extensive and for good reason. The safety of your staff and premises is of the utmost importance but it is often something that is unknowingly compromised. The 'Fire Door' is the first line of defence between you and the fire and plays a crucial role in restricting the spread of fire and smoke, thus reducing injury, property damage and death.
When you call upon the services of Fire and Safety Works we provide new Fire Door & Frame Installation, Maintenance / Upgrades / Repairs, Inspections and Surveys. We will quickly establish if the products you have in place have been well maintained and that both you and your premises are fully compliant to Fire Safety Regulations.

We are a family run business operating in the South East of England but supplying nationwide. 

We have had many years of experience working on various projects that have had complex and demanding areas of works which involved planning, compliance issues, working to hours to suit the needs of the clients and completion in the timescale for the customer. Over this time the world of Fire Precaution Works has always demanded that the Contractor be up to standard with their knowledge in the fitting of the correct materials for the job in hand. This in mind we have undertaken the relevant courses and obtained memberships of the right organisations for the works to be carried out in a compliant way. The knowledge of fire door safety works and fire stopping works has come a long way in the industry and we have seen many changes for the good regarding the knowledge required to undertake these specialized works.

Name: BlazeTrap
Description:
BlazeTrap is dedicated to redefining passive fire protection through smart, practical innovation. Our mission is simple: to engineer solutions that meet the demands of the latest legislation and ensure safer buildings for all.

Our award winning product, the Rapid Outlet Box System (ROBS), is a stainless steel electrical back box that outperforms traditional designs. Where existing fire resistant back boxes on the market leave wall cavities vulnerable, ROBS offers a complete, modular system combining a stainless steel outer with a removable, injection moulded intumescent unit. This design enables staged installation and future inspection or maintenance, supporting long term compliance and traceability. UL-EU certified, ROBS is the only known fire rated socket box system of its kind designed to give stakeholders confidence in both safety and regulatory alignment.

We’re dedicated to combining deep market expertise with innovation to help you maintain a golden thread of information, achieve compliance, and protect lives.

Name: Community Brigade
Description:
During wildfire season, firefighters get stretched thin. 90% of homes burn from flying embers, not direct contact with a wildfire.

Wildfires can blaze over thousands of square miles and firefighters constantly move to fight the front of the fire.

Most homes do not ignite from direct contact with the flame front. When intense heat combines with wind, small burning embers can travel miles away from the fire perimeter. Flying embers are the cause of up to 90% of homes destroyed by wildfire.

While firefighters focus on the flame front, Community Brigade volunteers support “mop-up” operations to reduce the risk of structures burning from flying embers.

Name: Bombeiros Voluntários Portuenses
Description:
Os Bombeiros Portuenses foram Fundados a 9 de Abril de 1924. Contando, inicialmente com elementos dos Bombeiros Voluntários do Porto, a Comissão Organizadora da Associação Humanitária dos Bombeiros Voluntários Portuenses, estabeleceu-se num antigo edifício na Rua do Bolhão, a 09 de Abril de 1924 (data da fundação desta Associação Humanitária.).

A partir da sua fundação os Portuenses participaram em diversas iniciativas como a I Grande Parada de Bombeiros e a Romagem a Guimarães pelas Comemorações do Centenário da Fundação da Nacionalidade. Estes foram ainda condecorados em 1927 com o grau de Cavaleiro da Ordem da Torre e Espada do Valor, Lealdade e Mérito, a mais alta condecoração nacional.

Em 1936 receberam o grau de Comendador da Ordem de Benemerência e em 1940 o grau de Oficial da Ordem Militar de Cristo. Dadas as pequenas dimensões do Quartel na Rua do Bolhão, foi sempre ambicionado por estes bombeiros, a mudança de instalações e até mesmo a aquisição de um terreno para a construção de um novo quartel.

Assim em 27 de Abril de 1933, os Portuenses passaram das modestas instalações situadas na Rua do Bolhão, para um edifício situado na Rua de Fernandes Tomás. Finalmente em 1983 a Câmara Municipal do Porto deliberou a cedência de um terreno situado na Rua das Cruzes em Ramalde para a construção de um novo quartel. O lançamento da 1ª pedra ocorreu em 1990 e em 24 de Junho de 1993 foi inaugurado.

Name: Smart Mist Fire
Description:
Watermist is considered to be a fixed fire protection system that uses water to control, suppress or extinguish a fire.

SmartMist is a much better alternative to outdated sprinkler systems. They’re easier to install, and can be retrofitted into existing properties.

The most beneficial reason to use watermist as a way of fire suppression is that it uses much less water than standard sprinkler systems. This results in lower water costs, less water damage to the property and less pressure on the environment.

The watermist is also better at targeting fires and putting them out directly – they evaporate on contact with the fire which prevents re-ignition, and the mist can also reach a wider area for better coverage.

Finally, another big advantage is that the reaction time is much faster than traditional sprinkler systems, which can make all the difference between a situation that can be salvaged and one that would be detrimental to your home or business.
